translations.tran: 她的去世让他陷入悲痛。

translations.sentence: The new regulations will be brought into force next week.
translations.tran: 新规定将于下周生效。

translations.sentence: The government will bring the new law into force.
translations.tran: 政府将实施新法律。

translations.sentence: They brought the new machinery into operation.
translations.tran: 他们启动了新机器。

translations.sentence: The hospital brought the new equipment into operation.
translations.tran: 医院将新设备投入使用。

translations.sentence: They brought new ideas into the project.
translations.tran: 他们将新的想法带入了项目。

translations.sentence: He brought a new perspective into the discussion.
translations.tran: 他为讨论引入了一个新的视角。

translations.sentence: The meeting was brought to a close.
translations.tran: 会议结束了。

translations.sentence: The investigation was brought to a close.
translations.tran: 调查告一段落。

translations.sentence: The police brought the car to a stop.
translations.tran: 警察使汽车停了下来。

translations.sentence: They managed to bring the negotiations to a stop.
translations.tran: 他们设法使谈判停止。

translations.sentence: The negotiations brought the war to an end.
translations.tran: 谈判结束了战争。

translations.sentence: The judge's decision brought the trial to an end.
translations.tran: 法官的判决使审判告一段落。

translations.sCN: 使某事实现，使某事成功
translations.sentence: The project finally brought their years of planning to fruition.
translations.tran: 这个项目最终使他们多年的计划得以实现。

translations.sentence: Careful planning brought their efforts to fruition.
translations.tran: 精心的计划使他们的努力结出了成果。

translations.sentence: The smell of baking bread brought back memories to mind.
translations.tran: 烤面包的味道使人想起了回忆。

translations.sentence: This song always brings my childhood to mind.
translations.tran: 这首歌总是让我想起我的童年。

translations.sCN: 引起某人的注意，提请某人注意
translations.sentence: I would like to bring this issue to your attention.
translations.tran: 我想提请你注意这个问题。

translations.sentence: The manager brought the employee's mistake to his attention.
translations.tran: 经理提醒员工注意他的错误。

translations.sentence: The firefighters worked hard to bring the fire under control.
translations.tran: 消防员努力控制火势。

translations.sentence: The police are trying to bring the situation under control.
translations.tran: 警方正在努力控制局势。

translations.sCN: 引得全场喝彩，赢得满堂喝彩
translations.sentence: The comedian brought the house down with his jokes.
translations.tran: 这位喜剧演员用他的笑话引爆全场。

translations.sentence: Her performance brought the house down.
translations.tran: 她的表演引起了轰动。

translations.sentence: The doctor brought the patient through the illness.
translations.tran: 医生帮助病人度过了疾病。

translations.sCN: 使…安全度过，帮助…摆脱困境
translations.sentence: The rescue team brought the survivors through the disaster.
translations.tran: 救援队帮助幸存者度过了灾难。

translations.sCN: 使…达到，使…进入某种状态
translations.sentence: The speech brought the audience to tears.
translations.tran: 演讲让观众流下了眼泪。

translations.sentence: His actions brought him to the brink of disaster.
translations.tran: 他的行为使他濒临灾难的边缘。

translations.sentence: The accident brought traffic to a halt.
translations.tran: 这场事故使交通停滞。

translations.sentence: The strike brought production to a halt.
translations.tran: 罢工使生产暂停。

translations.sCN: 将…绳之以法，把…交付审判
translations.sentence: The police are working to bring the criminals to justice.
translations.tran: 警方正在努力将罪犯绳之以法。

translations.sentence: They vowed to bring the perpetrators to justice.
translations.tran: 他们发誓要将肇事者绳之以法。

translations.sentence: The actors brought the characters to life.
translations.tran: 演员们使角色变得栩栩如生。

translations.sentence: The artist brought the sculpture to life with exquisite detail.
translations.tran: 艺术家用精美的细节使雕塑栩栩如生。

translations.sentence: The investigation brought the truth to light.
translations.tran: 调查揭露了真相。

translations.sentence: The journalist’s research brought the scandal to light.
translations.tran: 记者调查使丑闻曝光。

translations.sentence: That song brings to mind my childhood.
translations.tran: 那首歌使我想起了我的童年。

translations.sentence: The painting brought to mind a summer evening.
translations.tran: 这幅画让人想起一个夏天的傍晚。

translations.sentence: The economic crisis brought the country to its knees.
translations.tran: 经济危机使这个国家崩溃。

translations.sentence: The illness brought him to his knees.
translations.tran: 疾病让他屈服。

translations.sentence: His gambling habit brought him to ruin.
translations.tran: 他的赌博习惯使他破产。

translations.sentence: The bad investments brought the company to ruin.
translations.tran: 糟糕的投资使公司走向破产。

translations.sentence: The conference brought together experts from all over the world.
translations.tran: 这次会议汇集了来自世界各地的专家。

translations.sentence: Music can bring people together.
translations.tran: 音乐可以使人们团结在一起。

translations.sentence: She brought up her children alone.
translations.tran: 她独自抚养孩子。

translations.sentence: He brought up a very important point during the meeting.
translations.tran: 他在会议上提出了一个非常重要的观点。

translations.sentence: The child brought up his lunch.
translations.tran: 孩子把午饭吐了出来。

translations.sentence: It is challenging to bring up children in this day and age.
translations.tran: 在这个时代抚养孩子是一个挑战。

translations.sentence: Parents have a responsibility to bring up their children well.
translations.tran: 父母有责任好好抚养孩子。

translations.sentence: The slowest runners brought up the rear of the race.
translations.tran: 跑得最慢的选手在比赛中殿后。

translations.sentence: The stragglers brought up the rear of the hiking group.
translations.tran: 掉队者在徒步旅行队伍的最后面。

translations.sentence: The new law will bring the changes into effect next month.
translations.tran: 这项新法律将于下个月开始生效。

translations.sentence: The government decided to bring the policy into effect immediately.
translations.tran: 政府决定立即开始实施这项政策。

translations.sentence: The engineers finally brought the new machinery into operation.
translations.tran: 工程师们终于使新机器投入了使用。

translations.sentence: The government will bring the new law into operation next month.
translations.tran: 政府将在下个月开始实施这项新法律。

translations.sentence: The company decided to bring the new strategy into practice.
translations.tran: 公司决定开始实行新策略。

translations.sentence: They are trying to bring these theories into practice.
translations.tran: 他们正试图将这些理论应用于实践。

translations.sentence: The committee finally brought the discussion to a conclusion.
translations.tran: 委员会最终结束了讨论并得出结论。

translations.sentence: The accident brought the traffic to a standstill.
translations.tran: 事故使交通陷入停滞。

translations.sentence: The scandal brought the company to its knees.
translations.tran: 丑闻使公司垮台。

translations.sentence: The old fort bristled with cannons.
translations.tran: 这座古老的堡垒布满了大炮。

translations.sentence: He bristled with anger when he heard the news.
translations.tran: 当他听到这个消息时，怒火中烧。

translations.sentence: Traveling can broaden your mind.
translations.tran: 旅行可以开阔你的视野。

translations.sentence: She tends to brood about her problems.
translations.tran: 她倾向于反复思考她的问题。

translations.sentence: He sat in silence, brooding on the past.
translations.tran: 他默默地坐着，沉思着过去。

translations.sentence: Don't brood on your failures; learn from them.
translations.tran: 不要对你的失败耿耿于怀，要从中吸取教训。

translations.sentence: She brooded over her lost love.
translations.tran: 她沉思着她失去的爱情。

translations.sentence: He brooded over the unfairness of his situation.
translations.tran: 他反复思考他处境的不公平。

translations.sentence: He brushed aside her objections and continued with his plan.
translations.tran: 他无视她的反对意见，继续执行他的计划。

translations.sentence: She brushed aside the rumors.
translations.tran: 她对谣言置之不理。

translations.sentence: He brushed off her concerns with a joke.
translations.tran: 他用一个玩笑敷衍了她的担忧。

translations.sentence: He tried to brush off the dust from his coat.
translations.tran: 他试图掸掉外套上的灰尘。

translations.sentence: I need to brush up my French before my trip to Paris.
translations.tran: 在去巴黎旅行之前，我需要复习一下我的法语。

translations.sentence: I tried to buck him up after his disappointment.
translations.tran: 在他失望之后，我试图鼓励他。

translations.sentence: Buck up! Things will get better.
translations.tran: 振作起来！事情会好转的。

translations.sentence: We need to budget for the new equipment.
translations.tran: 我们需要为新设备编预算。

translations.sentence: The company presented its annual budget plan.
translations.tran: 公司提交了年度预算计划。

translations.sentence: The software has a function built in to back up your data.
translations.tran: 该软件内置了备份数据的功能。

translations.sentence: The costs were built in to the overall price.
translations.tran: 这些成本被计入了总价中。

translations.sentence: They built safety features into the design.
translations.tran: 他们在设计中加入了安全功能。

translations.sentence: The company plans to build on its success in the domestic market.
translations.tran: 该公司计划以其在国内市场的成功为基础。

translations.sentence: We can build on the relationships we've already established.
translations.tran: 我们可以利用我们已经建立的关系。

translations.sentence: The company is trying to build up its reputation.
translations.tran: 这家公司正试图建立其声誉。

translations.sentence: She needs to build up her strength.
translations.tran: 她需要增强体力。

translations.sentence: Traffic began to build up during rush hour.
translations.tran: 交通在高峰时段开始聚集。

translations.sentence: The new design builds upon the existing technology.
translations.tran: 新的设计建立在现有技术之上。

translations.sentence: I kept bumping against the furniture in the dark.
translations.tran: 我在黑暗中不断撞到家具。

translations.sentence: His views bump against mine on this issue.
translations.tran: 他的观点在这个问题上与我的相冲突。

translations.sentence: We bumped along the dirt road for hours.
translations.tran: 我们在土路上颠簸了几个小时。

translations.sentence: They're just bumping along, waiting for something to happen.
translations.tran: 他们只是得过且过，等待事情发生。

translations.sentence: The company decided to bump me down to a lower position.
translations.tran: 公司决定把我降职到较低的职位。

translations.sentence: I bumped into an old friend at the supermarket.
translations.tran: 我在超市遇到了一个老朋友。

translations.sentence: Be careful not to bump into the table.
translations.tran: 小心不要碰到桌子。

translations.sentence: Bundle up, it's cold outside!
translations.tran: 穿暖和点，外面很冷！

translations.sentence: She bundled up the clothes and put them in a box.
translations.tran: 她把衣服捆扎好，放进一个箱子里。

translations.sentence: The house burned down in the fire.
translations.tran: 房子在火灾中烧毁了。

translations.sentence: She's burning herself out trying to do too much.
translations.tran: 她试图做太多事情，正在耗尽精力。

translations.sentence: The engine burned out.
translations.tran: 引擎烧坏了。

translations.sentence: He burned out after working on the project for months.
translations.tran: 他在这个项目上工作了几个月后，感到筋疲力尽。

translations.sentence: He was burning the midnight oil to finish his report.
translations.tran: 他正在熬夜工作以完成他的报告。

translations.sentence: The rocket will burn up in the atmosphere.
translations.tran: 火箭将在大气层中烧毁。

translations.sentence: We've burned up all the firewood.
translations.tran: 我们已经用完了所有的柴火。

translations.sentence: The police burst into the building.
translations.tran: 警察冲进了大楼。

translations.sentence: She burst into laughter at the joke.
translations.tran: 她听到这个笑话后突然大笑起来。

translations.sentence: The news burst on the public.
translations.tran: 这个消息突然传到了公众面前。

translations.sentence: The sun burst on the horizon.
translations.tran: 太阳突然出现在地平线上。

translations.sentence: She burst out with a loud cry.
translations.tran: 她突然大声哭了起来。

translations.sentence: He burst out laughing at the absurd situation.
translations.tran: 他看到这荒谬的情况后突然大笑起来。

translations.sentence: The truth burst upon him.
translations.tran: 真相突然出现在他面前。

translations.sentence: But for his help, I would have failed.
translations.tran: 要不是他的帮助，我就会失败。

translations.sentence: I was going to go home, but then I decided to stay.
translations.tran: 我本来要回家的，但是后来我决定留下。

translations.sentence: He said he didn't want to come, but then he changed his mind.
translations.tran: 他说他不想来，可是他改变主意了。

translations.sCN: 但是话又说回来；不过再想想
translations.sentence: I don't think he'll win, but then again, anything is possible.
translations.tran: 我不认为他会赢，但是话又说回来，一切皆有可能。

translations.sentence: It was a difficult situation, but then again, what isn't?
translations.tran: 这是一个困难的处境，但是，什么又不是呢？

translations.sentence: I wish he wouldn't butt in when I'm talking.
translations.tran: 我希望他不要在我说话的时候插嘴。

translations.sentence: It's not your business to butt in.
translations.tran: 这不关你的事，不要插手。

translations.sentence: She decided to button her lips and say nothing.
translations.tran: 她决定闭口不言，什么也不说。

translations.sentence: Button up your coat; it's cold outside.
translations.tran: 扣上你的外套，外面很冷。

translations.sentence: Let's button up the project and go home.
translations.tran: 让我们完成这个项目然后回家吧。

translations.sentence: I don't buy into the idea that aliens built the pyramids.
translations.tran: 我不相信外星人建造了金字塔的说法。

translations.sentence: He decided to buy into the company.
translations.tran: 他决定入股这家公司。

translations.sentence: They tried to buy off the witnesses.
translations.tran: 他们试图收买证人。

translations.sentence: The company bought off the remaining shares.
translations.tran: 公司买断了剩余股份。

translations.sentence: He bought out his partner's share in the business.
translations.tran: 他买断了合伙人在公司中的股份。

translations.sentence: The larger company decided to buy out the smaller one.
translations.tran: 更大的公司决定全资收购较小的公司。

translations.sentence: I bought this book for ten dollars.
translations.tran: 我花了十美元买了这本书。

translations.sentence: Investors started to buy up the company's shares.
translations.tran: 投资者开始大量收购该公司的股票。

translations.sentence: There was a lot of buzz about the new movie.
translations.tran: 关于这部新电影有很多议论。

translations.sentence: Bees were buzzing about the flowers.
translations.tran: 蜜蜂在花丛中嗡嗡地飞。

translations.sentence: She was buzzing around the house all day.
translations.tran: 她一整天都在屋子里忙碌。

translations.sentence: The flies were buzzing around the food.
translations.tran: 苍蝇在食物周围嗡嗡地飞。

translations.sentence: Just buzz off and leave me alone!
translations.tran: 滚开，别烦我！

translations.sentence: She won the election by a large margin.
translations.tran: 她以很大优势赢得了选举。

translations.sentence: I found the book by accident.
translations.tran: 我偶然发现了这本书。

translations.sentence: We shipped the goods by air.
translations.tran: 我们空运了货物。

translations.sCN: 据大家所说；根据所有说法
translations.sentence: By all accounts, he is a very talented musician.
translations.tran: 据大家所说，他是一位非常有才华的音乐家。

translations.sentence: By all means, come to the party!
translations.tran: 当然，来参加派对吧！

translations.sentence: She was by all nerves before the audition.
translations.tran: 她在试镜前非常紧张。

translations.sentence: We can understand this phenomenon by analogy.
translations.tran: 我们可以通过类比来理解这种现象。

translations.sentence: I'll be there by and by.
translations.tran: 我很快就到。

translations.sentence: The storm will pass by and by.
translations.tran: 暴风雨将会逐渐过去。

translations.sentence: By and large, the meeting was a success.
translations.tran: 总的来说，这次会议很成功。

translations.sentence: The movie, by and large, was quite entertaining.
translations.tran: 总的来说，这部电影很有娱乐性。

translations.sentence: Are you going to the party by any chance?
translations.tran: 你万一要去参加派对吗？

translations.sentence: Could you have seen my keys by any chance?
translations.tran: 你是否可能看到了我的钥匙？

translations.sentence: You must not, by any means, tell her the truth.
translations.tran: 你无论如何都不能告诉她真相。

translations.sentence: I'll finish the work by any means necessary.
translations.tran: 我将不惜一切代价完成这项工作。

translations.sentence: By appearances, he seemed very happy.
translations.tran: 从表面上看，他似乎很开心。

translations.sentence: I go to school by bike.
translations.tran: 我骑自行车上学。

translations.sentence: He is a citizen by birth.
translations.tran: 他出生就是公民。

translations.sentence: She's a princess by birth.
translations.tran: 她生来就是公主。

translations.sentence: I go to work by bus.
translations.tran: 我乘公共汽车去上班。

translations.sentence: I go to work by car.
translations.tran: 我开车去上班。

translations.sentence: I met him by chance.
translations.tran: 我碰巧遇到了他。

translations.sentence: By chance, they found the lost treasure.
translations.tran: 他们意外地找到了失落的宝藏。

translations.sentence: The project was approved by common consent.
translations.tran: 该项目经一致同意获得批准。

translations.sentence: By common consent of the board members, he was appointed.
translations.tran: 经董事会成员一致同意，他被任命了。

translations.sentence: By comparison, her sister is much taller.
translations.tran: 相比之下，她姐姐高得多。

translations.sentence: By comparison with his brother, he is very quiet.
translations.tran: 与他哥哥相比，他非常安静。

translations.sentence: By contrast, her sister is very outgoing.
translations.tran: 相比之下，她妹妹非常外向。

translations.sentence: By contrast with the first film, this one is very boring.
translations.tran: 与第一部电影相比，这一部非常无聊。

translations.sentence: The exhibition is by courtesy of the museum.
translations.tran: 此次展览蒙博物馆好意。

translations.sentence: The photo is by courtesy of a friend.
translations.tran: 这张照片承蒙一位朋友提供。

translations.sentence: He got the money by hook or by crook.
translations.tran: 他用不正当手段得到了这笔钱。

translations.sentence: The temperature rose by degrees.
translations.tran: 温度逐渐上升。

translations.sentence: It was done by design.
translations.tran: 这是故意做的。

translations.sentence: She learned to swim by doing it every day.
translations.tran: 她每天练习游泳来学会了游泳。

translations.sentence: They were able to escape by doing a distraction.
translations.tran: 他们通过制造一个干扰得以逃脱。

translations.sentence: You can improve your English by doing exercises regularly.
translations.tran: 你可以通过经常做练习来提高你的英语水平。

translations.sentence: She learned to play the piano by ear.
translations.tran: 她通过听音学会了弹钢琴。

translations.sentence: He played the tune by ear.
translations.tran: 他凭听觉弹奏了这支曲子。

translations.sentence: The document was sent by error.
translations.tran: 这份文件因错误而被发出。

translations.sentence: The information was entered by error.
translations.tran: 这些信息被误输入。

translations.sentence: The cost was calculated by estimate.
translations.tran: 成本是通过估计计算的。

translations.sentence: He was determined to win the election by fair means or foul.
translations.tran: 他决心不择手段地赢得选举。

translations.sentence: This is by far the best book I have read this year.
translations.tran: 这绝对是今年我读过的最好的书。

translations.sentence: He is by far the most talented student.
translations.tran: 他是迄今为止最有天赋的学生。

translations.sentence: They took control of the building by force.
translations.tran: 他们用武力控制了这座建筑。

translations.sentence: He was made to do it by force.
translations.tran: 他被迫做了这件事。

translations.sentence: You can find the answer by going through the documents.
translations.tran: 你可以通过检查这些文件找到答案。

translations.sentence: I can't be sure, but I'm going to say by guess.
translations.tran: 我不能确定，但我要说通过猜测。

translations.sentence: This work is done by hand.
translations.tran: 这项工作是手工完成的。

translations.sentence: The letter was delivered by hand.
translations.tran: 这封信是亲手送达的。

translations.sentence: He knew the poem by heart.
translations.tran: 他能背诵这首诗。

translations.sentence: I'll get it by hook or by crook.
translations.tran: 我会想尽一切办法得到它。

translations.sentence: He was determined to win the race by hook or by crook.
translations.tran: 他决心不择手段地赢得比赛。

translations.sentence: The conclusion was reached by inference.
translations.tran: 这一结论是通过推断得出的。

translations.sentence: The car was bought by installments.
translations.tran: 这辆车是分期付款买的。

translations.sentence: She knew something was wrong by instinct.
translations.tran: 她凭直觉知道有些不对劲。

translations.sentence: It wasn't by intention.
translations.tran: 这不是故意的。

translations.sentence: The door opened by itself.
translations.tran: 门自动打开了。

translations.sentence: The problem is not serious by itself.
translations.tran: 问题本身并不严重。

translations.sentence: His English has improved by leaps and bounds.
translations.tran: 他的英语进步突飞猛进。

translations.sentence: By little and little, the old house fell into disrepair.
translations.tran: 这座老房子渐渐地破败了。

translations.sentence: He improved his English by little and little.
translations.tran: 他一点一点地提高了英语水平。

translations.sentence: They communicated by means of sign language.
translations.tran: 他们通过手语交流。

translations.sentence: We managed to escape by means of a secret passage.
translations.tran: 我们设法通过一条秘密通道逃脱了。

translations.sentence: He recited the poem by memory.
translations.tran: 他凭记忆背诵了这首诗。

translations.sentence: I learned the map by memory.
translations.tran: 我凭记忆记住了地图。

translations.sentence: I took the wrong train by mistake.
translations.tran: 我错上了火车。

translations.sentence: The package was delivered to the wrong address by mistake.
translations.tran: 包裹由于失误被送到了错误的地址。

translations.sentence: She knew everyone by name.
translations.tran: 她知道每个人的名字。

translations.sentence: The teacher addressed the students by name.
translations.tran: 老师直呼学生的名字。

translations.sentence: He is kind by nature.
translations.tran: 他天性善良。

translations.sentence: Cats are independent creatures by nature.
translations.tran: 猫天性是独立的生物。

translations.sentence: The city is beautiful by night.
translations.tran: 这座城市在夜晚很美。

translations.sentence: They travelled by night to avoid the heat.
translations.tran: 他们夜间旅行以避开炎热。

translations.sentence: By no means should you give up.
translations.tran: 你决不应该放弃。

translations.sentence: He is by no means a fool.
translations.tran: 他绝对不是傻瓜。

translations.sentence: By now, they should have arrived.
translations.tran: 现在，他们应该已经到了。

translations.sentence: By now, he has finished the book.
translations.tran: 到目前为止，他已经读完了这本书。

translations.sentence: He sent a gift by occasion of her birthday.
translations.tran: 他因为她的生日送了一份礼物。

translations.sentence: A special dinner was held by occasion of their anniversary.
translations.tran: 为了庆祝他们的结婚纪念日，举办了一场特别的晚宴。

translations.sentence: She is a teacher by occupation.
translations.tran: 她的职业是教师。

translations.sentence: He is a musician by occupation.
translations.tran: 他作为职业是音乐家。

translations.sentence: She prefers to live by herself.
translations.tran: 她喜欢一个人住。

translations.sentence: He did it by himself.
translations.tran: 他独自完成了这件事。

translations.sentence: They traveled to Paris by plane.
translations.tran: 他们乘飞机去了巴黎。

translations.sentence: We'll go there by plane.
translations.tran: 我们将乘飞机去那里。

translations.sentence: They agreed by pressed for time.
translations.tran: 他们迫于时间压力而同意了。

translations.sentence: He is a doctor by profession.
translations.tran: 他的职业是医生。

translations.sentence: By profession, she is a lawyer.
translations.tran: 她的职业是律师。

translations.sentence: They traveled by rail.
translations.tran: 他们乘火车旅行。

translations.sentence: We're going to travel by rail.
translations.tran: 我们将坐火车旅行。

translations.sentence: He was absent by reason of illness.
translations.tran: 他因为生病而缺席。

translations.sentence: The meeting was cancelled by reason of the storm.
translations.tran: 由于暴风雨，会议被取消了。

translations.sentence: He resigned by reason of his health.
translations.tran: 他由于健康原因辞职。

translations.sentence: The shop closed by reason of the fire.
translations.tran: 这家店由于火灾而关闭。

translations.sentence: He was fired by reason that he was late.
translations.tran: 他因为迟到而被解雇。

translations.sentence: He was punished by reason that he cheated.
translations.tran: 他因为作弊而受到惩罚。

translations.sentence: He played the song by request.
translations.tran: 他应请求演奏了这首歌。

translations.sentence: The meeting was held by request.
translations.tran: 会议是应要求举行的。

translations.sentence: By rights, you should be in charge.
translations.tran: 按理说，你该负责。

translations.sentence: The property belonged to her by rights.
translations.tran: 这处房产合法地属于她。

translations.sentence: I met her by sheer chance at the conference.
translations.tran: 我在会议上纯属偶然遇到了她。

translations.sentence: They traveled to Europe by ship.
translations.tran: 他们乘船去了欧洲。

translations.sentence: I'm sympathetic to her situation.
translations.tran: 我同情她的处境。

translations.sentence: We should be sympathetic towards those in need.
translations.tran: 我们应该同情那些需要帮助的人。

translations.sentence: The police did everything by the book.
translations.tran: 警察们一切都按规矩办事。

translations.sentence: By the by, have you heard about the new project?
translations.tran: 顺便说一下，你听说过新项目了吗？

translations.sentence: I hope to finish the report by the end of the week.
translations.tran: 我希望在周末结束前完成这份报告。

translations.sentence: A man by the name of John called.
translations.tran: 一个名叫约翰的人打来电话。

translations.sentence: By the same token, we should also consider the environmental impact.
translations.tran: 同样，我们还应该考虑环境影响。

translations.sentence: By the time we arrived, the movie had already started.
translations.tran: 到我们到达时，电影已经开始了。

translations.sentence: The problem was solved by the use of a new algorithm.
translations.tran: 这个问题通过使用新算法得到了解决。

translations.sentence: By the way, have you seen Sarah?
translations.tran: 顺便说一下，你看到莎拉了吗？

translations.sentence: By then, the situation had changed completely.
translations.tran: 到那时，情况已经完全改变了。

translations.sentence: By this criterion, the project is a success.
translations.tran: 根据这一标准，这个项目是成功的。

translations.sentence: We can solve the problem by this means.
translations.tran: 我们可以通过这种方式解决这个问题。

translations.sentence: By this standard, the results are unsatisfactory.
translations.tran: 根据这一标准，结果不尽人意。

translations.sentence: By tradition, the eldest son inherits the property.
translations.tran: 根据传统，长子继承财产。

translations.sentence: They went to Paris by train.
translations.tran: 他们乘火车去了巴黎。

translations.sentence: He learned to ride a bike by trial and error.
translations.tran: 他通过反复试验学会了骑自行车。

translations.sentence: The guards patrolled the area by turns.
translations.tran: 警卫们轮流巡逻该区域。

translations.sentence: They argued by turns.
translations.tran: 他们轮流争吵。

translations.sentence: She was promoted by virtue of her experience.
translations.tran: 她凭借经验得到晋升。

translations.sentence: By virtue of their position, they had access to the information.
translations.tran: 根据他们的职位，他们可以获取这些信息。

translations.sentence: He was arrested by virtue of the evidence against him.
translations.tran: 他由于不利于他的证据而被捕。

translations.sentence: They sent the package by way of FedEx.
translations.tran: 他们通过联邦快递发送了包裹。

translations.sentence: She offered a suggestion by way of compromise.
translations.tran: 她提出了一个建议以作为妥协。

translations.sentence: I called about the job opening.
translations.tran: 我打电话询问了工作机会。

translations.sentence: They called the baby after her grandmother.
translations.tran: 他们用她祖母的名字给孩子命名。

translations.sentence: The mother called after her children as they ran out.
translations.tran: 孩子们跑出去时，母亲呼唤着他们。

translations.sentence: The bus calls at every stop.
translations.tran: 公共汽车在每一站停靠。

translations.sentence: We will call at your house tomorrow.
translations.tran: 我们明天去你家拜访。

translations.sentence: The train calls at the station.
translations.tran: 火车在车站停靠。

translations.sentence: The report calls attention to the problem of climate change.
translations.tran: 这份报告提请注意气候变化的问题。

translations.sentence: Could you call me back later?
translations.tran: 你可以稍后再给我回电话吗？

translations.sentence: This situation calls for immediate action.
translations.tran: 这种情况需要立即采取行动。

translations.sentence: The protestors called for reforms.
translations.tran: 抗议者呼吁改革。

translations.sentence: The environmental group called for action to protect the forest.
translations.tran: 环保组织呼吁采取行动保护森林。

translations.sentence: The hiker called for help when he got lost.
translations.tran: 登山者迷路时呼救了。

translations.sentence: The speech called forth strong emotions.
translations.tran: 这场演讲引起了强烈的情绪。

translations.sentence: They called in an expert to help.
translations.tran: 他们请来一位专家帮忙。

translations.sentence: The evidence called in question the witness's testimony.
translations.tran: 证据对证人的证词提出了质疑。

translations.sentence: The scandal called into question his integrity.
translations.tran: 丑闻对他的正直提出了质疑。

translations.sCN: 到此为止，结束一天的工作
translations.sentence: It's late; let's call it a day.
translations.tran: 很晚了，我们今天就到此为止吧。

translations.sentence: The party's over; let's call it a night.
translations.tran: 派对结束了，我们该睡觉了。

translations.sentence: They called off the meeting.
translations.tran: 他们取消了会议。

translations.sentence: The rescue team had to call off the search due to the severe weather.
translations.tran: 由于恶劣天气，救援队不得不取消搜救行动。

translations.sentence: They called off the search for the missing hiker when night fell.
translations.tran: 当夜幕降临，他们停止了对失踪徒步旅行者的搜寻。

translations.sentence: I will call on my friend tomorrow.
translations.tran: 我明天会去拜访我的朋友。

translations.sentence: The president called on the nation to unite.
translations.tran: 总统呼吁全国团结起来。

translations.sentence: The teacher called on me to answer the question.
translations.tran: 老师点名让我回答问题。

translations.sentence: The protesters called out slogans during the demonstration.
translations.tran: 抗议者在示威活动中高喊口号。

translations.sentence: The military was called out to assist with the disaster relief.
translations.tran: 军队被出动以协助救灾。

translations.sentence: The manager called out the employee for his mistakes.
translations.tran: 经理公开批评了员工的错误。

translations.sentence: I will call him about the meeting.
translations.tran: 我将就会议给他打电话。

translations.sCN: 因为某事给某人打电话
translations.sentence: She called me about the problem with the car.
translations.tran: 她因为汽车的问题给我打了电话。

translations.sentence: The teacher called the student down for talking in class.
translations.tran: 老师斥责了上课说话的学生。

translations.sentence: The manager called him down for being late.
translations.tran: 经理因为他迟到而责骂了他。

translations.sentence: The lawyer will call him in testimony to the court.
translations.tran: 律师将传唤他到法庭作证。

translations.sentence: They called several witnesses in testimony.
translations.tran: 他们传唤了几个证人作证。

translations.sentence: I had to call the police when I saw the break-in.
translations.tran: 当我看到入室盗窃时，我不得不报警。

translations.sentence: If you see a crime, you should call the police.
translations.tran: 如果你看到犯罪行为，你应该报警。

translations.sentence: The teacher will call the roll at the beginning of the class.
translations.tran: 老师将在上课开始时点名。

translations.sentence: The officer called the roll to make sure everyone was present.
translations.tran: 军官点名以确保每个人都在场。

translations.sentence: That song calls to mind my childhood.
translations.tran: 那首歌让我想起了我的童年。

translations.sentence: The painting calls to mind a scene from a novel.
translations.tran: 这幅画使人想起小说中的一个场景。

translations.sentence: He was called up during the war.
translations.tran: 他在战争期间被征召入伍。

translations.sentence: I will call up my friend later.
translations.tran: 我稍后会给我朋友打电话。

translations.sentence: The smell called up memories of her grandmother's kitchen.
translations.tran: 气味唤起了她对祖母厨房的回忆。

translations.sentence: The program will call up the data from the database.
translations.tran: 程序将从数据库中调用数据。

translations.sentence: The government called upon citizens to conserve water.
translations.tran: 政府呼吁市民节约用水。

translations.sentence: The company called upon her to improve her performance.
translations.tran: 公司要求她提高她的表现。

translations.sentence: She called upon her strength to finish the race.
translations.tran: 她依靠她的力量完成了比赛。

translations.sentence: The evidence calls his honesty in question.
translations.tran: 证据对他的诚实提出了质疑。

translations.sentence: The new findings call the theory in question.
translations.tran: 新的发现引起了对该理论的怀疑。

translations.sentence: Please calm down, there's no need to panic.
translations.tran: 请冷静下来，没有必要恐慌。

translations.sentence: She tried to calm down her crying child.
translations.tran: 她试图让哭泣的孩子平静下来。

translations.sentence: The old building came apart in the storm.
translations.tran: 这座老建筑在风暴中解体了。

translations.sentence: Their marriage came apart due to constant arguments.
translations.tran: 由于不断的争吵，他们的婚姻破裂了。

translations.sentence: The toy car came apart when he dropped it.
translations.tran: 他掉下玩具车时，它散开了。

translations.sentence: The politician is campaigning for the presidency.
translations.tran: 这位政治家正在竞选总统。

translations.sentence: Activists are campaigning for environmental protection.
translations.tran: 活动家正在为环境保护而奋斗。

translations.sentence: I can hardly wait for the weekend.
translations.tran: 我迫不及待地想要周末了。

translations.sentence: We can hardly wait to see the results.
translations.tran: 我们迫不及待地想看到结果。

translations.sentence: She can hardly wait to go on vacation.
translations.tran: 她迫不及待地想去度假。

translations.sentence: The children can hardly wait to open their presents.
translations.tran: 孩子们迫不及待地想打开他们的礼物。

phrase: can hardly wait to do sth.

translations.sentence: I can hardly wait to see my family.
translations.tran: 我迫不及待地想见到我的家人。

translations.sentence: The students can hardly wait to finish the exam.
translations.tran: 学生们迫不及待地想完成考试。

translations.sentence: I can not help but laugh at the situation.
translations.tran: 我忍不住对这种情况笑了出来。

translations.sentence: She can not help crying when she hears this song.
translations.tran: 她听到这首歌时情不自禁地哭了。

translations.sentence: I can't but agree with you.
translations.tran: 我不得不赞同你。

translations.sentence: We can't but follow their instructions.
translations.tran: 我们只能按照他们的指示去做。

translations.sentence: I can't help it if she doesn't like me.
translations.tran: 如果她不喜欢我，我也没办法。

translations.sentence: I'm sorry, but I can't help. There's nothing I can do.
translations.tran: 我很抱歉，但我无能为力。我什么也做不了。

translations.sentence: I can't help but wonder if he's telling the truth.
translations.tran: 我忍不住想知道他是否在说实话。

translations.sentence: I can't help doing what I believe is right.
translations.tran: 我忍不住去做我认为对的事情。

translations.sentence: She can't help singing in the shower.
translations.tran: 她忍不住在淋浴时唱歌。

translations.sCN: 无效的搭配, 通常使用can't help but
translations.sentence: This is an incorrect usage.
translations.tran: 这是一个不正确的用法。

translations.sCN: 无效的搭配，通常使用can't help but do
translations.sentence: This sentence is grammatically incorrect: I can't help to do it.
translations.tran: 这句话在语法上是错误的：我无法帮助去做这件事。

translations.sCN: 无效的搭配, 通常使用can't help but do sth.
translations.sentence: This sentence is grammatically incorrect: I can't help to do it.
translations.tran: 这句话在语法上是错误的：我无法帮助去做这件事。

translations.sentence: I can't wait to see you again!
translations.tran: 我迫不及待地想再次见到你！

translations.sentence: The benefits of the new drug cancel out its side effects.
translations.tran: 新药的益处抵消了它的副作用。

translations.sentence: I cannot but agree with your assessment.
translations.tran: 我不得不赞同你的评估。

translations.sCN: 忍不住；禁不住；无能为力
translations.sentence: I cannot help feeling sorry for him.
translations.tran: 我忍不住为他感到难过。

translations.sentence: She cannot help but admire his determination.
translations.tran: 她禁不住钦佩他的决心。

translations.sCN: 通常不能单独使用, 后面常跟形容词或副词
translations.sentence: This phrase is often used in the form 'cannot...too...'.
translations.tran: 这个短语通常以“cannot...too...”的形式使用。

translations.sentence: You cannot be too careful when handling explosives.
translations.tran: 处理爆炸物时，再小心也不为过。

translations.sentence: The company has a strong capability for innovation.
translations.tran: 该公司具有很强的创新能力。

translations.sentence: He is capable of doing great things.
translations.tran: 他有能力做伟大的事情。

translations.sentence: The beautiful scenery captivated my eyes.
translations.tran: 美丽的景色吸引了我的目光。

translations.sentence: I don't care about what they think.
translations.tran: 我不在乎他们怎么想。

translations.sentence: Thank you for your care and thought.
translations.tran: 谢谢你的关心和体贴。

translations.sentence: I care for my elderly neighbor.
translations.tran: 我照顾我的年迈邻居。

translations.sentence: Would you care for a cup of coffee?
translations.tran: 你想来杯咖啡吗？

translations.sentence: Please send the letter to my friend, care of his office.
translations.tran: 请把信寄给我朋友，转交他的办公室。

translations.sentence: The child is in the care of his grandparents.
translations.tran: 这个孩子由他的祖父母照顾。

translations.sentence: The audience was carried away by the performance.
translations.tran: 观众被这场表演迷住了。

translations.sentence: The flood carried away the bridge.
translations.tran: 洪水冲走了桥。

translations.sentence: The old photos carried her back to her childhood.
translations.tran: 这些旧照片让她回忆起了童年。

translations.sentence: The accountant will carry forward the balance to the next year.
translations.tran: 会计师将把余额结转到下一年。

translations.sentence: We must carry forward the project despite the challenges.
translations.tran: 尽管有挑战，我们也要继续推进这个项目。

phrase: carry forward the spirit of sth.

translations.sentence: We should carry forward the spirit of the Olympics.
translations.tran: 我们应该发扬奥运精神。

translations.sentence: The government is working to carry the new policies into effect.
translations.tran: 政府正在努力实施新的政策。

translations.sentence: It's time to carry these ideas into practice.
translations.tran: 是时候把这些想法付诸实践了。

translations.sentence: The strong wind carried off his hat.
translations.tran: 大风刮走了他的帽子。

translations.sentence: She carried off the role perfectly.
translations.tran: 她完美地完成了这个角色。

translations.sentence: Despite the difficulties, they carried on with their work.
translations.tran: 尽管遇到了困难，他们还是继续工作。

translations.sentence: He carried on the family business after his father retired.
translations.tran: 他父亲退休后，他接管了家族生意。

translations.sentence: The soldiers carried out the orders.
translations.tran: 士兵们执行了命令。

translations.sentence: They carried out a series of experiments.
translations.tran: 他们进行了一系列实验。

translations.sentence: The police carried out a search of the premises.
translations.tran: 警察对 premises 进行了搜查。

translations.sentence: The effects of the drought carried over into the next year.
translations.tran: 干旱的影响延续到了下一年。

translations.sentence: Any unused vacation days will carry over to next year.
translations.tran: 任何未使用的假期都会结转到下一年。

translations.sentence: They were determined to carry through the project despite the setbacks.
translations.tran: 尽管遇到了挫折，他们还是决心完成这个项目。

translations.sentence: Her strength of character carried her through the difficult times.
translations.tran: 她坚强的性格帮助她度过了困难时期。

translations.sentence: His opinion carries a lot of weight in the company.
translations.tran: 他在公司里的意见很有分量。

translations.sentence: The government is working to carry the new law into effect.
translations.tran: 政府正在努力实施新法律。

translations.sentence: We need to carry the theory into practice.
translations.tran: 我们需要把理论付诸实践。

translations.sentence: She carved out a successful career for herself.
translations.tran: 她为自己开创了一个成功的职业。

translations.sentence: He carved out a figure from the wood.

translations.sentence: He has a comprehensive mind, capable of seeing all sides of an issue.
translations.tran: 他有全面的思维，能够看到问题的各个方面。

translations.sentence: Her comprehensive mind made her a great leader.
translations.tran: 她广泛的思维使她成为一个伟大的领导者。

translations.sentence: He tried to conceal his feelings from her.
translations.tran: 他试图对她隐瞒自己的感情。

translations.sentence: The spy concealed his identity from the enemy.
translations.tran: 间谍向敌人隐藏了他的身份。

translations.sentence: She concealed the truth from her parents.
translations.tran: 她对父母隐瞒了真相。

translations.sentence: They concealed the evidence from the police.
translations.tran: 他们向警方隐瞒了证据。

translations.sentence: I can't conceive of living without music.
translations.tran: 我无法设想没有音乐的生活。

translations.sentence: It's difficult to conceive of the scale of the universe.
translations.tran: 很难想象宇宙的规模。

translations.sentence: We conceive of education as a lifelong process.
translations.tran: 我们将教育视为一个终身的过程。

translations.sentence: They conceive of the future as a time of great change.
translations.tran: 他们把未来想象成一个巨大变革的时代。

translations.sentence: I need to concentrate on my studies.
translations.tran: 我需要集中精力学习。

translations.sentence: The company will concentrate on its core business.
translations.tran: 公司将专注于其核心业务。

translations.sentence: He concentrated his efforts on finishing the project.
translations.tran: 他集中精力完成这个项目。

translations.sentence: She concentrated her efforts on helping the poor.
translations.tran: 她把精力集中在帮助穷人上。

translations.sentence: The researchers concentrated upon the effects of pollution.
translations.tran: 研究人员专注于污染的影响。

translations.sentence: The team concentrated upon improving the product.
translations.tran: 团队专注于改进产品。

translations.sentence: Don't concern yourself about the small details.
translations.tran: 不要担心这些小细节。

translations.sentence: She concerns herself about her children's safety.
translations.tran: 她挂念着她孩子的安全。

translations.sentence: He concerned himself with the problem of homelessness.
translations.tran: 他专注于无家可归者的问题。

translations.sentence: She concerns herself with her appearance.
translations.tran: 她关注自己的外表。

translations.sentence: The committee will concern itself with environmental issues.
translations.tran: 委员会将致力于环境问题。

translations.sentence: I am concerned about his health.
translations.tran: 我担心他的健康。

translations.sentence: The government is concerned about the rising crime rate.
translations.tran: 政府关切着不断上升的犯罪率。

translations.sentence: We can conclude from the evidence that he is guilty.
translations.tran: 我们可以从证据中得出结论，他是有罪的。

translations.sentence: I conclude from her silence that she doesn't agree.
translations.tran: 我从她的沉默中推断出她不同意。

translations.sentence: The meeting concluded with a vote.
translations.tran: 会议以投票结束。

translations.sentence: The speech concluded with a thank you.
translations.tran: 演讲以感谢结束。

translations.sentence: The police are still seeking conclusive evidence.
translations.tran: 警方仍在寻找决定性证据。

translations.sentence: We need conclusive evidence to prove his guilt.
translations.tran: 我们需要确凿的证据来证明他的罪行。

translations.sentence: The government condemned the company for its environmental pollution.
translations.tran: 政府谴责该公司污染环境的行为。

translations.sentence: The teacher condemned the student for cheating on the exam.
translations.tran: 老师谴责了学生在考试中作弊的行为。

translations.sentence: The judge condemned the criminal to imprisonment.
translations.tran: 法官判决罪犯监禁。

translations.sentence: The circumstances condemned him to a life of poverty.
translations.tran: 环境注定了他一生贫困。

translations.sentence: The jury condemned the murderer to death.
translations.tran: 陪审团判处杀人犯死刑。

translations.sentence: The famous conductor will conduct a concert next week.
translations.tran: 这位著名的指挥家下周将指挥一场音乐会。

translations.sentence: He conducted himself badly at the party, drinking too much and being rude.
translations.tran: 他在聚会上举止不当，喝得太多，而且很粗鲁。

translations.sentence: She conducted herself well during the interview, answering questions confidently and politely.
translations.tran: 她在面试中举止得体，自信而礼貌地回答了问题。

translations.sentence: The university will confer a degree on the graduating students.
translations.tran: 这所大学将授予毕业生学位。

translations.sCN: 商议，讨论（on 的意思是“关于”）
translations.sentence: The committee will confer on the new policy next week.
translations.tran: 委员会下周将讨论新的政策。

translations.sentence: The president conferred the medal on the soldier for his bravery.
translations.tran: 总统因士兵的英勇而授予他勋章。

translations.sentence: The queen will confer knighthood upon him.
translations.tran: 女王将授予他爵士头衔。

translations.sentence: I need to confer with my lawyer about this case.
translations.tran: 我需要就此案与我的律师商议。

translations.sentence: The team conferred with the engineers on the project's design.
translations.tran: 团队与工程师就项目的设计进行了商议。

translations.sentence: The university will confer an honorary degree on the retiring professor.
translations.tran: 大学将授予退休教授荣誉学位。

translations.sentence: The king conferred the title of Duke upon his loyal servant.
translations.tran: 国王授予他忠诚的仆人公爵的头衔。

translations.sentence: He confessed to stealing the money.
translations.tran: 他承认偷了钱。

translations.sentence: The suspect finally confessed his guilt to the police.
translations.tran: 嫌疑人最终向警方承认了自己的罪行。

translations.sentence: The defendant confessed to the crime during the trial.
translations.tran: 被告在审判中承认了犯罪。

translations.sentence: She confessed to having lied to her parents.
translations.tran: 她承认对父母撒了谎。

translations.sentence: He confessed to the affair.
translations.tran: 他承认了这段婚外情。

translations.sentence: She confided in her best friend about her problems.
translations.tran: 她向她最好的朋友倾诉了她的问题。

translations.sentence: He has complete confidence in his abilities.
translations.tran: 他对自己的能力充满信心。

translations.sCN: 对某人有信心；信任某人
translations.sentence: She has great confidence in her son's abilities.
translations.tran: 她对她儿子的能力很有信心。

translations.sentence: I have complete confidence in my friend's honesty.
translations.tran: 我完全相信我朋友的诚实。

translations.sCN: 对某事有信心；相信某事
translations.sentence: The company has confidence in the new product.
translations.tran: 公司对新产品有信心。

translations.sentence: We need to have confidence in our strategy.
translations.tran: 我们需要对我们的策略有信心。

translations.sentence: The investigation was confined to financial matters.
translations.tran: 调查仅限于财务问题。

translations.sentence: The discussion will be confined to the main issues.
translations.tran: 讨论将仅限于主要问题。

translations.sentence: He confined his remarks to the topic at hand.
translations.tran: 他将他的言论限制在手头的话题上。

translations.sentence: The illness confined her to bed for a week.
translations.tran: 疾病使她卧床一周。

translations.sentence: The new law confines the use of fireworks to public displays.
translations.tran: 新法律将烟花的使用限制在公共展示中。

translations.sentence: The report confines its analysis to the last decade.
translations.tran: 报告将其分析限制在过去十年中。

translations.sentence: The prison walls confine the prisoners within.
translations.tran: 监狱的墙壁将囚犯限制在里面。

translations.sentence: The budget confines spending within a certain limit.
translations.tran: 预算将支出限制在一定限额之内。

translations.sentence: The board will confirm the contract next week.
translations.tran: 董事会下周将确认合同。

translations.sentence: The parties involved confirmed the contract with their signatures.
translations.tran: 相关方通过签字确认了合同。

translations.sentence: The new data confirms the theory.
translations.tran: 新数据证实了该理论。

translations.sentence: Further research is needed to confirm the theory.
translations.tran: 需要进一步的研究来证实该理论。

translations.sentence: The evidence confirms the details in the report.
translations.tran: 证据证实了报告中的细节。

translations.sentence: I can confirm you in your choice.
translations.tran: 我可以确认你的选择。

translations.sCN: 证实某人的信念；确认某人的信仰
translations.sentence: The experience confirmed her belief in the power of prayer.
translations.tran: 这次经历证实了她对祈祷力量的信念。

translations.sentence: The success of the project confirmed his belief in the team.
translations.tran: 项目的成功加强了他对团队的信心。

translations.sCN: 使某人更加确信；巩固某人的信念
translations.sentence: Her success confirmed him in his ambition.
translations.tran: 她的成功使他更加坚定了自己的雄心壮志。

translations.sentence: The company confirmed him in his position.
translations.tran: 公司确认了他的职位。

translations.sentence: His views conflict with mine.
translations.tran: 他的观点与我的观点相冲突。

translations.sentence: This evidence conflicts with the earlier statements.
translations.tran: 这一证据与之前的声明相矛盾。

translations.sentence: The building must conform to safety regulations.
translations.tran: 这座建筑必须符合安全规定。

translations.sentence: He refused to conform to the established norms.
translations.tran: 他拒绝顺从既定的规范。

translations.sentence: The data conforms with the previous findings.
translations.tran: 数据与之前的发现一致。

translations.sentence: The product must conform with industry standards.
translations.tran: 该产品必须符合行业标准。

translations.sentence: We must confront the difficulties head-on.
translations.tran: 我们必须正面应对困难。

translations.sentence: She is ready to confront any difficulties.
translations.tran: 她已准备好克服任何困难。

translations.sCN: 使某人面对；向某人质问
translations.sentence: They confronted the suspect with the evidence.
translations.tran: 他们向嫌疑人出示了证据。

translations.sentence: The accident confronted him with the reality of his carelessness.
translations.tran: 这次事故让他正视了他粗心的现实。

translations.sentence: Don't confuse the words "there" and "their".
translations.tran: 不要把单词“there”和“their”混淆。

translations.sentence: I often confuse him with his brother.
translations.tran: 我经常把他误认为是他的兄弟。

translations.sentence: I would like to congratulate you on your achievement.
translations.tran: 我想祝贺你取得的成就。

translations.sentence: We congratulate on the new project.
translations.tran: 我们祝贺新项目。

translations.sentence: I congratulated him on his promotion.
translations.tran: 我祝贺他升职。

translations.sentence: She congratulated her friend on her wedding.
translations.tran: 她祝贺她的朋友结婚。

translations.sentence: We congratulated the team on their victory.
translations.tran: 我们祝贺球队获胜。

translations.sentence: I congratulated her on her success.
translations.tran: 我祝贺她取得成功。

translations.sentence: I congratulate you upon your success.
translations.tran: 我祝贺你取得成功。

translations.sentence: We congratulate him on his promotion.
translations.tran: 我们祝贺他晋升。

translations.sentence: I congratulated her upon her achievement.
translations.tran: 我祝贺她取得的成就。

translations.sentence: Congratulations to the winners!
translations.tran: 祝贺获胜者！

translations.sentence: The scent of the sea conjured up memories of my childhood.
translations.tran: 大海的气味唤起了我对童年的回忆。

translations.sentence: The magician tried to conjure up a rabbit.
translations.tran: 魔术师试图变出一只兔子。

translations.sentence: Can you connect to the Wi-Fi?
translations.tran: 你能连接到无线网络吗？

translations.sentence: I need to connect with the supplier.
translations.tran: 我需要和供应商联系。

translations.sentence: I connect with the message of the film.
translations.tran: 我与这部电影传达的信息产生了共鸣。

translations.sentence: Please connect the printer to the computer.
translations.tran: 请将打印机连接到电脑。

translations.sentence: I connect the author with his novels.
translations.tran: 我将作者和他的小说联系起来。

translations.sentence: He finally consented to my request.
translations.tran: 他最终同意了我的请求。

translations.sentence: I consider this as a great opportunity.
translations.tran: 我认为这是一个绝佳的机会。

translations.sentence: They consider him as their leader.
translations.tran: 他们把他视为他们的领袖。

translations.sentence: Happiness consists in contentment.
translations.tran: 幸福在于知足。

translations.sentence: The beauty of this painting consists in its simplicity.
translations.tran: 这幅画的美在于它的简洁。

translations.sentence: The team consists of ten players.
translations.tran: 这个团队由十名球员组成。

translations.sentence: This is not consistent with the facts.
translations.tran: 这与事实不符。

translations.sentence: His behavior is consistent with his values.
translations.tran: 他的行为与其价值观一致。

translations.sentence: The company will consolidate its subsidiaries into one.
translations.tran: 该公司将把其子公司合并成一家。

translations.sentence: The law constrained him to pay the fine.
translations.tran: 法律迫使他支付罚款。

translations.sentence: I need to consult my lawyer on this matter.
translations.tran: 我需要就此事咨询我的律师。

translations.sentence: I consulted my lawyer about the contract.
translations.tran: 我就合同的事咨询了我的律师。

translations.sCN: 就某事征求某人的意见
translations.sentence: She consulted her doctor about her symptoms.
translations.tran: 她就她的症状征求了医生的意见。

translations.sCN: 就某事向某人征求意见
translations.sentence: He consulted his financial advisor on his investments.
translations.tran: 他就他的投资向他的财务顾问征求了意见。

translations.sentence: I will consult a specialist on this matter.
translations.tran: 我将就此事咨询一位专家。

translations.sentence: The team will consult with the project manager.
translations.tran: 团队将与项目经理商议。

translations.sentence: I need to consult with my colleagues before making a decision.
translations.tran: 在做出决定之前，我需要和我的同事们协商。

translations.sentence: Jealousy consumed him with suspicion.
translations.tran: 嫉妒让他疑神疑鬼。

translations.sentence: Worry consumed her with anxiety.
translations.tran: 担忧让她焦虑不安。

translations.sentence: The disease spreads through contact with infected individuals.
translations.tran: 这种疾病通过与受感染个体的接触传播。

translations.sentence: Please keep in contact with us.
translations.tran: 请和我们保持联系。

translations.sentence: The athletes contend for the gold medal.
translations.tran: 运动员们争取金牌。

translations.sentence: Several companies are contending for the contract.
translations.tran: 几家公司正在竞争这份合同。

translations.sentence: They had to contend with a lot of problems.
translations.tran: 他们不得不应付很多问题。

translations.sentence: The government has to contend with corruption.
translations.tran: 政府必须与腐败作斗争。

translations.sentence: Contrary to expectations, the meeting was very successful.
translations.tran: 与预期相反，会议非常成功。

translations.sentence: This action is contrary to company policy.
translations.tran: 此举违反了公司政策。

translations.sentence: The bright colors of the painting contrast with the dark background.
translations.tran: 这幅画鲜艳的色彩与深色的背景形成对比。

translations.sentence: Her current success contrasts with her early struggles.
translations.tran: 她目前的成功与她早期的奋斗形成了对照。

translations.sentence: We should contrast the advantages of the new system with the old one.
translations.tran: 我们应该将新系统的优势与旧系统进行对比。

translations.sentence: He contrasted his experience with that of his colleagues.
translations.tran: 他将自己的经验与同事们的经验进行了对照。

translations.sentence: Exercise can contribute to better health.
translations.tran: 锻炼有助于改善健康。

translations.sentence: The volunteers contributed to the success of the event.
translations.tran: 志愿者们促成了这次活动的成功。

translations.sentence: Reading regularly can contribute to improving your vocabulary.
translations.tran: 经常阅读有助于提高你的词汇量。

translations.sentence: His hard work contributed to finishing the project on time.
translations.tran: 他的努力工作对按时完成项目有贡献。

translations.sentence: Each of us can contribute to the success of the project.
translations.tran: 我们每个人都可以为项目的成功做出贡献。

translations.sentence: The new policy contributed to the economic growth.
translations.tran: 新政策促进了经济增长。

translations.sentence: She contributed her time to helping the children learn.
translations.tran: 她贡献时间来帮助孩子们学习。

translations.sentence: They contributed their expertise to solving the problem.
translations.tran: 他们贡献他们的专业知识来解决这个问题。

translations.sentence: He contributed a large sum of money to the charity.
translations.tran: 他向慈善机构捐了一大笔钱。

translations.sentence: The company contributed resources to the research.
translations.tran: 公司为这项研究贡献了资源。

translations.sentence: It’s important to control your temper.
translations.tran: 控制你的脾气很重要。

translations.sentence: He struggled to control his temper.
translations.tran: 他努力控制自己的怒火。

translations.sentence: The protesters converged on the city hall.
translations.tran: 抗议者聚集在市政厅。

translations.sentence: All the evidence converges on one suspect.
translations.tran: 所有证据都集中于一个嫌疑人。

translations.sentence: They tried to convert him to their religion.
translations.tran: 他们试图让他皈依他们的宗教。

translations.sentence: The missionary worked to convert the local people to Christianity.
translations.tran: 传教士努力让当地人改信基督教。

translations.sentence: He decided to convert to Islam.
translations.tran: 他决定皈依伊斯兰教。

translations.sentence: She converted to Judaism.
translations.tran: 她改信犹太教。

translations.sentence: They converted the old warehouse into apartments.
translations.tran: 他们把旧仓库改造成了公寓。

translations.sentence: We need to convert this energy into electricity.
translations.tran: 我们需要将这种能量转换成电能。

translations.sentence: We need to convert the currency to euros.
translations.tran: 我们需要把货币转换成欧元。

translations.sentence: The artist converted the old warehouse to a studio.
translations.tran: 这位艺术家把旧仓库改造成了一个工作室。

translations.sentence: I couldn't convince him of the truth.
translations.tran: 我无法让他相信真相。

translations.sentence: She tried to convince me of her innocence.
translations.tran: 她试图让我相信她的清白。

translations.sentence: The evidence convinced the jury of his guilt.
translations.tran: 证据使陪审团相信了他的有罪。

translations.sentence: I convinced him to come with us.
translations.tran: 我说服了他和我们一起去。

translations.sentence: It's difficult to convince them to invest.
translations.tran: 很难说服他们投资。

translations.sentence: The lawyer tried to convince the court of his client's alibi.
translations.tran: 律师试图让法庭相信他委托人的不在场证明。

translations.sentence: They cooked up a story to cover their mistake.
translations.tran: 他们编造了一个故事来掩盖他们的错误。

translations.sentence: I'll cook up some pasta for dinner.
translations.tran: 我将做些意大利面作为晚餐。

translations.sentence: Let the cake cool down before you ice it.
translations.tran: 在给蛋糕涂糖霜之前，让它冷却一下。

translations.sentence: After the argument, they needed time to cool down.
translations.tran: 争吵之后，他们需要时间冷静下来。

translations.sentence: I went for a swim to cool off.
translations.tran: 我游了个泳来凉快一下。

translations.sentence: He needed some time to cool off after the argument.
translations.tran: 争吵之后，他需要一些时间来冷静一下。

translations.sentence: We will cooperate with the police in their investigation.
translations.tran: 我们将配合警方进行调查。

translations.sentence: The two companies cooperated with each other in developing the software.
translations.tran: 这两家公司合作开发了这款软件。

translations.sentence: We need to coordinate our efforts to ensure the success of the project.
translations.tran: 我们需要协调我们的努力，以确保项目的成功。

translations.sentence: She is learning to cope with the stress of her new job.
translations.tran: 她正在学习如何应对新工作带来的压力。

translations.sentence: The students were asked to copy out the sentences from the board.
translations.tran: 学生们被要求从黑板上抄写句子。

translations.sentence: The divers were exploring the colorful coral reef.
translations.tran: 潜水员们正在探索色彩缤纷的珊瑚礁。

translations.sentence: Please correct the mistakes in your essay.
translations.tran: 请纠正你文章中的错误。

translations.sentence: The study showed that smoking correlates with lung cancer.
translations.tran: 研究表明，吸烟与肺癌有关。

translations.sentence: The data does not correspond to the actual results.
translations.tran: 数据与实际结果不符。

translations.sentence: They have been corresponding with each other for years.
translations.tran: 他们已经互相通信多年了。

translations.sentence: His account of the event does not correspond with hers.
translations.tran: 他对事件的描述与她的不符。

translations.sCN: 缩在沙发里；窝在沙发里
translations.sentence: I'm just going to couch in and watch a movie tonight.
translations.tran: 我今晚只想窝在沙发里看电影。

translations.sentence: He's turned into a real couch potato since he retired.
translations.tran: 自从退休后，他变成了一个真正的电视迷。

translations.sentence: I could not help but laugh at his silly joke.
translations.tran: 我禁不住笑了他的傻笑话。

translations.sentence: She couldn't help but cry when she heard the news.
translations.tran: 当她听到这个消息时，她忍不住哭了。

translations.tran: 如果你能帮我一个忙，我将不胜感激。

translations.sentence: Could you do me a favour and carry this box?
translations.tran: 你能帮我一个忙，搬这个箱子吗？

translations.sentence: I'd be grateful if you could do me a favour.
translations.tran: 如果你能帮我一个忙，我将不胜感激。

translations.sentence: He did a good deed by helping the old lady cross the street.
translations.tran: 他帮助那位老妇人过马路，做了一件好事。

translations.sentence: Doing a good deed can make your day better.
translations.tran: 行善可以让你的一天更美好。

translations.sentence: You did a good job on the presentation.
translations.tran: 你的演讲做得很好。

translations.sentence: He did a good job of managing the team.
translations.tran: 他出色地完成了团队管理工作。

translations.sentence: They decided to do away with the old regulations.
translations.tran: 他们决定废除旧的规章制度。

translations.sentence: We need to do away with these unnecessary steps.
translations.tran: 我们需要去掉这些不必要的步骤。

translations.sentence: They do business with companies all over the world.
translations.tran: 他们与世界各地的公司做生意。

translations.sentence: We do business in the tech industry.
translations.tran: 我们在科技行业从事商业活动。

translations.sentence: He wanted to be done by fairly.
translations.tran: 他希望被公平对待。

translations.sentence: We should do by the rules.
translations.tran: 我们应该按规矩办事。

translations.sentence: I don't know what to do by her.
translations.tran: 我不知道该对她做什么。

translations.sentence: I do chores every weekend.
translations.tran: 我每个周末都做家务。

translations.sentence: He was doing down his opponent.
translations.tran: 他正在击败他的对手。

translations.sentence: He had to do duty for the absent supervisor.
translations.tran: 他不得不代理缺席的监工的职务。

translations.sentence: She does exercise every morning.
translations.tran: 她每天早上都做运动。

translations.sentence: This will do for now.
translations.tran: 这个现在可以用。

translations.sentence: I'm not sure what job I should do for.
translations.tran: 我不确定我应该做什么工作。

translations.sentence: It's important to do good deeds.
translations.tran: 做好事很重要。

translations.sentence: Exercise does good to your health.
translations.tran: 锻炼对你的健康有益。

translations.sentence: Smoking does harm to your lungs.
translations.tran: 吸烟对你的肺有害。

translations.sentence: This review doesn't do the book justice.
translations.tran: 这篇评论没有公正地评价这本书。

translations.sentence: The film does justice to the novel.
translations.tran: 这部电影充分展现了这部小说。

translations.sentence: I will do my best.
translations.tran: 我会尽力而为。

translations.sentence: He did his best to help.
translations.tran: 他尽力去帮忙。

translations.sentence: Everyone should do their bit to help.
translations.tran: 每个人都应该尽一份力。

translations.sentence: I did my bit for the environment.
translations.tran: 我为环保尽了一份力。

translations.sentence: He did his duty.
translations.tran: 他履行了他的职责。

translations.sentence: She is doing her hair.
translations.tran: 她正在梳头。

translations.sentence: I have to do my homework tonight.
translations.tran: 我今晚必须做作业。

translations.sentence: She did her level best to pass the exam.
translations.tran: 她竭尽全力通过考试。

translations.sentence: Everyone must do their share.
translations.tran: 每个人都必须尽他们的责任。

translations.sentence: She did her utmost to help him.
translations.tran: 她竭尽全力帮助了他。

translations.sentence: We will do our utmost to improve the situation.
translations.tran: 我们将尽力改善这种状况。

translations.sentence: They are doing research on the effects of climate change.
translations.tran: 他们正在研究气候变化的影响。

translations.sentence: She did research on ancient history.
translations.tran: 她从事古代史研究。

translations.sentence: Could you do me a favor and close the window?
translations.tran: 你能帮我个忙关上窗户吗？

translations.sentence: He did me a favor by lending me his car.
translations.tran: 他借给我车帮了我一个忙。

translations.sentence: Could you do me a favour and turn down the music?
translations.tran: 你能帮我个忙，把音乐关小声点吗？

translations.sentence: She did her friend a favour by keeping her secret.
translations.tran: 她保守了朋友的秘密，帮了她一个忙。

translations.sCN: 帮助某人，对某人做好事
translations.sentence: He did me a good turn by offering to help me.
translations.tran: 他主动提出帮助我，帮了我一个忙。

translations.sentence: Doing someone a good turn can make you feel better.
translations.tran: 帮助别人会让你感觉更好。

translations.sCN: 使某人感到光荣；赞扬某人
translations.sentence: The results do the team credit.
translations.tran: 结果为团队增光。

translations.sentence: Her hard work does her credit.
translations.tran: 她的努力工作值得赞赏。

translations.sentence: A walk in the fresh air will do you good.
translations.tran: 在新鲜空气中散步对你有好处。

translations.sentence: This advice will do you good in the long run.
translations.tran: 从长远来看，这个建议对你很有好处。

translations.sCN: 公正对待某人；充分展现
translations.sentence: The film doesn't do the book justice.
translations.tran: 这部电影没有充分展现这本书的精彩之处。

translations.sentence: The judge will do justice to both sides.
translations.tran: 法官将公平对待双方。

translations.sCN: 打扫一下；做些清洁工作
translations.sentence: I need to do some cleaning this weekend.
translations.tran: 这个周末我需要打扫一下。

translations.sentence: She spent the morning doing some cleaning.
translations.tran: 她整个上午都在做清洁。

translations.sentence: You should do some exercises every day to stay healthy.
translations.tran: 你应该每天做些练习来保持健康。

translations.sentence: He likes to do some exercises in the morning.
translations.tran: 他喜欢早上进行锻炼。

translations.sentence: I'm going to do some shopping this afternoon.
translations.tran: 今天下午我要去购物。

translations.sentence: She usually does some shopping on Saturdays.
translations.tran: 她通常在星期六去购物。

translations.sentence: Could you do me a favor and open the door?
translations.tran: 你能帮我一个忙，把门打开吗？

translations.sentence: He did his neighbor a favor by watching his house.
translations.tran: 他帮忙照看邻居的房子。

translations.sentence: A vacation will do you good.
translations.tran: 度假对你有好处。

translations.sentence: This experience will do her good.
translations.tran: 这次经历对她很有好处。

translations.sentence: She does sports every day.
translations.tran: 她每天都做运动。

translations.sentence: They do sports at the weekend.
translations.tran: 他们周末进行体育活动。

translations.sentence: He can work for hours at a stretch.
translations.tran: 他可以一口气工作好几个小时。

translations.sentence: I read the whole book at a stretch.
translations.tran: 我一口气读完了整本书。

translations.sCN: 在很短时间内做某事；临时
translations.sentence: He can't travel at short notice.
translations.tran: 他不能临时出行。

translations.sentence: We were able to arrange the meeting at short notice.
translations.tran: 我们能够临时安排会议。

translations.sentence: She does everything for her children.
translations.tran: 她为她的孩子们做一切。

translations.sentence: He did it for the money.
translations.tran: 他为了钱才这么做的。

phrase: do sth. for the simple reason that

translations.sentence: I did it for the simple reason that I wanted to.
translations.tran: 我这么做仅仅因为我愿意。

translations.sentence: She left for the simple reason that she was unhappy.
translations.tran: 她离开仅仅因为她不开心。

translations.sentence: What did you do to the car?
translations.tran: 你对车做了什么？

translations.sentence: She did it to help her friend.
translations.tran: 她为了帮助她的朋友才这么做的。

translations.sentence: Can you do the dishes, please?
translations.tran: 你能洗碗吗？

translations.sentence: He offered to do the dishes.
translations.tran: 他主动提出要洗碗。

translations.sentence: Would you like to do the honors and cut the cake?
translations.tran: 你想来主持并切蛋糕吗？

translations.sentence: I'll do the honors and answer the door.
translations.tran: 我来代劳开门。

translations.sentence: If you're feeling down, try to do the opposite – go out and have some fun.
translations.tran: 如果你感到沮丧，试着做相反的事情——出去玩乐一下。

translations.sCN: 做…的反面；反其道而行之
translations.sentence: He decided to do the reverse of what everyone expected and invest in a failing company.
translations.tran: 他决定反其道而行之，投资于一家濒临破产的公司。

translations.sentence: This key should do the trick to open the lock.
translations.tran: 这把钥匙应该能打开锁。

translations.sentence: A short nap might do the trick.
translations.tran: 小睡一会儿可能会达到目的。

translations.sentence: They did up the old house beautifully.
translations.tran: 他们把那栋老房子装饰得很漂亮。

translations.sentence: Do up your coat, it's cold outside.
translations.tran: 系上你的外套，外面很冷。

translations.sentence: She did up the parcel with string.
translations.tran: 她用绳子把包裹整理好。

translations.sentence: She spent an hour doing up her hair before the party.
translations.tran: 她在参加聚会前花了一个小时盘起头发。

translations.sentence: She did very well in her exams.
translations.tran: 她在考试中表现很好。

translations.sentence: The company did well in the last quarter.
translations.tran: 该公司在上个季度经营良好。

translations.sentence: I could do with a cup of coffee right now.
translations.tran: 我现在需要一杯咖啡。

translations.sentence: What did you do with the old newspapers?
translations.tran: 你把旧报纸怎么处理了？

translations.sentence: We'll have to do without a car for a while.
translations.tran: 我们暂时得没有车也行。

translations.sentence: I didn't mean to do wrong.
translations.tran: 我无意做错事。

translations.sentence: The charity organization doles out food to the homeless.
translations.tran: 慈善机构向无家可归者分发食物。

translations.sentence: The boss dole out the raises in a miserly way.
translations.tran: 老板吝啬地分发加薪。

translations.sentence: The market is flooded with domestic brands.
translations.tran: 市场充斥着国产品牌。

translations.sentence: They often donate to various charities.
translations.tran: 他们经常向各种慈善机构捐款。

translations.sentence: She donated her old clothes to the homeless shelter.
translations.tran: 她把旧衣服捐赠给收容所。

translations.sentence: We had to double back to get the forgotten keys.
translations.tran: 我们不得不折回去取忘记的钥匙。

translations.sentence: The students had to double up in the dorm rooms.
translations.tran: 学生们不得不在宿舍里合住。

translations.sentence: The company doubled up its efforts to improve sales.
translations.tran: 该公司加倍努力以提高销量。

translations.sentence: I have some doubt about his honesty.
translations.tran: 我对他是否诚实有所怀疑。

translations.sentence: All his efforts went down the drain.
translations.tran: 他所有的努力都白费了。

translations.sentence: These traditions have been passed down through the ages.
translations.tran: 这些传统已经世代相传。

translations.sentence: Down with the government!
translations.tran: 打倒政府！

translations.sentence: I often doze off during long meetings.
translations.tran: 在冗长的会议上，我经常打瞌睡。

translations.sentence: The baby dozed off in the car.
translations.tran: 婴儿在车里睡着了。

translations.sentence: Dozens of people attended the event.
translations.tran: 几十个人参加了这次活动。

translations.sentence: There were dozens of reasons for his failure.
translations.tran: 他失败的原因有许多。

translations.sentence: The economic downturn is dragging down the company's profits.
translations.tran: 经济衰退正在拖累公司的利润。

translations.sentence: His negativity always drags me down.
translations.tran: 他的消极情绪总是让我情绪低落。

translations.sentence: He tried to drag me in on his scheme.
translations.tran: 他试图把我拉入他的计划。

translations.sentence: Don't drag me in this argument.
translations.tran: 别把我扯进这场争论。

translations.sentence: The meeting dragged on for hours.
translations.tran: 会议拖了几个小时。

translations.sentence: The war dragged on for years.
translations.tran: 战争持续了多年。

translations.sentence: They dragged out the negotiations for weeks.
translations.tran: 他们把谈判拖延了数周。

translations.sentence: He dragged out the old photo albums.
translations.tran: 他把旧相册拿了出来。

translations.sentence: The water drained away quickly.
translations.tran: 水很快就流走了。

translations.sentence: His energy was draining away.
translations.tran: 他的精力正在逐渐流失。

translations.sentence: The scandal drained him of his credibility.
translations.tran: 丑闻耗尽了他的信誉。

translations.sentence: Drain the pasta of the water.
translations.tran: 把意大利面里的水沥干。

translations.sentence: Drain off the excess oil.
translations.tran: 把多余的油沥干。

translations.sentence: The long journey drained us of our energy.
translations.tran: 漫长的旅程耗尽了我们的精力。

translations.sentence: From these facts, we can draw a conclusion.
translations.tran: 从这些事实中，我们可以得出结论。

translations.sCN: 对…讳莫如深；对…避而不谈
translations.sentence: Let's draw a veil over the past and focus on the future.
translations.tran: 让我们对过去的事情避而不谈，专注于未来。

translations.sCN: 对某事讳莫如深；对某事避而不谈
translations.sentence: Let's draw a veil over the unfortunate incident.
translations.tran: 让我们对那次不幸的事件避而不谈。

translations.sentence: The artist drew inspiration from nature.
translations.tran: 这位艺术家从大自然中汲取灵感。

translations.sentence: He drew me aside to talk privately.
translations.tran: 他把我拉到一边私下谈话。

translations.sentence: The report drew attention to the problem of poverty.
translations.tran: 该报告引起了人们对贫困问题的关注。

translations.sentence: The government's policies drew attention to social inequality.
translations.tran: 政府的政策引起了人们对社会不平等的关注。

translations.sentence: The advertisement drew customers away from their competitors.
translations.tran: 这则广告把顾客从他们的竞争对手那里吸引走了。

translations.sentence: Their differences began to draw them away from each other.
translations.tran: 他们的差异开始使他们疏远。

translations.sentence: He drew back in fear.
translations.tran: 他害怕地退缩了。

translations.sentence: They drew back from their plans.
translations.tran: 他们放弃了他们的计划。

translations.sentence: The authors drew from a wide range of sources.
translations.tran: 作者们从广泛的来源中汲取了资料。

translations.sentence: The train slowly drew in to the station.
translations.tran: 火车缓缓驶入车站。

translations.sentence: The days are starting to draw in.
translations.tran: 白天开始变短了。

translations.sentence: Don't draw me into your argument.
translations.tran: 别把我卷入你的争论。

translations.sentence: He drew the smoke into his lungs.
translations.tran: 他吸入烟雾。

translations.sentence: We should draw lessons from past mistakes.
translations.tran: 我们应该从过去的错误中吸取教训。

translations.sentence: They drew lots to decide who would go first.
translations.tran: 他们抽签决定谁先开始。

translations.sentence: She drew on her experience to solve the problem.
translations.tran: 她利用自己的经验解决了这个问题。

translations.sentence: As the day drew on, the weather got worse.
translations.tran: 随着时间的推移，天气变得越来越糟。

translations.sentence: His strange behavior drew my attention.
translations.tran: 他奇怪的行为引起了我的注意。

translations.sentence: I'd like to draw your attention to the latest developments.
translations.tran: 我想提请您注意最新的发展。

translations.sCN: 引起某人对某事的注意
translations.sentence: The speaker drew our attention to the importance of education.
translations.tran: 演讲者提请我们注意教育的重要性。

translations.sentence: He is now old enough to draw his pension.
translations.tran: 他现在已经到了可以领取养老金的年龄。

translations.sentence: She draws a good salary.
translations.tran: 她领取一份不错的工资。

translations.sentence: She drew herself up and faced him.
translations.tran: 她站直身子，面对着他。

translations.sentence: The bank allowed me to draw out money.
translations.tran: 银行允许我取钱。

translations.sentence: Don't draw the meeting out any longer.
translations.tran: 不要再拖延会议了。

translations.sentence: I'd like to draw your attention to this important point.
translations.tran: 我想提请你注意这个重要的点。

translations.sCN: 引起某人对某事的注意
translations.sentence: The article drew the public's attention to the issue.
translations.tran: 这篇文章引起了公众对这个问题的关注。

translations.sentence: The meeting is drawing to a close.
translations.tran: 会议即将结束。

translations.sentence: They drew up a contract.
translations.tran: 他们起草了一份合同。

translations.sentence: The car drew up outside the house.
translations.tran: 车停在了房子外面。

translations.sentence: She drew upon her savings to pay the bills.
translations.tran: 她动用了她的积蓄来支付账单。

translations.sentence: He drew water from the well.
translations.tran: 他从井里打水。

translations.sentence: I dreamt about my childhood last night.
translations.tran: 昨晚我梦见了我的童年。

translations.sentence: She dreams of becoming a famous singer.
translations.tran: 她梦想成为一名著名的歌手。

translations.sentence: She dreamed up a clever plan to escape.
translations.tran: 她想出了一个巧妙的计划来逃脱。

translations.sentence: The company is always dreaming up new products.
translations.tran: 这家公司总是在设计新产品。

translations.sCN: 给某人穿上…的衣服；打扮某人
translations.sentence: They dressed the children up in costumes for the party.
translations.tran: 他们为孩子们穿上服装参加派对。

translations.sCN: 盛装；打扮；穿着正式服装
translations.sentence: You don't need to dress up to go to the cinema.
translations.tran: 你去电影院不需要穿得很正式。

translations.sentence: The children dressed up as pirates for Halloween.
translations.tran: 孩子们在万圣节装扮成海盗。

translations.sentence: He drank down the entire glass of water.
translations.tran: 他一口气喝光了整杯水。

translations.sentence: She drank in the beautiful scenery.
translations.tran: 她沉醉于美丽的景色。

translations.sentence: The audience drank in every word the speaker said.
translations.tran: 听众全神贯注地听着演讲者说的每一个字。

translations.sentence: Let's drink to your success!
translations.tran: 让我们为你的成功干杯！

translations.sentence: Drink up your milk before it gets cold.
translations.tran: 在牛奶变凉之前喝完。

translations.sentence: What are you driving at?
translations.tran: 你到底想说什么？

translations.sentence: The farmer drove away the crows from his crops.
translations.tran: 农民把乌鸦从他的庄稼地里赶走了。

translations.sentence: She drove away in her new car.
translations.tran: 她开着她的新车离开了。

translations.sCN: 用力驱赶（常用在非正式用语）
translations.sentence: They were driving away at the cows.
translations.tran: 他们正在用力驱赶奶牛。

translations.sentence: The presenter drove home the importance of the topic.
translations.tran: 演讲者强调了这个话题的重要性。

translations.sentence: I'm tired, I'm going to drive home now.
translations.tran: 我累了，我现在要开车回家。

translations.sCN: 强调自己的观点，使人明白
translations.sentence: He used a powerful example to drive his point home.
translations.tran: 他用一个有力的例子来强调他的观点。

translations.sentence: They drove out the invaders from the city.
translations.tran: 他们把入侵者赶出了城市。

translations.sentence: We drove up to the cabin for the weekend.
translations.tran: 我们开车到小屋度周末。

translations.sentence: The increased demand drove up the prices.
translations.tran: 需求的增加推高了价格。

translations.sentence: The number of tourists dropped away after the incident.
translations.tran: 事件发生后，游客数量减少了。

translations.sentence: I'll drop by your place later.
translations.tran: 我稍后会顺便去你家。

translations.sentence: Feel free to drop in anytime.
translations.tran: 欢迎随时来访。

translations.sentence: I dropped in at the library on my way home.
translations.tran: 我在回家的路上顺便去了图书馆。

translations.sentence: I dropped in on my friend to say hello.
translations.tran: 我顺便去看我的朋友，问候一声。

translations.sentence: Could you drop me off at the station?
translations.tran: 你能送我到车站吗？

translations.sentence: I dropped off during the movie.
translations.tran: 我在电影放映过程中睡着了。

translations.sentence: The company's sales have dropped off.
translations.tran: 该公司的销售额下降了。

translations.sentence: I dropped on my old friend at the library.
translations.tran: 我在图书馆碰巧遇到了我的老朋友。

translations.sentence: Why don't you drop on us this weekend?
translations.tran: 你为什么不这个周末来拜访我们呢？

translations.sentence: The speaker elaborated on the importance of education.

phrase: elbow sb. out of the way

translations.sentence: He elbowed his way through the crowd.

translations.sCN: 向某人阐明某事；启发某人

translations.sentence: The police are working to ensure residents from danger.
translations.tran: 警察正在努力确保居民免受危险。

translations.sentence: He decided to enter for the competition.
translations.tran: 他决定报名参加比赛。

translations.sentence: She entered for a position at the company.
translations.tran: 她申请了这家公司的一个职位。

translations.sentence: They entered into a contract.
translations.tran: 他们缔结了合同。

translations.sentence: She will enter on her new career next month.

translations.sentence: They entered on the project with enthusiasm.

translations.sentence: The board will entertain a proposal at the next meeting.

translations.tran: 我考虑过搬到另一个城市的想法。

translations.tran: 魔术师的表演吸引了人们的注意力。

translations.tran: 这张证书使您有资格获得折扣。

translations.tran: 他的辛勤工作使他有权获得晋升。

translations.tran: 她有资格获得遗产份额。

translations.sentence: You are entitled to your opinion.
translations.tran: 你有权发表你的意见。

translations.sentence: I can't envisage myself living in the countryside.
translations.tran: 我无法设想自己住在乡下。

translations.tran: 她将公司设想为行业领导者。

translations.tran: 这些债券的价值与最初的投资相等。
