translations.tran: 二加二等于四。

translations.sentence: His performance was equal to expectations.
translations.tran: 他的表现相当于预期。

translations.sentence: The new cars are equipped with GPS.
translations.tran: 这些新车配备了 GPS。

translations.sentence: We need to equip the lab with new instruments.
translations.tran: 我们需要为实验室配备新的仪器。

translations.sentence: The emergency vehicles are equipped with sirens.
translations.tran: 紧急车辆配备有警报器。

translations.sentence: The kitchen is equipped with all modern appliances.
translations.tran: 厨房装配了所有现代电器。

translations.sentence: The school will equip students with the necessary skills.
translations.tran: 学校将为学生配备必要的技能。

translations.sentence: They equipped the soldiers with new weapons.
translations.tran: 他们为士兵装备了新武器。

translations.sentence: Governments are working to eradicate poverty from the world.
translations.tran: 各国政府正在努力从世界上消除贫困。

translations.sentence: It is a long-term goal to eradicate poverty from the world.
translations.tran: 根除世界贫困是一个长期的目标。

translations.sentence: When in doubt, err on the side of caution.
translations.tran: 如有疑问，请谨慎行事。

translations.sentence: To avoid any problems, err on the side of formality.
translations.tran: 为了避免任何问题，宁可正式也不随便。

translations.sentence: The inmate managed to escape from prison.
translations.tran: 囚犯设法从监狱逃脱了。

translations.sentence: The movie is about an attempt to escape from prison.
translations.tran: 这部电影讲述了一次越狱尝试。

translations.sentence: The suspect tried to escape observation by hiding in the crowd.
translations.tran: 嫌疑人试图躲在人群中逃避观察。

translations.sentence: The chameleon's ability to change color helps it escape observation.
translations.tran: 变色龙的变色能力有助于它避免被观察到。

translations.sentence: He offered to escort her home after the party.
translations.tran: 聚会结束后，他主动提出护送她回家。

translations.sentence: The police officer escorted the lost child home.
translations.tran: 警察把迷路的孩子送回了家。

translations.sentence: The prosecution worked tirelessly to establish his guilt.
translations.tran: 检方不遗余力地证明他有罪。

translations.sentence: The evidence presented at the trial aimed to establish his guilt beyond a reasonable doubt.
translations.tran: 庭审中出示的证据旨在无可置疑地确立他的罪行。

translations.sentence: The lawyer worked hard to establish his client's guilt.
translations.tran: 律师努力证明其客户的罪行。

translations.sentence: The investigation aimed to establish the suspect's guilt.
translations.tran: 调查旨在证实嫌疑人有罪。

translations.sentence: The government supports policies to protect the rights of ethnic minorities.
translations.tran: 政府支持保护少数民族权利的政策。

translations.sentence: The city is home to a diverse range of ethnic minorities.
translations.tran: 这座城市居住着各种不同的少数族裔。

translations.sentence: He was accused of trying to evade his duties.
translations.tran: 他被指控试图逃避他的职责。

translations.sentence: Some people try to evade their duties by claiming illness.
translations.tran: 有些人试图通过声称生病来逃避他们的责任。

translations.sentence: He tried to evade duty by faking an injury.
translations.tran: 他试图通过假装受伤来逃避责任。

translations.sentence: Some politicians are accused of trying to evade duty.
translations.tran: 一些政治家被指控试图逃避应尽的义务。

translations.sentence: The employee was fired for repeatedly evading his duties.
translations.tran: 该员工因多次逃避职责而被解雇。

translations.sentence: She was criticized for evading her duties as a leader.
translations.tran: 她因逃避作为领导者的职责而受到批评。

translations.sentence: Even as they celebrated, they were aware of the challenges ahead.
translations.tran: 即使他们庆祝，他们也意识到未来的挑战。

translations.sentence: Even as he spoke, tears welled up in his eyes.
translations.tran: 正当他说话时，眼泪涌上了他的眼睛。

translations.sentence: I will go to the party even if it rains.
translations.tran: 即使下雨，我也会去参加派对。

translations.sentence: Even if I fail, I will have no regrets.
translations.tran: 就算我失败了，我也不会后悔。

translations.sentence: She had little money, and even less time.
translations.tran: 她几乎没钱，更不用说时间了。

translations.sentence: He was reluctant to spend money, even less to invest it.
translations.tran: 他不太愿意花钱，更不用说投资了。

translations.sentence: Even now, I still remember the details of that day.
translations.tran: 即使现在，我仍然记得那天发生的细节。

translations.sentence: Even now, after all these years, he hasn't changed.
translations.tran: 即使现在，这么多年过去了，他也没有改变。

translations.sentence: The weather was bad, but even so, we went for a walk.
translations.tran: 天气不好，但即便如此，我们还是去散步了。

translations.sentence: She was tired, even so, she continued working.
translations.tran: 她很累，尽管如此，她还是继续工作。

translations.sentence: Even then, I knew something was wrong.
translations.tran: 即使那时，我就知道有些不对劲。

translations.sentence: Even then, he refused to give up.
translations.tran: 即使在那时，他也没有放弃。

translations.sentence: Even though it was raining, they went outside.
translations.tran: 即使下雨，他们也出去了。

translations.sentence: She continued to smile, even though she was sad.
translations.tran: 尽管她很悲伤，她还是继续微笑。

translations.sCN: 性情温和的；心平气和的
translations.sentence: He is known for being an even-tempered person.
translations.tran: 他以性情温和著称。

translations.sentence: An even-tempered approach is needed to resolve this issue.
translations.tran: 需要用一种心平气和的方式来解决这个问题。

translations.sentence: Ever since the accident, he has been afraid to drive.
translations.tran: 自从那次事故以来，他就害怕开车了。

translations.sentence: We've been friends ever since we met in college.
translations.tran: 自从我们在大学相遇后，我们一直是朋友。

translations.sentence: Thank you ever so much for your help.
translations.tran: 非常感谢您的帮助。

translations.sentence: She was ever so grateful for their kindness.
translations.tran: 她对他们的善良感激不尽。

translations.sentence: The world is an ever-changing place.
translations.tran: 世界是一个不断变化的地方。

translations.sentence: The fashion industry is ever-changing.
translations.tran: 时尚产业瞬息万变。

translations.sentence: She's every bit as talented as her sister.
translations.tran: 她和她姐姐一样有才华。

translations.sentence: The new model is every bit as good as the old one.
translations.tran: 新款车型一点也不比旧款差。

translations.sentence: She explored every facet of study, from literature to astrophysics.
translations.tran: 她探索了学习的方方面面，从文学到天体物理学。

translations.sentence: The project covers every facet of study related to climate change.
translations.tran: 该项目涵盖了与气候变化相关的学习的各个方面。

translations.sentence: The room was searched every inch.
translations.tran: 房间的每一寸都被搜查了。

translations.sentence: He's every inch a gentleman.
translations.tran: 他十足是个绅士。

translations.sentence: I see my old friends every now and again.
translations.tran: 我时不时地会见到我的老朋友们。

translations.sentence: I still go to the cinema every now and then.
translations.tran: 我还是偶尔会去看电影。

translations.sentence: Every once in a while, I enjoy a good book.
translations.tran: 偶尔，我喜欢读一本好书。

translations.sentence: They meet every other week.
translations.tran: 他们每隔一周见面。

translations.sentence: I take my medicine every other day.
translations.tran: 我每隔一天吃一次药。

translations.sentence: We go out for dinner every so often.
translations.tran: 我们时不时地出去吃晚饭。

translations.sentence: The twins are exactly alike.
translations.tran: 这对双胞胎一模一样。

translations.sentence: The school's curriculum is heavily influenced by exam-oriented education.
translations.tran: 学校的课程受到应试教育的严重影响。

translations.sCN: 擅长于，在…方面表现出色
translations.sentence: She excels in science.
translations.tran: 她擅长科学。

translations.sentence: Everyone except for John went to the party.
translations.tran: 除了约翰，所有人都去了派对。

translations.sentence: There are exceptions to every rule.
translations.tran: 每个规则都有例外。

translations.sentence: I exchanged the book for a movie ticket.
translations.tran: 我用书换了一张电影票。

translations.sCN: 就某事交换意见，交流看法
translations.sentence: The colleagues exchanged notes on the project's progress.
translations.tran: 同事们就项目的进展交换了意见。

translations.sentence: We exchanged views on the current economic situation.
translations.tran: 我们交换了对当前经济形势的看法。

translations.sentence: I exchanged emails with him.
translations.tran: 我与他交换了电子邮件。

translations.sentence: He exchanged his old car for a new one.
translations.tran: 他用旧车换了一辆新车。

translations.sentence: We exchanged gifts with our friends.
translations.tran: 我们和朋友们互换了礼物。

translations.sentence: The price excludes tax.
translations.tran: 价格不包括税。

translations.sentence: The price is $100, exclusive of tax.
translations.tran: 价格是100美元，不含税。

translations.sentence: This offer is exclusive of shipping costs.
translations.tran: 此优惠不计运费。

translations.sentence: This service is exclusive to members.
translations.tran: 这项服务仅供会员使用。

translations.sentence: The rights are exclusive to the publisher.
translations.tran: 这些权利由出版商独有。

translations.sentence: The team is ready to execute the plan.
translations.tran: 团队已准备好执行该计划。

translations.sentence: They need to execute the plan effectively.
translations.tran: 他们需要有效地实施该计划。

translations.sentence: The company aims to execute its purpose.
translations.tran: 公司旨在实现其目标。

translations.sentence: The mission is to execute its purpose.
translations.tran: 该任务是要达成目的。

translations.sentence: The officer is obligated to execute his duties.
translations.tran: 官员有义务履行他的职责。

translations.sentence: He executed his duties with diligence.
translations.tran: 他勤勉地执行了他的职责。

translations.sentence: The mayor executed his office with integrity.
translations.tran: 市长廉洁地履行了他的职务。

translations.sentence: The president executes his office.
translations.tran: 总统行使他的职权。

translations.sentence: This product is exempt from tax.
translations.tran: 这款产品免税。

translations.sentence: He is exempt from military service.
translations.tran: 他被豁免兵役。

translations.sentence: The teacher exerted a positive influence on her students.
translations.tran: 老师对她的学生产生了积极的影响。

translations.sentence: The company exerted an influence on the market.
translations.tran: 公司对市场产生了影响。

translations.sentence: They exerted pressure on the government.
translations.tran: 他们向政府施加了压力。

translations.sentence: She exerted her authority on the situation.
translations.tran: 她对局势施加了她的权威。

translations.sentence: He exerted himself to finish the project.
translations.tran: 他努力完成这个项目。

translations.sentence: She exerted herself to pass the exam.
translations.tran: 她竭尽全力通过了考试。

translations.sentence: She exerted herself to learn a new language.
translations.tran: 她努力学习一门新语言。

translations.sentence: He exerted himself to help his family.
translations.tran: 他尽力帮助他的家人。

translations.sentence: The athlete exerted himself to win the race.
translations.tran: 运动员努力赢得比赛。

translations.sentence: The students exerted themselves to study for the exam.
translations.tran: 学生们竭尽全力为考试而学习。

translations.sentence: The company exerted pressure on its suppliers.
translations.tran: 该公司对供应商施加了压力。

translations.sentence: He exerted his power on the situation.
translations.tran: 他把他的权力施加于局势。

translations.sentence: He exhausted all his energy in the marathon.
translations.tran: 他在马拉松比赛中耗尽了所有精力。

translations.sentence: She exhausted all her energy to save her child.
translations.tran: 她用尽全部力气去救她的孩子。

translations.sentence: The exhaust fumes from the car polluted the air.
translations.tran: 汽车的废气污染了空气。

translations.sentence: Exhaust fumes are a major source of air pollution.
translations.tran: 尾气是空气污染的主要来源。

translations.sentence: His constant complaints exhausted her patience.
translations.tran: 他没完没了的抱怨耗尽了她的耐心。

translations.sentence: The delay exhausted their patience.
translations.tran: 延误使他们失去了耐心。

translations.sentence: The illness exhausted his strength.
translations.tran: 疾病耗尽了他的体力。

translations.sentence: The long journey exhausted her strength.
translations.tran: 漫长的旅程使她精疲力尽。

translations.sentence: He decided to exile himself to a remote island.
translations.tran: 他决定自我放逐到一个偏远的岛屿。

translations.sentence: She exiled herself to the countryside to find peace.
translations.tran: 她自我流放到乡下寻找平静。

translations.sentence: The king exiled him from the kingdom.
translations.tran: 国王将他驱逐出王国。

translations.sentence: They exiled the dissidents from their country.
translations.tran: 他们将异见者流放出国。

translations.sentence: This species exists in the wild.
translations.tran: 这个物种存在于野外。

translations.sentence: These problems exist in many societies.
translations.tran: 这些问题存在于许多社会中。

translations.sentence: Many species of insects exist on a diet of leaves.
translations.tran: 许多昆虫物种以叶子为食。

translations.sentence: The company's success exists on a foundation of hard work.
translations.tran: 这家公司的成功建立在努力工作的基础之上。

translations.sentence: Traveling to different countries can really expand your mind.
translations.tran: 到不同的国家旅行确实可以开阔视野。

translations.sentence: Reading a variety of books will help expand your mind.
translations.tran: 阅读各种书籍将有助于增长见识。

translations.sentence: What do you expect of me?
translations.tran: 你对我有什么期望？

translations.sentence: We expect a lot of effort of him.
translations.tran: 我们对他寄予厚望。

translations.sentence: Don't expect too much of him; he's still learning.
translations.tran: 不要对他期望过高，他还在学习中。

translations.sentence: I think you're expecting too much of her.
translations.tran: 我认为你对她要求太高了。

translations.sentence: He was expelled from school for cheating.
translations.tran: 他因作弊被学校开除。

translations.sentence: The country expelled the diplomats from its territory.
translations.tran: 该国驱逐了外交官，令其离开本国领土。

translations.sCN: 在某人身上花费时间/金钱
translations.sentence: She expends a lot of time on her children.
translations.tran: 她在孩子身上花费很多时间。

translations.sCN: 在某人身上投入时间/金钱
translations.sentence: He expends all his money on his family.
translations.tran: 他把所有的钱都花在家人身上。

translations.sentence: The government increased its expenditure on education.
translations.tran: 政府增加了在教育上的支出。

translations.sentence: Expenditure on education is a crucial investment in the future.
translations.tran: 教育经费是对未来的关键投资。

translations.sentence: She is an expert in marketing.
translations.tran: 她是市场营销方面的专家。

translations.sentence: He is expert in computer programming.
translations.tran: 他精通计算机编程。

translations.sCN: 解释（以消除怀疑或责备）；为…辩解
translations.sentence: He tried to explain away his absence, but nobody believed him.
translations.tran: 他试图为他的缺席辩解，但没人相信他。

translations.sentence: She explained away the mistakes in her report.
translations.tran: 她设法解释了报告中的错误。

translations.sentence: Can you explain this to me?
translations.tran: 你能向我解释一下这个吗？

translations.sentence: The teacher explained the concept to the students.
translations.tran: 老师向学生解释了这个概念。

translations.sentence: He is always looking to exploit every opportunity.
translations.tran: 他总是在寻找机会。

translations.sentence: She exploited every opportunity to improve her skills.
translations.tran: 她利用一切机会来提高她的技能。

translations.sentence: He was exposed to the virus.
translations.tran: 他接触了病毒。

translations.sentence: The soldiers were exposed to danger.
translations.tran: 士兵们面临危险。

translations.sentence: They exposed the building to the sun.
translations.tran: 他们把建筑物暴露在阳光下。

translations.sentence: We exposed the children to classical music.
translations.tran: 我们让孩子们接触了古典音乐。

translations.sentence: The report exposed the company to criticism.
translations.tran: 这份报告使公司遭到批评。

translations.sentence: The museum exposes visitors to art from the Renaissance.
translations.tran: 博物馆让参观者接触到文艺复兴时期的艺术。

translations.sentence: She expressed an interest in learning French.
translations.tran: 她表示对学习法语感兴趣。

translations.sentence: The company expressed an interest in our project.
translations.tran: 该公司对我们的项目表示了兴趣。

translations.sentence: He expressed interest in joining the team.
translations.tran: 他表示有兴趣加入这个团队。

translations.sentence: I'm going to express interest in this job.
translations.tran: 我将对这份工作表示兴趣。

phrase: express one's gratitude to sb. for sth.

translations.sCN: 就某事向某人表达感谢
translations.sentence: She expressed her gratitude to the volunteers for their help.
translations.tran: 她就他们的帮助向志愿者们表达了感谢。

translations.sCN: 为某事向某人表示感谢
translations.sentence: I want to express my gratitude to you for your support.
translations.tran: 我想就您的支持向您表达感谢。

translations.sentence: The public expressed strong disapproval of the new policy.
translations.tran: 公众对新政策表示强烈反对。

translations.sentence: The committee expressed strong disapproval of the proposal.
translations.tran: 委员会对这项提议表示强烈不满。

translations.sentence: The river extends from the mountains to the sea.
translations.tran: 这条河从山里延伸到海里。

translations.sentence: The meeting will extend from 2 PM to 4 PM.
translations.tran: 会议将从下午2点持续到下午4点。

translations.sentence: The company extended a warm welcome to the new CEO.
translations.tran: 公司对新任首席执行官表示热烈欢迎。

translations.sentence: We extend a warm welcome to all our guests.
translations.tran: 我们热烈欢迎所有客人。

translations.sentence: We need to extract the relevant data from the report.
translations.tran: 我们需要从报告中提取相关数据。

translations.sentence: The dentist extracted the tooth from my mouth.
translations.tran: 牙医从我嘴里拔掉了牙齿。

translations.sentence: Her eyes were blurred with tears as she said goodbye.
translations.tran: 当她告别时，她的眼睛模糊了，泪水盈眶。

translations.sentence: We finally met face to face after months of emails.
translations.tran: 在几个月的邮件往来之后，我们终于面对面地见面了。

translations.sentence: They held a face to face meeting to resolve the issue.
translations.tran: 他们举行了一次面对面的会议来解决这个问题。

translations.sentence: You need to face up to your responsibilities.
translations.tran: 你需要正视你的责任。

translations.sentence: It's time to face up to the fact that you failed.
translations.tran: 是时候勇敢地接受你失败的事实了。

translations.sentence: The university aims to facilitate academic exchanges between students and professors.
translations.tran: 这所大学旨在促进学生和教授之间的学术交流。

translations.sentence: The sound of the music began to fade away.
translations.tran: 音乐声开始逐渐消失。

translations.sentence: Her memory began to fade away as she grew older.
translations.tran: 随着年龄的增长，她的记忆力开始衰退。

translations.sentence: He failed in his attempt to climb the mountain.
translations.tran: 他在攀登这座山的过程中失败了。

translations.sentence: The company failed to meet the deadline.
translations.tran: 公司未能按时完成。

translations.sentence: He failed to arrive on time.
translations.tran: 他未能准时到达。

translations.sentence: She failed to understand the instructions.
translations.tran: 她未能理解这些指示。

translations.sentence: The players demanded fair play from the referee.
translations.tran: 球员们要求裁判公平。

translations.sentence: We believe in fair play for everyone.
translations.tran: 我们相信要公平对待每一个人。

translations.sentence: He was caught using fake diplomas to get the job.
translations.tran: 他被发现使用伪造的文凭来获得这份工作。

translations.sentence: Their marriage began to fall apart after years of arguing.
translations.tran: 在多年的争吵之后，他们的婚姻开始瓦解。

translations.sentence: The old chair started to fall apart.
translations.tran: 那把旧椅子开始散架。

translations.sentence: I fell asleep during the movie.
translations.tran: 我在电影放映时睡着了。

translations.sentence: The leaves began to fall away from the trees.
translations.tran: 树叶开始从树上脱落。

translations.sentence: Support for the proposal has begun to fall away.
translations.tran: 对这项提议的支持已经开始减少。

translations.sentence: The soldiers were forced to fall back.
translations.tran: 士兵们被迫后退。

translations.sentence: We can fall back to the original plan if this doesn't work.
translations.tran: 如果这个方法不行，我们可以退回原来的计划。

translations.sentence: She had to fall back on her savings.
translations.tran: 她不得不依靠她的积蓄。

translations.sentence: He fell back upon his old friend for help.

translations.sentence: She fixed her eyes on him.
translations.tran: 她凝视着他。

translations.sentence: He fixed his mind on winning the race.
translations.tran: 他下定决心要赢得比赛。

translations.sentence: We need to fix up the old car.
translations.tran: 我们需要修理那辆旧车。

translations.sentence: They fixed up a meeting for tomorrow.
translations.tran: 他们安排了明天的会议。

translations.sentence: They fixed upon a date for the wedding.
translations.tran: 他们选定了婚礼的日期。

translations.sentence: The system flags up potential errors.
translations.tran: 系统标示出潜在的错误。

translations.sentence: The engine flamed out during the flight.
translations.tran: 飞行过程中引擎熄火了。

translations.sentence: The project flamed out due to lack of funding.
translations.tran: 由于缺乏资金，该项目失败了。

translations.sentence: The skirt flares out at the bottom.
translations.tran: 裙子的底部向外张开。

translations.sentence: The argument flared up again.
translations.tran: 争论再次爆发。

translations.sentence: His allergy flared up.
translations.tran: 他的过敏症发作了。

translations.sentence: He flared up at the waiter when the soup was cold.
translations.tran: 当汤是凉的时，他对服务员发火了。

translations.sentence: His allergies flared up at the sight of the flowers.
translations.tran: 看到那些花，他的过敏症突然发作了。

translations.sentence: The accident made her flash back to her childhood.
translations.tran: 那场事故让她回想起了童年。

translations.sentence: The details of the crime flashed out in his mind.
translations.tran: 犯罪的细节突然出现在他的脑海里。

translations.sentence: The scenery flashed past as the train sped along.
translations.tran: 火车飞速行驶，风景飞逝而过。

translations.sentence: He's flattering himself if he thinks she'll accept his proposal.
translations.tran: 如果他认为她会接受他的求婚，那他就是自欺欺人。

translations.sentence: He flattered her about her new dress.
translations.tran: 他奉承了她关于她新买的裙子。

translations.sentence: She flattered him on his performance.
translations.tran: 她恭维了他的表现。

translations.sentence: He needs to flesh out the details of his plan.
translations.tran: 他需要充实他的计划的细节。

translations.sentence: She flicked through the magazine to find an interesting article.
translations.tran: 她浏览了杂志，想找到一篇有趣的article。

translations.sentence: The protesters flung themselves against the barricade.
translations.tran: 抗议者猛烈冲击路障。

translations.sentence: She flung herself into her work after the breakup.
translations.tran: 分手后，她全身心地投入到工作中。

translations.sentence: The child flung himself on his mother for a hug.
translations.tran: 孩子扑向妈妈要拥抱。

translations.sentence: Aid is urgently needed in the flood-stricken area.
translations.tran: 洪涝灾区急需援助。

translations.sentence: The auctioneer set a floor price for the painting.
translations.tran: 拍卖师为这幅画设定了底价。

translations.sentence: The top of the desk is flush with the wall.
translations.tran: 桌子的顶部与墙齐平。

translations.sentence: She was flush with cash after winning the lottery.
translations.tran: 中彩票后，她变得富足。

translations.sentence: She was flushed with embarrassment.
translations.tran: 她因为尴尬而脸红。

translations.sentence: He was flushed with pride after winning the award.
translations.tran: 赢得奖项后，他洋溢着骄傲。

translations.sentence: He flew into a rage when he heard the news.
translations.tran: 听到这个消息，他勃然大怒。

translations.sentence: She flew into a temper at her brother's behavior.
translations.tran: 她对她兄弟的行为大发雷霆。

translations.sentence: We're in for a storm.
translations.tran: 我们预料将有一场暴风雨。

translations.sentence: She needs to focus on her studies.
translations.tran: 她需要专注于她的学习。

translations.sCN: 把注意力集中于；专注于
translations.sentence: She focused her attention on the speaker.
translations.tran: 她把注意力集中在了演讲者身上。

translations.sentence: The study will focus its attention on the impact of social media.
translations.tran: 这项研究将侧重于社交媒体的影响。

translations.sentence: The investigation will focus upon the cause of the accident.
translations.tran: 调查将集中于事故的原因。

translations.sentence: The training program will focus upon practical skills.
translations.tran: 培训计划将侧重于实践技能。

translations.sentence: The company focuses its resources on product development.
translations.tran: 该公司把资源集中在产品开发上。

translations.sentence: The teacher focused the students’ attention on the lesson.
translations.tran: 老师让学生们专注于课程。

translations.sentence: The police foiled the robbers in their attempt to steal the jewels.
translations.tran: 警方阻止了盗贼盗窃珠宝的企图。

translations.sentence: His injury foiled him in completing the marathon.
translations.tran: 他的伤病妨碍了他完成马拉松。

translations.sentence: She foiled her rival in the election.
translations.tran: 她在选举中阻挠了她的对手。

translations.sentence: The weather foiled us in our plans for a picnic.
translations.tran: 天气妨碍了我们野餐的计划。

translations.sentence: He folded his arms and listened to the argument.
translations.tran: 他交叉双臂，听着争论。

translations.sentence: She folded her arms, unwilling to help.
translations.tran: 她双臂交叉，不愿帮忙。

translations.sentence: Stop fooling around and get your homework done!
translations.tran: 别嬉闹了，把作业做完！

translations.sentence: They were fooling around with the equipment and broke it.
translations.tran: 他们乱搞设备，把它弄坏了。

translations.sentence: I decided to follow my doctor’s advice and rest.
translations.tran: 我决定听从医生的建议，休息一下。

translations.sentence: She followed her friend’s advice and applied for the job.
translations.tran: 她采纳了朋友的建议，申请了这份工作。

translations.sentence: The dancers followed their cue from the lead.
translations.tran: 舞者以领舞为榜样。

translations.sentence: The other actors followed their cue from the director.
translations.tran: 其他演员从导演那里得到了提示。

translations.sentence: The younger students followed her example and worked hard.
translations.tran: 年轻的学生们效仿她，努力学习。

translations.sentence: We should follow his example and be more generous.
translations.tran: 我们应该以他为榜样，更加慷慨。

translations.sCN: 跟随某人；听从某人的指挥
translations.sentence: The team followed the captain’s lead.
translations.tran: 团队听从了队长的指挥。

translations.sentence: We will follow her lead and see what happens.
translations.tran: 我们将跟随她，看看会发生什么。

translations.sentence: I decided to follow my nose and see where it led me.
translations.tran: 我决定凭直觉走，看看它会把我带到哪里。

translations.sentence: Follow your nose and you’ll find the restaurant.
translations.tran: 笔直走，你就能找到这家餐厅。

translations.sentence: We need to follow out the plan carefully.
translations.tran: 我们需要仔细彻底地执行这个计划。

translations.sentence: They were instructed to follow out all safety regulations.
translations.tran: 他们被指示遵守所有安全规章。

translations.sentence: I decided to follow my mother’s advice.
translations.tran: 我决定听从我母亲的建议。

translations.sentence: She followed her colleague's advice and changed her approach.
translations.tran: 她采纳了同事的建议，改变了她的方法。

translations.sentence: The new students followed their teacher's example.
translations.tran: 新来的学生效仿了他们的老师。

translations.sentence: You should follow his example and be more disciplined.
translations.tran: 你应该以他为榜样，更加自律。

translations.sCN: 跟随某人；听从某人的指挥
translations.sentence: The team followed the coach’s lead.
translations.tran: 球队听从了教练的指挥。

translations.sentence: We will follow his lead and see what happens.
translations.tran: 我们将跟随他，看看会发生什么。

translations.sentence: The company followed the example of its competitors.
translations.tran: 该公司效仿了其竞争对手。

translations.sentence: They followed the example of successful entrepreneurs.
translations.tran: 他们学习了成功企业家的经验。

translations.sentence: She always follows the fashion.
translations.tran: 她总是赶时髦。

translations.sentence: He doesn’t follow the fashion, preferring classic styles.
translations.tran: 他不追逐时尚，更喜欢经典风格。

translations.sentence: You need to follow through on your promises.
translations.tran: 你需要信守承诺。

translations.sentence: The company needs to follow through with its plan.
translations.tran: 公司需要彻底完成它的计划。

translations.sentence: I will follow up on this with a phone call.
translations.tran: 我将通过电话跟进此事。

translations.sentence: The doctors will follow up with more tests.
translations.tran: 医生们将进行后续检查。

translations.sCN: 接着; 随后; 之后
translations.sentence: The appetizer was followed by the main course.
translations.tran: 开胃菜之后是主菜。

translations.sentence: He coughed, followed by a sneeze.
translations.tran: 他咳嗽了一声，紧接着打了个喷嚏。

translations.sentence: She is very fond of chocolate.
translations.tran: 她非常喜欢巧克力。

translations.sentence: He is fond of her.
translations.tran: 他喜欢她。

translations.sCN: 食物残渣; 食物废料
translations.sentence: The food scraps were composted.
translations.tran: 食物残渣被堆肥了。

translations.sentence: Don't throw food scraps in the regular trash.
translations.tran: 不要把剩菜扔进普通垃圾桶。

translations.sentence: Stop fooling about and get to work!
translations.tran: 别胡闹了，开始工作吧！

translations.sentence: The children were fooling about in the park.
translations.tran: 孩子们在公园里玩耍嬉戏。

translations.sentence: He's just fooling around; he never gets anything done.
translations.tran: 他只是游手好闲，什么也没做。

translations.sentence: He was fooling around with her.
translations.tran: 他正在和她调情。

translations.sentence: The kids were fooling round in the playground.
translations.tran: 孩子们在游乐场里胡闹。

translations.sCN: 换换口味; 改变一下
translations.sentence: Let's go to the cinema for a change.
translations.tran: 我们换换口味去看电影吧。

translations.sentence: He decided to try something different for a change.
translations.tran: 他决定为了改变而尝试一些不同的东西。

translations.sentence: I haven't seen him for a long time.
translations.tran: 我很久没见到他了。

translations.sentence: Could you wait for a moment, please?
translations.tran: 请您稍等一会儿好吗？

translations.sentence: For a start, we need to gather all the information.
translations.tran: 首先，我们需要收集所有信息。

translations.sentence: I'll be away for a while.
translations.tran: 我将离开一会儿。

translations.sentence: I haven't seen her for ages.
translations.tran: 我很久没见到她了。

translations.sentence: For all his wealth, he is not happy.
translations.tran: 尽管他很富有，但他并不快乐。

translations.sentence: For all the effort, the results were disappointing.
translations.tran: 总共的努力都令人失望。

translations.sCN: 尽管如此; 即使如此
translations.sentence: For all that, I still love her.
translations.tran: 即使如此，我仍然爱她。

translations.sentence: For an instant, I thought I saw a ghost.
translations.tran: 一瞬间，我以为我看到了鬼。

translations.sCN: 为了任何事; 不管为了什么
translations.sentence: Don't do it for any sake.
translations.tran: 不要为了任何事情而做。

translations.sentence: I wouldn't do it for anything.
translations.tran: 为了任何事我不会做。

translations.sentence: I don't know for certain.
translations.tran: 我不能肯定。

translations.sentence: I can't be for certain of that.
translations.tran: 我不能确定。

translations.sentence: I kept the dog for company.
translations.tran: 我养了这只狗作伴。

translations.sentence: I will love you for ever.
translations.tran: 我会永远爱你。

translations.sentence: They believe in peace for ever.
translations.tran: 他们相信和平是永恒的。

translations.sentence: I like many sports, for example, tennis and basketball.
translations.tran: 我喜欢很多运动，例如，网球和篮球。

translations.sentence: He ran away for fear.
translations.tran: 他因为害怕而逃跑。

translations.sentence: She didn't say anything for fear of offending him.
translations.tran: 她什么也没说，生怕冒犯了他。

translations.sentence: He stayed silent for fear that he would be punished.
translations.tran: 他保持沉默，害怕受到惩罚。

translations.sentence: The concert was for free.
translations.tran: 音乐会是免费的。

translations.sentence: They went swimming for fun.
translations.tran: 他们为了好玩去游泳。

translations.sentence: She left him for good.
translations.tran: 她永远地离开了他。

translations.sentence: They left the city for good and all.
translations.tran: 他们永远地离开了这座城市。

translations.sentence: He added a little extra salt for good measure.
translations.tran: 为了以防万一，他多加了一点盐。

translations.sentence: We should not take our health for granted.
translations.tran: 我们不应该认为我们的健康是理所当然的。

translations.sentence: Many people like to travel, for instance, to Europe.
translations.tran: 许多人喜欢旅行，例如，去欧洲。

translations.sentence: He failed for lack of effort.
translations.tran: 他因为缺乏努力而失败。

translations.sentence: He was sentenced to prison for life.
translations.tran: 他被判处终身监禁。

translations.sentence: They haven't known each other for long.
translations.tran: 他们认识的时间不长。

translations.sentence: He got angry for no reason.
translations.tran: 他无缘无故地生气了。

translations.sentence: He got the tickets for nothing.
translations.tran: 他免费得到了门票。

translations.sentence: All our efforts were for nothing.
translations.tran: 我们所有的努力都白费了。

translations.sentence: I'll stay here for now.
translations.tran: 我暂时会待在这里。

translations.sentence: For once, he was on time.
translations.tran: 这一次，他准时到了。

translations.sentence: For one thing, it's too expensive.
translations.tran: 首先，它太贵了。

translations.sCN: 就某人而言；就某人来说
translations.sentence: For my part, I think it's a great idea.
translations.tran: 就我而言，我认为这是一个好主意。

translations.sentence: For his part, he remained silent.
translations.tran: 就他个人来说，他保持沉默。

translations.sentence: He reads for pleasure.
translations.tran: 他为了高兴而阅读。

translations.sentence: They go hiking for pleasure.
translations.tran: 他们为了兴趣去徒步旅行。

translations.sentence: This meeting is for purpose of discussion.
translations.tran: 这次会议的目的是为了讨论。

translations.sentence: I'm here for purpose of assisting you.
translations.tran: 我在这里是为了协助你。

translations.sentence: Are you for real?
translations.tran: 你是认真的吗？

translations.sentence: I thought he was joking, but he was for real.
translations.tran: 我以为他是在开玩笑，但他是认真的。

translations.sentence: This house is for sale.
translations.tran: 这栋房子待售。

translations.sentence: The car is for sale at a reasonable price.
translations.tran: 这辆车以合理的价格出售。

translations.sCN: 为了某人；看在某人的份上
translations.sentence: Please, for my sake, stop arguing.
translations.tran: 拜托，看在我的份上，别再争论了。

translations.sentence: He did it for her sake.
translations.tran: 他为了她的利益而这样做。

translations.sentence: We call him John for short.
translations.tran: 我们简称他约翰。

translations.sentence: He's called Tom for short.
translations.tran: 他简称汤姆。

translations.sentence: For the sake of argument, let's assume he is right.
translations.tran: 为了便于讨论，我们假设他是对的。

translations.sentence: He did it for the sake of his career.
translations.tran: 他为了他的事业而这样做。

translations.sentence: I don't know for sure.
translations.tran: 我不能确定。

translations.sentence: He'll be there for sure.
translations.tran: 他肯定会去。

translations.sentence: For that matter, I don't like it either.
translations.tran: 就此而言，我也不喜欢它。

translations.sentence: For that matter, he's never been very reliable.
translations.tran: 而且，他从来都不是非常可靠。

translations.sentence: This is for the advantage of the company.
translations.tran: 这是为了公司的利益。

translations.sentence: We designed it for the advantage of the users.
translations.tran: 我们设计它为了用户的优势。

translations.sentence: This is for the benefit of all.
translations.tran: 这是为了大家的利益。

translations.sentence: Exercise is for the benefit of your health.
translations.tran: 锻炼对你的健康有益。

translations.sCN: 为了最好（结果）；最好的是
translations.sentence: It's probably for the best.
translations.tran: 这很可能对我们来说是最好的。

translations.sentence: I think it's for the best if you leave.
translations.tran: 我认为你离开是最好的。

translations.sentence: Things are changing for the better.
translations.tran: 情况正在好转。

translations.sentence: I hope things will get for the better soon.
translations.tran: 我希望情况很快会好转。

translations.sentence: I'm going to Paris for the first time.
translations.tran: 我将第一次去巴黎。

translations.sentence: He met her for the first time last week.
translations.tran: 他上周首次见到她。

translations.sentence: We must plan for the future.
translations.tran: 我们必须为未来做计划。

translations.sentence: This decision is made for the future.
translations.tran: 这个决定是为未来作出的。

translations.sentence: We must act for the good of all.
translations.tran: 我们必须为了所有人的利益而行动。

translations.sentence: They did it for the good of the community.
translations.tran: 他们为了社区的福祉而这样做。

translations.sentence: We'll stay here for the meantime.
translations.tran: 我们暂时会留在这里。

translations.sentence: We will continue our work for the meantime.
translations.tran: 我们将在目前这段时间继续我们的工作。

translations.sentence: I'm busy for the moment.
translations.tran: 我目前很忙。

translations.sentence: Let's forget about it for the moment.
translations.tran: 让我们暂时忘记这件事。

translations.sentence: For the most part, people are friendly.
translations.tran: 在大多数情况下，人们都很友善。

translations.sentence: The weather was fine for the most part.
translations.tran: 天气在大部分时间里都很好。

translations.sentence: I will stay here for the present.
translations.tran: 目前我将待在这里。

translations.sentence: For the present, we will focus on this issue.
translations.tran: 现在，我们将专注于这个问题。

translations.sentence: He studied hard for the purpose of passing the exam.
translations.tran: 他努力学习是为了通过考试。

translations.sentence: This meeting is held for the purpose of discussing the budget.
translations.tran: 这次会议的目的是讨论预算。

translations.sentence: For the record, I disagree with this decision.
translations.tran: 为了记录在案，我不同意这个决定。

translations.sentence: And for the record, I was never involved in the scandal.
translations.tran: 正式声明，我从未参与过丑闻。

translations.sentence: For the rest, we can discuss it later.
translations.tran: 其余的，我们可以稍后讨论。

translations.sentence: For the rest, it's up to you.
translations.tran: 至于其余的，由你决定。

translations.sentence: She gave up her job for the sake of her family.
translations.tran: 为了家人，她放弃了工作。

translations.sentence: For the sake of argument, let's assume he's right.
translations.tran: 看在讨论的份上，让我们假设他是对的。

translations.sentence: We'll leave the matter for the time being.
translations.tran: 我们暂时把这件事搁置一旁。

translations.sentence: For the time being, this is the best solution.
translations.tran: 目前来说，这是最好的解决方案。

translations.sentence: These tools are for use in emergencies.
translations.tran: 这些工具供紧急情况下使用。

translations.sentence: This manual is for use with the new software.
translations.tran: 这份手册用于新的软件。

translations.sentence: They tried to force their opinion on the group.
translations.tran: 他们试图将他们的观点强加于小组。

translations.sentence: The government is trying to force these laws on the people.
translations.tran: 政府试图将这些法律强加于人民。

translations.sentence: The situation forced him to resign.
translations.tran: 情况迫使他辞职。

translations.sentence: They forced him to sign the document.
translations.tran: 他们迫使他签署了文件。

translations.sentence: They tried to force their beliefs on others.
translations.tran: 他们试图把他们的信仰强加于他人。

translations.sentence: The company imports foreign-made products.
translations.tran: 该公司进口外国制造的产品。

translations.sentence: Many shops sell foreign-made products.
translations.tran: 许多商店销售进口产品。

translations.sentence: He was accused of using a forged document.
translations.tran: 他被指控使用伪造文件。

translations.sentence: The police discovered a forged document.
translations.tran: 警方发现了一份伪造的文档。

translations.sentence: Let's forget about it.
translations.tran: 让我们忘记这件事吧。

translations.sentence: I'd rather forget about the whole thing.
translations.tran: 我宁愿忘记整件事。

translations.sentence: I forget doing that.
translations.tran: 我忘记我做过这件事。

translations.sentence: I can’t forget swimming.
translations.tran: 我无法忘记游泳。

translations.sentence: I forget doing that.

translations.sCN: 取得成功；出人头地；领先
translations.sentence: You have to work hard if you want to get ahead.
translations.tran: 如果你想出人头地，你必须努力工作。

translations.sentence: How do you get along with your neighbors?

translations.sentence: How are you getting along?

translations.sentence: I get along with my colleagues very well.

translations.sentence: How does he get by on such a low salary?

translations.sCN: 因…受到赞扬，因…获得荣誉
translations.sentence: She got credit for solving the problem.

translations.tran: 团队因他们的辛勤工作而得到认可。

translations.sCN: 下来；离开（公共交通工具）；使…沮丧；感到沮丧

translations.sentence: It's time to get down to work.

translations.sentence: It's time to get down to work.

translations.tran: 会议后，我们开始工作。

translations.sentence: She got dressed quickly.

translations.sentence: He wanted to get even with his rival.

translations.sentence: Where can I get hold of this book?

translations.sCN: 进入；登上（车、飞机等）；当选
translations.sentence: Get in the car!
translations.tran: 上车！

translations.sentence: The train gets in at 6 pm.
translations.tran: 火车在下午6点到达。

translations.sentence: Stop getting in my hair!

translations.tran: 他总是用他的问题来烦我。

translations.sentence: Get in the habit of reading every day.
translations.tran: 养成每天阅读的习惯。

translations.sentence: She got in the habit of waking up early.
translations.tran: 她开始习惯早起。

translations.sentence: Let's get the work done before we go home.

translations.sentence: The car got stuck in the mud.
translations.tran: 汽车陷进泥里了。

translations.tran: 他拿起电话拨了号码。

translations.tran: 他因为屡次迟到而被解雇。

translations.tran: 她因为违反公司政策而被开除。

translations.tran: 我终于通过了考试。

translations.tran: 她对他的抱怨感到厌倦。

translations.tran: 他正在掌握新的软件。

translations.tran: 我必须记住这首诗。

translations.tran: 她背诵了这些台词。

translations.sentence: I will give you a call later.

translations.sentence: The project is government-funded and free for all participants.
translations.tran: 该项目由政府资助，对所有参与者免费。

translations.sentence: The research was government-funded, so the results are available to the public.
translations.tran: 这项研究由政府出资，因此结果对公众开放。

translations.tran: 她毕业于哈佛大学。

translations.sentence: To succeed, you must grasp the essentials of the subject.
translations.tran: 为了成功，你必须掌握该学科的要点。

translations.tran: 老师帮助学生掌握了课程的关键。

translations.tran: 她因为他的帮助而感谢他。

translations.tran: 阅读满足了她对知识的渴望。

translations.tran: 他希望通过环游世界来满足他对冒险的渴求。

translations.tran: 他贿赂了海关官员以逃避关税。

translations.sentence: He groped for the right words to say.
translations.tran: 他试图找到合适的词语来表达。

translations.sentence: He groped his way through the dark forest.
translations.tran: 他在黑暗的森林里摸索前进。

translations.sentence: The child will grow into a fine young man.

translations.sentence: The business hopes to grow into a major player in the industry.

translations.sentence: She's grown out of playing with dolls.

translations.sCN: 因长大而不再做某事，摆脱
translations.sentence: He will grow out of his childish behavior.

translations.sentence: The problem grew out of a misunderstanding.

translations.sentence: Children grow up quickly.

translations.sentence: He needs to grow up and take responsibility.

translations.sentence: This policy guarantees against loss.

translations.sentence: We must guard against making the same mistake again.

translations.sentence: He was guessing at the solution to the problem.

translations.sentence: He was found guilty of murder.

translations.sentence: She felt guilty of neglecting her family.
translations.tran: 她对忽视她的家人感到内疚。

translations.sentence: He gulped down his breakfast and rushed to work.

translations.sentence: They had to hack through the dense undergrowth to get to the river.

translations.sentence: You had best not be late.

translations.sentence: You had better leave now.

translations.sCN: 最好做某事（用于建议或警告）

translations.sentence: I had rather stay at home tonight.

translations.sentence: I had rather read a book than watch TV.

translations.tran: 委员会正试图制定一项新政策。

translations.tran: 雨阻碍了我们完成工作。

translations.sentence: Lack of funding hampered the project from success.
translations.tran: 缺乏资金阻碍了该项目的成功。

translations.sentence: Please hand back your completed exam papers.

translations.sentence: The judge handed down a life sentence.

translations.sentence: These skills have been handed down through generations.

translations.sentence: You must hand in your assignments by Friday.

translations.tran: 他们手牵手沿着海滩散步。

translations.sentence: Poverty and crime often go hand in hand.

translations.tran: 他决定递交辞呈。

translations.sentence: The teenagers were hanging about the shopping center.

translations.tran: 她问心无愧，因为她知道自己做了正确的事情。

translations.sentence: She has a fancy for vintage cars.

translations.tran: 他对写诗有兴趣。

phrase: have a feverish desire to do sth.

translations.sCN: 渴望做某事，非常想做某事

translations.tran: 她非常渴望周游世界。

translations.tran: 他很有幽默感。

translations.sentence: We had a good time at the party.
translations.tran: 我们在派对上玩得很开心。

translations.tran: 她对历史有浓厚的兴趣。

translations.tran: 我们在度假期间度过了一段美好的时光。

translations.tran: 他尽力说服她来。

translations.tran: 她参与组织了这次活动。

translations.tran: 他发高烧，需要去看医生。

translations.tran: 他了解几种语言。

translations.tran: 我们明天安排了一个会议。

translations.tran: 我觉得他在撒谎。

translations.tran: 这座城市的人口超过1000万。

translations.tran: 她特别喜欢准时。

translations.tran: 让我们试一试，看看是否有效。

translations.tran: 我打算去公园散步。

translations.tran: 我想和经理谈谈关于投诉的事。

translations.tran: 学生可以使用图书馆资源。

translations.tran: 医院严重缺乏血液。

translations.tran: 这个国家严重缺乏技术工人。

translations.tran: 我们的团队在经验方面有优势。

translations.sentence: The new technology gives us an advantage.

translations.sentence: We have an advantage over the competition.
translations.tran: 我们比竞争对手更有优势。

translations.sentence: He has an advantage over other candidates.
translations.tran: 他胜过其他候选人。

translations.sentence: I have an appetite for adventure.
translations.tran: 我喜欢冒险。

translations.sentence: She has an appetite for knowledge.
translations.tran: 她渴望知识。

translations.tran: 沿着这条路，零星地分布着一些商店。

translations.sentence: Here you are, your coffee.
translations.tran: 给你，你的咖啡。

translations.sentence: Here you are, I hope it's useful.
translations.tran: 不客气，希望它有用。

translations.sentence: Heuristic education focuses on problem-solving.
translations.tran: 启发式教育侧重于解决问题。

translations.sentence: She hid the truth from her parents.
translations.tran: 她对父母隐瞒了真相。

translations.sCN: 在社会等级中处于高位
translations.sentence: The family was high on the social scale.
translations.tran: 这个家庭在社会等级中处于高位。

translations.sentence: The children were high-spirited after the party.
translations.tran: 孩子们在派对后兴高采烈。

translations.sentence: Bad weather hindered us from traveling.
translations.tran: 恶劣天气阻止了我们旅行。

translations.sentence: The rain hindered them from playing outside.
translations.tran: 雨阻止了他们在外面玩耍。

translations.sentence: Lack of money hindered the project from succeeding.
translations.tran: 缺乏资金阻碍了项目的成功。

translations.sentence: The success of the project hinges on your cooperation.
translations.tran: 项目的成功取决于你的合作。

translations.sentence: The investigation's outcome hinges upon the evidence.
translations.tran: 调查的结果取决于证据。

translations.sentence: He decided to hit back at his critics.
translations.tran: 他决定反击批评他的人。

translations.sentence: I suddenly hit on the solution to the problem.
translations.tran: 我突然想到了解决问题的办法。

translations.sentence: He tried to hit on her at the party.
translations.tran: 他在派对上试图搭讪她。

translations.sentence: I hit upon the idea of going to the beach.
translations.tran: 我突然想到去海滩的主意。

translations.sentence: They hit upon a solution to the problem.
translations.tran: 他们碰巧找到了解决问题的办法。

translations.sentence: The company held a farewell entertainment for the retiring CEO.
translations.tran: 公司为即将退休的首席执行官举办了告别娱乐活动。

translations.sentence: We need to hold a meeting to discuss the new project.
translations.tran: 我们需要召开一次会议来讨论新项目。

translations.sentence: The company holds a patent on this new technology.
translations.tran: 该公司拥有这项新技术的专利。

translations.sentence: The school will hold a sports meeting next week.
translations.tran: 学校下周将举行运动会。

translations.sentence: I don't hold it against you.
translations.tran: 我不怪你。

translations.sentence: Don't hold his past mistakes against him.
translations.tran: 不要拿他过去的错误来评判他。

translations.sentence: She held back her tears.
translations.tran: 她忍住了眼泪。

translations.sentence: The rain held back our progress.
translations.tran: 雨阻碍了我们的进度。

translations.sentence: She held back from speaking.
translations.tran: 她忍住没说话。

translations.sentence: He held his breath and waited.
translations.tran: 他屏住呼吸等待着。

translations.sentence: They are trying to hold down prices.
translations.tran: 他们正试图控制价格。

translations.sentence: It's hard to hold down a job with so many responsibilities.
translations.tran: 有这么多责任，很难保住一份工作。

translations.sentence: We must hold fast to our principles.
translations.tran: 我们必须坚持我们的原则。

translations.sentence: He held forth on his political views.
translations.tran: 他滔滔不绝地讲论他的政治观点。

translations.sentence: Hold in your laughter.
translations.tran: 忍住你的笑。

translations.sentence: The mother held the baby in her arms.
translations.tran: 母亲怀抱着婴儿。

translations.sentence: The government is trying to hold inflation in check.
translations.tran: 政府正试图控制通货膨胀。

translations.sentence: They hold the corrupt officials in contempt.
translations.tran: 他们蔑视腐败官员。

translations.sentence: Let's hold off making a decision until tomorrow.
translations.tran: 让我们等到明天再做决定。

translations.sentence: The army held off the enemy attack.
translations.tran: 军队击退了敌人的进攻。

translations.sentence: He held office for ten years.
translations.tran: 他任职十年。

translations.sentence: Hold on, we're almost there.
translations.tran: 坚持住，我们快到了。

translations.sentence: Hold on a moment, please.
translations.tran: 请稍等。

translations.sentence: Hold on to the rope.
translations.tran: 抓住绳子。

translations.sentence: Hold on to this information.
translations.tran: 保留这条信息。

translations.sCN: 紧紧抓住某物；保留某物
translations.sentence: Hold on to your hat, the wind is picking up.
translations.tran: 抓紧你的帽子，风越来越大了。

translations.sentence: I'm going to hold on to this old car for a while longer.
translations.tran: 我打算再保留这辆旧车一段时间。

translations.sentence: We held our breath as we waited for the exam results.
translations.tran: 我们屏住呼吸，等待考试结果。

translations.sentence: Divers can hold their breath for several minutes.
translations.tran: 潜水员可以屏住呼吸几分钟。

translations.sentence: She can hold her own in a debate.
translations.tran: 她在辩论中能保持优势。

translations.sentence: He held his own against the experienced players.
translations.tran: 他在经验丰富的球员面前应付自如。

translations.sentence: It's important to hold your temper when you're angry.
translations.tran: 生气时控制住你的脾气很重要。

translations.sentence: She had to hold herself in during the difficult conversation.
translations.tran: 在艰难的对话中，她不得不克制自己。

translations.sentence: They held out for a better deal.
translations.tran: 他们坚持要求更好的交易。

translations.sentence: The food supplies will only hold out for a few more days.
translations.tran: 食物供应只能维持几天了。

translations.sentence: He held out his hand to shake mine.
translations.tran: 他伸出手来和我握手。

translations.sentence: The meeting was held over until next week.
translations.tran: 会议被推迟到下周。

translations.sentence: The film was held over for another week due to its popularity.
translations.tran: 由于这部电影很受欢迎，又上映了一周。

translations.sCN: 与…保持同步；跟上…的步伐
translations.sentence: The company struggled to hold pace with the changing market.
translations.tran: 公司努力跟上不断变化的市场。

translations.sentence: He held his child in his arms and sang a lullaby.
translations.tran: 他抱着他的孩子唱着摇篮曲。

translations.sentence: The terrorists held the hostages to ransom.
translations.tran: 恐怖分子绑架了人质并索要赎金。

translations.sentence: The government is trying to hold inflation in check.
translations.tran: 政府正试图控制通货膨胀。

translations.sentence: You should hold to your promise.
translations.tran: 你应该遵守你的承诺。

translations.sentence: The team needs to hold together to win the game.
translations.tran: 为了赢得比赛，球队需要保持团结。

translations.sentence: The glue wasn't strong enough to hold the pieces together.
translations.tran: 胶水不够坚固，无法将这些碎片粘在一起。

translations.sentence: This principle holds true in many situations.
translations.tran: 这个原则在许多情况下都适用。

translations.sentence: The building is holding up well.
translations.tran: 这座建筑物状况良好。

translations.sentence: Traffic was held up by an accident.
translations.tran: 交通因事故而延误。

translations.sentence: The bank was held up by two men.
translations.tran: 银行被两名男子抢劫了。

translations.sentence: His argument doesn't hold water.
translations.tran: 他的论点站不住脚。

translations.sentence: I don't hold with the idea of spending so much money on this.
translations.tran: 我不同意在这个上面花这么多钱。

translations.sentence: Don't hold it against me; I didn't mean to hurt you.
translations.tran: 别记恨我，我不是故意要伤害你的。

translations.sentence: The company has offices both home and abroad.
translations.tran: 该公司在国内和国外都有办事处。

translations.sentence: The home question of the debate was whether to increase taxes.
translations.tran: 辩论的核心问题是是否增税。

translations.sentence: Honestly speaking, I didn't like the movie.
translations.tran: 老实说，我不喜欢这部电影。

translations.sentence: Honestly speaking, it was a difficult decision.
translations.tran: 坦白说，这是一个艰难的决定。

translations.sentence: They hooked up at the party.
translations.tran: 他们在派对上勾搭上了。

translations.sentence: Can you help me hook up the computer?
translations.tran: 你能帮我连接电脑吗？

translations.sentence: We can hook up a projector for the presentation.
translations.tran: 我们可以临时凑合一个投影仪用于演示。

translations.sentence: They were hoping against hope that their son was still alive.
translations.tran: 他们抱一线希望，他们的儿子还活着。

translations.sentence: He hoped against hope that he would win the lottery.
translations.tran: 他心存侥幸，希望自己能中彩票。

translations.sentence: I hope to see you soon.
translations.tran: 我希望很快见到你。

translations.sentence: We hope to reach an agreement.
translations.tran: 我们期望达成协议。

translations.sentence: I hope to visit Paris someday.
translations.tran: 我希望有一天能去巴黎。

translations.sentence: She hopes to get a promotion.
translations.tran: 她期望获得晋升。

translations.sentence: I hope to finish the project by Friday.
translations.tran: 我希望在周五前完成这个项目。

translations.sentence: They hope to travel to Japan next year.
translations.tran: 他们期望明年去日本旅行。

translations.sentence: The government provides housing subsidies to low-income families.
translations.tran: 政府向低收入家庭提供住房补贴。

translations.sentence: Many countries offer housing subsidies to help people afford homes.
translations.tran: 许多国家提供房屋补贴，以帮助人们负担房屋。

translations.sentence: The waiter hovered round the table, waiting to take our order.
translations.tran: 服务员在桌子周围徘徊，等着点菜。

translations.sentence: The paparazzi hovered round the celebrity.
translations.tran: 狗仔队围绕着这位名人。

translations.sentence: How about going to the movies tonight?
translations.tran: 今晚去看电影怎么样？

translations.sentence: How about your family?
translations.tran: 你的家人怎么样？

translations.sentence: How come you're late?
translations.tran: 你为什么迟到了？

translations.sentence: How come he didn't tell me?
translations.tran: 他为什么没告诉我？

translations.sentence: How far is the school from your house?
translations.tran: 学校离你家有多远？

translations.sentence: How far do you agree with him?
translations.tran: 你同意他到什么程度？

translations.sentence: How long have you lived here?
translations.tran: 你在这里住了多久了？

translations.sentence: How long will it take?
translations.tran: 这需要多长时间？

translations.sentence: How many people are coming?
translations.tran: 有多少人来？

translations.sentence: How many books do you have?
translations.tran: 你拥有多少本书？

translations.sentence: How often do you go to the gym?
translations.tran: 你多久去一次健身房？

translations.sentence: How often do you visit your parents?
translations.tran: 你多常去看望你的父母？

translations.sentence: How old are you?
translations.tran: 你多大了？

translations.sentence: How old is your car?
translations.tran: 你的车几岁了？

translations.sentence: How soon can you finish the work?
translations.tran: 你多久之后能完成这项工作？

translations.sentence: How soon will the meeting start?
translations.tran: 会议多久之后开始？

translations.sentence: The children huddled up against their mother for warmth.
translations.tran: 孩子们挤在一起靠着他们的母亲取暖。

translations.sentence: We huddled up against the fire to keep warm.
translations.tran: 我们聚在一起挤着取暖。

translations.sentence: The children huddled up to their parents.
translations.tran: 孩子们挤到父母身边。

translations.sentence: The players huddled up to their coach for instructions.
translations.tran: 球员们聚集到教练身边听取指示。

translations.sentence: There was a great hue and cry over the new tax law.
translations.tran: 对新的税法有很多喧闹。

translations.sentence: The media made a great hue and cry about the scandal.
translations.tran: 媒体对这场丑闻大肆叫嚣。

translations.sentence: The room hummed with excitement.
translations.tran: 房间里充满了兴奋。

translations.sentence: The factory hummed with activity.
translations.tran: 工厂里嗡嗡作响，一片繁忙景象。

translations.sentence: Hundreds of people attended the concert.
translations.tran: 数百人参加了音乐会。

translations.sentence: There are hundreds of reasons to be optimistic.
translations.tran: 有数百个理由可以保持乐观。

translations.sentence: He hung up on me before I could finish my sentence.
translations.tran: 我还没说完，他就挂断了我的电话。

translations.sCN: 卡住; 陷入困境; 停滞不前
translations.sentence: I'm still hung up on that mistake I made.
translations.tran: 我仍然对犯下的那个错误耿耿于怀。

translations.sentence: She's hung up on her ex-boyfriend.
translations.tran: 她还迷恋着她的前男友。

translations.sentence: He hungers after fame and fortune.
translations.tran: 他渴望名利。

translations.sentence: She hungers for knowledge.
translations.tran: 她渴求知识。

translations.sentence: They hunger for power.
translations.tran: 他们渴望权力。

translations.sentence: The police are trying to hunt down the criminals.
translations.tran: 警方正在试图追捕罪犯。

translations.sentence: I had to hunt down the missing document.
translations.tran: 我必须找到丢失的文件。

translations.sentence: They are hunting for a new apartment.
translations.tran: 他们正在寻找一套新公寓。

translations.sentence: I'm hunting for my keys.
translations.tran: 我正在找我的钥匙。

translations.sCN: 匆忙进入; 仓促从事
translations.sentence: Don't hurry into making a decision.
translations.tran: 不要仓促做出决定。

translations.sentence: She hurried into the meeting.
translations.tran: 她匆匆忙忙地进入了会议室。

translations.sentence: Hurry up, or we'll be late!
translations.tran: 快点，否则我们就要迟到了！

translations.sentence: They tried to hush up the scandal.
translations.tran: 他们试图掩盖丑闻。

translations.sentence: Let's hush this up, there's nothing we can do now.
translations.tran: 让我们息事宁人吧，现在我们什么也做不了了。

translations.sentence: I love the hustle and bustle of the city.
translations.tran: 我喜欢城市的熙熙攘攘。

translations.sentence: He gave me an icy stare.
translations.tran: 他冷冷地看了我一眼。

translations.sentence: This book is ideal for beginners.
translations.tran: 这本书非常适合初学者。

translations.sentence: This is identical with the one I lost.
translations.tran: 这与我丢失的那个一样。

translations.sentence: I identified with the main character in the book.
translations.tran: 我认同书中主要人物。

translations.sentence: He identified with the goals of the organization.
translations.tran: 他认同该组织的目标。

translations.sentence: She identifies herself with the environmental movement.
translations.tran: 她认同环保运动。

translations.sentence: Many people identify with the struggles of the protagonist.
translations.tran: 许多人对主角的挣扎感同身受。

translations.sentence: They were idling about the park all afternoon.
translations.tran: 他们整个下午都在公园里闲逛。

translations.sentence: We idled around the town square.
translations.tran: 我们在城镇广场闲逛。

translations.sentence: He idled away his time watching TV.
translations.tran: 他看电视虚度光阴。

translations.sCN: 消磨时间; 虚度时光
translations.sentence: They idled away time at the beach.
translations.tran: 他们在海滩上消磨时间。

translations.sentence: Please let me know if any problems arise.
translations.tran: 如果出现任何问题，请告诉我。

translations.sentence: I don't have any questions, if any.
translations.tran: 我没有问题，如果有的话。

translations.sentence: We will call you if necessary.
translations.tran: 如果需要的话，我们会给你打电话。

translations.sentence: Apply again if necessary.
translations.tran: 必要时再次申请。

translations.sentence: Call me if you're coming, if not, I'll assume you're not.
translations.tran: 如果你要来就给我打电话，如果不是，我就认为你不会来。

translations.sentence: You should leave now, if not, you will be late.
translations.tran: 你现在应该离开，否则你就要迟到了。

translations.sentence: If only I had known!
translations.tran: 但愿我早知道就好了！

translations.sentence: If only we can find a solution.
translations.tran: 只要我们能找到一个解决方案。

translations.sentence: Please contact me if possible.
translations.tran: 如果可能的话，请联系我。

translations.sentence: Please come as early as possible, if possible.
translations.tran: 请尽可能早点来，如果可能的话。

translations.sentence: His ignorance of the law led him into trouble.
translations.tran: 他对法律的无知使他陷入麻烦。

translations.sentence: His ignorance of her feelings hurt her.
translations.tran: 他对她感受的忽视伤害了她。

translations.sentence: She was ignorant of the danger.
translations.tran: 她对危险一无所知。

translations.sentence: Most of the public are ignorant of the facts.
translations.tran: 大多数公众不了解事实。

translations.sentence: He immersed himself in his work.
translations.tran: 他沉浸于工作中。

translations.sentence: Immerse the fabric in cold water.
translations.tran: 将织物浸泡在冷水中。

translations.sentence: She immersed herself in her studies.
translations.tran: 她沉浸于学习中。

translations.sentence: He immersed himself in the novel.
translations.tran: 他专心于这部小说。

translations.sentence: Immerse the potatoes in boiling water.
translations.tran: 将土豆浸入沸水中。

translations.sentence: The author immersed the reader in a world of fantasy.
translations.tran: 作者使读者沉浸在一个幻想世界中。

translations.sentence: No one is immune from criticism.
translations.tran: 没有人可以免于批评。

translations.sentence: The economy is not immune from global downturns.
translations.tran: 经济无法不受全球衰退的影响。

translations.sentence: He is immune to measles.
translations.tran: 他对麻疹有免疫力。

translations.sentence: She is immune to his charms.
translations.tran: 她不受他的魅力影响。

translations.sentence: The economic crisis had a major impact on the stock market.
translations.tran: 经济危机对股市产生了重大影响。

translations.sentence: The decision had a negative impact on the company.
translations.tran: 这项决定对公司产生了负面影响。

translations.sentence: The new law will impinge on individual liberties.
translations.tran: 新法律将影响个人自由。

translations.sentence: His actions impinge on the company's reputation.
translations.tran: 他的行为侵犯了公司的声誉。

translations.sentence: The noise impinged on his concentration.
translations.tran: 噪音影响了他的注意力。

translations.sentence: These policies impinge on human rights.
translations.tran: 这些政策侵犯了人权。

translations.sentence: The government is working to implement the new legislation.
translations.tran: 政府正在努力实施新的立法。

translations.sentence: They are responsible for implementing the legislation.
translations.tran: 他们负责执行法律。

translations.sentence: The court imposed a fine on him for speeding.
translations.tran: 法院因他超速对他处以罚款。

translations.sentence: The judge imposed a fine on the defendant.
translations.tran: 法官对被告处以罚款。

translations.sentence: The authorities imposed a fine upon the company for pollution.
translations.tran: 当局对该公司处以污染罚款。

translations.sentence: They imposed a fine upon the offender.
translations.tran: 他们向违法者处以罚款。

translations.sentence: They tried to impose their culture on the local people.
translations.tran: 他们试图将他们的文化强加于当地人民。

translations.sentence: I don't want to impose on you.
translations.tran: 我不想给你加重负担。

translations.sentence: I don't want to impose myself on them.
translations.tran: 我不想打扰他们。

translations.sentence: He imposed himself on her.
translations.tran: 他强求她。

translations.sCN: 强加于某人; 打扰某人
translations.sentence: I don't want to impose myself upon you.
translations.tran: 我不想打扰你。

translations.sentence: He always tries to impose himself upon her at parties.
translations.tran: 他总是在聚会上试图硬挤进她。

translations.sentence: The court will impose serious penalties on those found guilty.
translations.tran: 法院将对被判有罪的人处以严厉的惩罚。

translations.sentence: The government imposed new restrictions on businesses.
translations.tran: 政府对企业实施了新的限制。

translations.sCN: 把…强加于某人; 对…征收
translations.sentence: They imposed a tax on imported goods.
translations.tran: 他们对进口商品征税。

translations.sCN: 强加…于某人; 对…征收
translations.sentence: The company imposed a dress code upon its employees.
translations.tran: 公司对员工实行了着装规范。

translations.sentence: Don't impose your opinions upon others.
translations.tran: 不要把你的观点强加于他人。

translations.sentence: I don't want to impose upon your generosity.
translations.tran: 我不想利用你的慷慨。

translations.sentence: I hope I'm not imposing.
translations.tran: 希望我没有打扰你。

translations.sentence: The government is imposing a tax on sugary drinks.
translations.tran: 政府正在对含糖饮料征税。

translations.sentence: The new regulations impose restrictions on the use of pesticides.
translations.tran: 新规定对农药的使用施加了限制。

translations.sentence: We need to impress on students the importance of good study habits.
translations.tran: 我们需要让学生们明白良好学习习惯的重要性。

translations.tran: 这辆车需要修理。

translations.sentence: The company is in need of more funding.
translations.tran: 该公司缺乏更多资金。

translations.sentence: In no case should you open the door to strangers.
translations.tran: 在任何情况下，你都不应该给陌生人开门。

translations.sentence: In no case will I accept such behavior.
translations.tran: 我绝不会接受这种行为。

translations.sentence: I'm in no hurry to leave.
translations.tran: 我不着急离开。

translations.sentence: Take your time; we're in no hurry.

translations.sentence: I'm in no mood for arguments.

translations.sentence: She was in no mood for jokes.
translations.tran: 她不想开玩笑。

translations.sentence: He is in no sense a leader.

translations.sentence: It's in no sense a difficult task.
translations.tran: 这根本不是一项困难的任务。

translations.sentence: We'll be there in no time.

translations.sentence: He finished the project in no time.
translations.tran: 他很快就完成了这个项目。

translations.sentence: I will in no way support this proposal.
translations.tran: 我绝不会支持这项提议。

translations.sentence: This is in no way acceptable.

translations.sentence: She remained active in old age.

translations.sentence: Many people experience health problems in old age.
translations.tran: 许多人在晚年都会遇到健康问题。

translations.sentence: In one way, he was right.
translations.tran: 在某种程度上，他是对的。

translations.sentence: In one way, it's a good thing.
translations.tran: 从一个角度来说，这是一件好事。

translations.sentence: The hostages were in the kidnapper's clutches.
translations.tran: 人质落入了绑匪的魔爪。

translations.sentence: She felt trapped in his clutches.
translations.tran: 她感觉被他控制住了。

translations.sentence: I am in your debt for your help.

translations.sentence: We are forever in their debt.

translations.sentence: He lied to her right in her face.

translations.sentence: He was rude in my face.
translations.tran: 他当着我的面很粗鲁。

translations.sentence: The evidence is in his favour.
translations.tran: 证据对他有利。

translations.sentence: The judge ruled in the defendant's favour.

translations.sentence: She is in her fifties now.
translations.tran: 她现在五十多岁了。

translations.sentence: He started his second career in his fifties.
translations.tran: 他在五十多岁时开始了第二职业。

translations.sentence: In my heart, I knew it wasn't right.
translations.tran: 我心里知道这不对。

translations.sentence: I believe in my heart that he is innocent.
translations.tran: 我衷心地相信他是清白的。

translations.sentence: In her heart of hearts, she knew she had made a mistake.
translations.tran: 在她内心深处，她知道自己犯了一个错误。

translations.sentence: In his heart of hearts, he was afraid.
translations.tran: 他发自内心地感到害怕。

translations.sentence: The memorial was built in his honor.
translations.tran: 这座纪念馆是为了纪念他而建的。

translations.sentence: They gave a banquet in his honor.
translations.tran: 他们为他举办了一场宴会。

translations.sentence: The award was presented in his honour.
translations.tran: 该奖项是为了纪念他而颁发的。

translations.sentence: They held a ceremony in her honour.
translations.tran: 他们为她举行了一场仪式。

translations.sentence: I can still see the scene in my mind's eye.
translations.tran: 我仍然能在脑海中看到这个场景。

translations.sentence: He pictured the future in his mind's eye.
translations.tran: 他在想象中描绘了未来。

translations.sCN: 某人的天性，符合某人的性格
translations.sentence: It's in her nature to be kind.
translations.tran: 她天性善良。

translations.sentence: He's competitive; it's in his nature.
translations.tran: 他喜欢竞争；这是他的本性。

translations.sCN: 在某人看来，依某人之见
translations.sentence: In my opinion, we should accept the offer.
translations.tran: 依我看来，我们应该接受这个提议。

translations.sentence: She is a successful businesswoman in her own right.
translations.tran: 她本身就是一个成功的女商人。

translations.sCN: 独立地，凭借自己的能力
translations.sentence: He became a millionaire in his own right.
translations.tran: 他凭借自己的能力成为了百万富翁。

translations.sCN: 在某人面前，当着某人的面
translations.sentence: He couldn't say anything bad about her in her presence.
translations.tran: 他不敢当着她的面说她的坏话。

translations.sCN: 设身处地为某人着想，站在某人的立场
translations.sentence: I can't imagine being in your shoes.
translations.tran: 我无法想象站在你的立场上。

translations.sCN: 在某人的视野内，在某人视线中

translations.tran: 时刻让孩子们保持在你的视线中。

translations.sentence: She’s always in my sight.
translations.tran: 她总是在我的眼中。

translations.sCN: 在某人的业余时间，在空闲时间

translations.tran: 你空闲时间做什么？

translations.sentence: Now it's your turn.
translations.tran: 现在轮到你了。

translations.sentence: In my view, this is a good decision.
translations.tran: 在我看来，这是一个好的决定。

translations.sentence: Don't get in my way!
translations.tran: 别挡我的路！

translations.sentence: The new system is now in operation.
translations.tran: 新系统现在正在运行中。

translations.sentence: The union is in opposition to the new regulations.

translations.sentence: Please put your things in order.

translations.sentence: Everything is in order.
translations.tran: 一切正常。

translations.sentence: I'll repeat it in order that everyone understands.
translations.tran: 我再重复一遍，以便每个人都能理解。

translations.sentence: I'm saving money in order to buy a car.
translations.tran: 我正在存钱为了买车。

translations.sentence: The success was in part due to good luck.
translations.tran: 成功部分归功于好运。

translations.sentence: I enjoy all kinds of music, but I like classical music in particular.
translations.tran: 我喜欢各种音乐，但尤其喜欢古典音乐。

translations.tran: 博物馆在周一关闭，特别地，每个月的第一个周一也关闭。

translations.sentence: They offered a reduced price in payment for a quick sale.

translations.sentence: She wants to live in peace.

translations.sentence: I just want to be left in peace.

translations.sentence: I'll go there in person to talk to him.

translations.sentence: The interview will be conducted in person.

translations.sentence: We must view the situation in perspective.

translations.sentence: Try to put things in perspective.

translations.sentence: All the equipment is now in place.
translations.tran: 所有设备现在都已就位。

translations.sentence: The new regulations are now in place.
translations.tran: 新的规章制度已经生效。

translations.sentence: Can I use butter in place of margarine?

translations.sentence: We have food in plenty.

translations.sentence: They live in plenty.
translations.tran: 他们过着富足的生活。

translations.sentence: She is very talented in point of music.
translations.tran: 她在音乐方面很有天赋。

translations.sentence: In point of fact, he was wrong.

translations.sentence: He was found in possession of stolen goods.

translations.sentence: The company is in possession of the land.

translations.sentence: The theory doesn't always work in practice.

translations.sentence: How do you implement this in practice?

translations.tran: 他写了一首诗来赞美他的母亲。

translations.sentence: The ceremony was held in praise of the hero.

translations.sentence: In principle, it's a good idea.

translations.sentence: The book is still in print.

translations.sentence: The meeting was held in private.

translations.sentence: The construction is still in progress.

translations.sentence: The project is in progress.

translations.sentence: The costs are in proportion.

translations.sentence: The payment was made in proportion to the work done.
translations.tran: 付款是根据完成的工作量进行的。

translations.sentence: He invested in the stock in prospect of a profit.

translations.sentence: They are training hard in prospect of the competition.

translations.sentence: She criticized the government in public.

translations.sentence: They are in pursuit of happiness.

translations.sentence: The police were in pursuit of the suspect.

translations.sentence: He is in pursuit of a better job.
translations.tran: 他正在追求一份更好的工作。

translations.sentence: They produce goods in quantity.

translations.sentence: They are in quest for knowledge.
translations.tran: 他们正在寻求知识。

translations.sentence: The explorers went in quest of the lost city.

translations.sentence: They were in quest of a solution.

translations.tran: 讨论中的主题非常重要。

translations.sentence: The validity of the evidence is in question.

translations.sentence: The beggar was dressed in rags.

translations.sCN: 为了表彰，以示对…的认可

translations.tran: 他因其成就而获得奖励。

translations.tran: 针对批评，该公司发表了公开道歉。

translations.sentence: In retrospect, the decision was a mistake.

translations.tran: 我帮他搬家，他作为回报提议让我搭车。

translations.tran: 她向我微笑，我也回以微笑。

translations.tran: 为了回报他的帮助，我提议做晚餐。

translations.sentence: She received a scholarship in return for her excellent grades.
translations.tran: 她因为优异的成绩获得了奖学金。

translations.sentence: The car was moving in reverse.
translations.tran: 汽车正在倒车。

translations.sentence: The process worked in reverse.
translations.tran: 这个过程反向运行。

translations.sentence: The list is presented in reverse order.

translations.sentence: Please sort the names in reverse order.

translations.sentence: The ancient city was found in ruins.
translations.tran: 这座古城被发现变成废墟。

translations.sentence: His business was in ruins after the scandal.
translations.tran: 丑闻发生后，他的生意一败涂地。

translations.sentence: They reached the shore in safety.
translations.tran: 他们安全地到达了岸边。

translations.sentence: The children are playing in safety.
translations.tran: 孩子们在安全的环境中玩耍。

translations.sCN: 在某人的魔爪之下；被某人控制
translations.sentence: The hostages were still in the kidnappers' clutches.
translations.tran: 人质仍在绑匪的魔爪之下。

translations.tran: 他害怕落入敌人的手中。

translations.sCN: 欠某人的人情；感激某人
translations.sentence: I am in your debt for helping me.
translations.tran: 我非常感激你帮助了我。

translations.tran: 他欠银行的债。

translations.sCN: 在某人面前；当着某人的面

translations.tran: 他不敢在他父亲面前说什么。

translations.sentence: I felt safe in her presence.

translations.sCN: 设身处地为某人着想；站在某人的立场上

translations.tran: 我不想现在站在她的立场上。

translations.sentence: Imagine yourself in his shoes.
translations.tran: 想象一下自己处在他的境况下。

translations.sentence: The model is built in scale.
translations.tran: 该模型是按比例建造的。

translations.sentence: The map is drawn in scale.
translations.tran: 地图是按比例绘制的。

translations.sentence: She is still in school.
translations.tran: 她还在上学。

translations.sentence: I learned a lot in school.
translations.tran: 我在学校学到了很多。

translations.sentence: They went in search of treasure.
translations.tran: 他们去寻找宝藏。

translations.sentence: The explorer was in search of new lands.
translations.tran: 探险家为了寻找新的土地。

translations.sentence: They are in search of a new apartment.
translations.tran: 他们正在寻找一套新公寓。

translations.sentence: She was in search of her lost cat.
translations.tran: 她正在寻找她丢失的猫。

translations.sentence: Strawberries are delicious when they're in season.
translations.tran: 草莓在当季时很美味。

translations.sentence: The hotel is always busy when the ski resorts are in season.
translations.tran: 当滑雪胜地进入旺季时，这家酒店总是很忙。

translations.sentence: They met in secret to discuss their plans.
translations.tran: 他们秘密会面来讨论他们的计划。

translations.sentence: Please arrange the files in sequence.
translations.tran: 请按顺序排列文件。

translations.sentence: The names are listed in sequence of their arrival.
translations.tran: 这些名字是按照他们的到达顺序排列的。

translations.sentence: The court is in session.
translations.tran: 法庭正在开庭。

translations.sentence: Classes are in session.

translations.sCN: 保持健康，身体状况良好

translations.tran: 在马拉松比赛前，我需要保持健康。

translations.sentence: The car is in great shape for its age.
translations.tran: 这辆车以它的年龄来说状况很好。

translations.tran: 简而言之，我们需要迅速采取行动。

translations.sentence: The mechanic fixed the car in short order.
translations.tran: 机械师很快地修好了车。

translations.tran: 在沙漠中，淡水供应不足。

translations.sentence: The island came into sight.
translations.tran: 岛屿进入视野。

translations.sentence: Victory is in sight.

translations.sentence: They listened in silence.
translations.tran: 他们静静地听着。

translations.tran: 简单来说，他辞职了。

translations.sentence: In so far as I know, he is innocent.
translations.tran: 据我所知，他是无辜的。

translations.tran: 在某种情况下，保持沉默更好。

translations.sentence: In some cases, early detection can save lives.
translations.tran: 在某些情况下，早期发现可以挽救生命。

translations.sentence: In some ways, he was right.
translations.tran: 在某种程度上，他是对的。

translations.tran: 尽管下雨，他们还是去散步了。

translations.tran: 士兵们步调一致地行进。

translations.sentence: The company's growth is in step with the market.
translations.tran: 该公司的增长与市场同步。

translations.sentence: This item is currently in stock.
translations.tran: 此商品目前有现货。

translations.sentence: The new products will be in store next week.
translations.tran: 新产品下周将在商店里上架。

translations.sentence: There's a big surprise in store for you.
translations.tran: 有一个大惊喜等着你。

translations.sentence: The army attacked in strength.
translations.tran: 军队以强大力量发动了进攻。

translations.sentence: The protest was attended by people in strength.
translations.tran: 抗议活动有大量的人参加。

translations.tran: 在长途飞行后，我正在遭受时差反应的困扰。

translations.sentence: The job prospects for graduates are improving.
translations.tran: 毕业生的就业前景正在改善。

translations.sentence: Job-hopping is common among young professionals.
translations.tran: 对于年轻的专业人士来说，频繁跳槽是很常见的。

translations.sCN: 唤起某人的记忆；提醒某人
translations.sentence: Can you jog my memory about what happened last week?
translations.tran: 你能提醒我一下上周发生了什么事吗？

translations.sentence: They decided to join hands to fight against poverty.
translations.tran: 他们决定携手合作，对抗贫困。

translations.sentence: The two companies decided to join hands with each other to develop the new technology.

translations.sentence: We should join hands with other departments to complete this project.
translations.tran: 我们应该与其他部门合作来完成这个项目。

translations.sentence: If you want to join in the fun, you're welcome to play with us.
translations.tran: 如果你想加入到乐趣中来，欢迎和我们一起玩。

translations.sentence: Many people joined in the protest.
translations.tran: 许多人参加了抗议。

translations.sentence: I will join you at the restaurant later.

translations.sentence: The new employee will join us on the trip.
translations.tran: 新员工将加入我们的旅行。

translations.sentence: Would you like to join me for lunch?

translations.sentence: He joined his friends for the party.
translations.tran: 他加入了他的朋友们一起参加派对。

translations.sentence: He decided to join the army after graduating from high school.
translations.tran: 高中毕业后，他决定参军。

translations.sentence: Many young people choose to join the army.
translations.tran: 许多年轻人选择入伍。

translations.sentence: He decided to join up and serve his country.
translations.tran: 他决定参军并为国效力。

translations.sentence: Let's join up with the others and form a team.
translations.tran: 让我们和其他人联合起来，组成一个团队。

translations.sentence: They decided to join up with another company to launch the product.
translations.tran: 他们决定与另一家公司合作推出这款产品。

translations.sentence: We will join up with them at the meeting.
translations.tran: 我们将在会议上与他们会合。

translations.sentence: The two companies formed a joint venture to develop the new market.
translations.tran: 这两家公司成立了一家合资企业来开发新市场。

translations.sentence: This is a joint venture between a foreign company and a local one.
translations.tran: 这是一个外国公司和一家本地公司的合资企业。

translations.sentence: They were joking about the boss's new haircut.
translations.tran: 他们正在拿老板的新发型开玩笑。

translations.sentence: Don't joke about someone's feelings.
translations.tran: 不要戏谑别人的感受。

translations.sentence: I'll jot down your phone number.
translations.tran: 我来记下你的电话号码。

translations.sentence: She jotted down some notes during the meeting.
translations.tran: 她在会议上简要地记下了一些笔记。

translations.sentence: You can judge a book by its cover.
translations.tran: 你可以以貌取人。

translations.sentence: We should judge the quality of the work by the results.
translations.tran: 我们应该根据结果来判断工作的质量。

translations.sentence: Judging from his expression, he's not happy.
translations.tran: 从他的表情来看，他不高兴。

translations.sentence: You can judge a person's character from their actions.
translations.tran: 你可以从一个人的行为来判断他们的性格。

translations.sentence: We shouldn't judge people by their appearance.
translations.tran: 我们不应该以貌取人。

translations.sentence: I'll judge the quality of the food by its taste.
translations.tran: 我将通过味道来判断食物的质量。

translations.sentence: You can judge a book from its cover.
translations.tran: 你可以从封面判断一本书。

translations.sentence: We can judge his skill from his performance.
translations.tran: 我们可以从他的表现来判断他的技能。

translations.sentence: Judging by the weather forecast, it will rain tomorrow.
translations.tran: 根据天气预报，明天会下雨。

translations.sentence: Judging by her smile, she liked the present.
translations.tran: 从她的微笑来看，她喜欢这份礼物。

translations.sentence: Judging from his reaction, he didn't like the news.
translations.tran: 从他的反应来看，他不喜欢这个消息。

translations.sentence: Judging from the evidence, he is guilty.
