translations.tran: 明智的父母总是为他们的孩子做出明智的决定。

translations.sentence: Judicious parents teach their children about the importance of education.
translations.tran: 有见识的父母教育他们的孩子关于教育的重要性。

translations.sentence: It is rude to jump a queue.
translations.tran: 插队是不礼貌的行为。

translations.sentence: The man jumped a queue and went to the front.
translations.tran: 那个人插队到了前面。

translations.sCN: 欣然接受；迫不及待地接受
translations.sentence: He jumped at the chance to work abroad.
translations.tran: 他欣然接受了出国工作的机会。

translations.sentence: She jumped at the opportunity to improve her skills.
translations.tran: 她抓住了提高自己技能的机会。

translations.sentence: She jumped at a chance to travel the world.
translations.tran: 她抓住了一个周游世界的机会。

translations.sCN: 迫不及待地接受一个机会
translations.sentence: He jumped at a chance to prove himself.
translations.tran: 他迫不及待地接受了一个证明自己的机会。

translations.sentence: The monkey jumped off the tree.
translations.tran: 猴子从树上跳了下来。

translations.sentence: He jumped off the train at the last minute.
translations.tran: 他在最后一刻下了火车。

translations.sentence: The child jumped on the bed.
translations.tran: 孩子跳到了床上。

translations.sentence: The media jumped on the story as soon as it broke.
translations.tran: 媒体一发现这个故事就蜂拥而上。

translations.sentence: He was told off for jumping the queue.
translations.tran: 他因为插队而被训斥。

translations.sentence: She is junior to him in the company.
translations.tran: 她在公司里是他的下属。

translations.sCN: 比某人年轻；地位比某人低
translations.sentence: I am junior to him in experience.
translations.tran: 在经验上我比他年轻。

translations.sentence: Just a minute, I'll be right there.
translations.tran: 稍等，我马上就来。

translations.sentence: Just a moment, I need to check the details.
translations.tran: 等一下，我需要核对一下细节。

translations.sentence: The meeting is just about to start.
translations.tran: 会议差不多就要开始了。

translations.sentence: Just as I was about to leave, the phone rang.
translations.tran: 正当我准备离开的时候，电话响了。

translations.sentence: It's just as I thought.
translations.tran: 就像我所想的那样。

translations.sentence: It's just as well that you didn't come.
translations.tran: 你没来也好。

translations.sentence: He called just now.
translations.tran: 他刚才打来了电话。

translations.sentence: That's just so.

translations.sCN: （用于表示）一丝不苟的；精确的
translations.sentence: The books were arranged just so.
translations.tran: 书被摆放得井井有条。

translations.sentence: I'm tired, but I'll go just the same.
translations.tran: 我很累，但我还是会去的。

translations.sentence: It's all just the same to me.
translations.tran: 对我来说都一样。

translations.sentence: Just then, the door opened.
translations.tran: 就在那时，门开了。

translations.sentence: She's keen on tennis.
translations.tran: 她喜欢打网球。

translations.sentence: It's important to keep a balance in your diet.
translations.tran: 保持饮食平衡很重要。

translations.sentence: Try to keep a balance between work and leisure.
translations.tran: 试着在工作和休闲之间保持平衡。

translations.sentence: It's difficult to keep a balance between your personal life and your work life.
translations.tran: 很难在你的个人生活和工作之间保持平衡。

translations.sentence: The doctor is keeping a close watch on the patient's condition.
translations.tran: 医生正在密切关注病人的病情。

translations.sentence: She keeps a diary every day.
translations.tran: 她每天都写日记。

translations.sentence: Keep a hold on the rope.
translations.tran: 抓紧绳子。

translations.sentence: He tried to keep a hold on his anger.
translations.tran: 他试图控制住自己的怒火。

translations.sentence: He always keeps his promises.
translations.tran: 他总是信守承诺。

translations.sentence: I need to keep a record of all my expenses.
translations.tran: 我需要记录我所有的开销。

translations.sentence: Can you keep a secret?

translations.sentence: The police are keeping a watch on the suspect's house.
translations.tran: 警察正在监视嫌疑人的房子。

translations.sentence: It's important to keep abreast of current events.
translations.tran: 了解时事很重要。

translations.tran: 她努力了解科学领域的最新发展。

translations.sentence: We need to keep abreast with the latest technologies.
translations.tran: 我们需要与最新技术保持同步。

translations.sentence: Could you keep an eye on my bag while I go to the restroom?

translations.sentence: Keep an eye out for any suspicious activity.

translations.tran: 在机场留意你的妹妹。

translations.sentence: If you keep at it, you'll eventually succeed.

translations.sentence: He kept at the work until it was finished.
translations.tran: 他继续工作直到完成。

translations.tran: 老师告诉学生们远离火源。

translations.tran: 她试图避免把她的问题带到工作中。

translations.sentence: Keep back from the explosion!
translations.tran: 远离爆炸！

translations.tran: 她隐瞒了一些信息。

translations.sentence: Keep clear of the area if you don't know the situation.

translations.tran: 她陪伴着她的老朋友。

translations.sentence: Keep doing what you're doing, you're doing great!

translations.tran: 继续做这些练习，你会进步的。

translations.tran: 他坚持做他所相信的事情。

translations.sentence: Try to keep down the noise.

translations.sentence: It's important to keep friends with people who support you.

translations.tran: 他试图阻止狗吠叫。

translations.sCN: 阻止做某事；避免做某事

translations.tran: 我无法阻止他哭泣。

translations.tran: 均衡饮食将有助于你保持健康。

translations.sentence: She keeps house very well.
translations.tran: 她很擅长料理家务。

translations.tran: 我们应该保持联系。

translations.sentence: I try to keep in contact with my old school friends.
translations.tran: 我试着和我的老同学保持联系。

translations.sentence: Exercise can help you keep in good health.
translations.tran: 锻炼可以帮助你保持健康。

translations.sentence: Keep in mind that you have an appointment tomorrow.
translations.tran: 记住你明天有个预约。

translations.sentence: I try to keep in touch with my relatives.
translations.tran: 我试着和我的亲戚保持联系。

translations.tran: 继续努力！你做得很好。

translations.sentence: Keep off the grass.
translations.tran: 勿踩草地。

translations.sentence: I'm trying to keep off sweets.
translations.tran: 我正在努力不吃甜食。

translations.sentence: Keep on working until you finish the project.
translations.tran: 继续工作直到你完成这个项目。

translations.tran: 雨整夜不停地下着。

translations.sentence: She kept on studying even though she was tired.
translations.tran: 即使她很累，她也继续学习。

translations.tran: 与你的同事保持良好关系是很重要的。

translations.sentence: He struggled to keep his balance on the icy path.
translations.tran: 他在结冰的小路上努力保持平衡。

translations.sentence: She managed to keep her balance during the crisis.
translations.tran: 她在危机中设法保持镇定。

translations.sentence: She decided to keep her distance from him after their argument.
translations.tran: 在他们争吵后，她决定和他保持距离。

translations.sentence: Keep your ears open for any important announcements.
translations.tran: 注意听任何重要的通知。

translations.sentence: I kept my ears open for news about the job.
translations.tran: 我留心听取关于这份工作的新闻。

phrase: keep one's eyes and ears open

translations.sentence: Keep your eyes and ears open for any changes in the market.
translations.tran: 密切关注市场上的任何变化。

translations.sentence: I kept my eyes and ears open for any signs of trouble.
translations.tran: 我保持警惕，以防出现任何麻烦的迹象。

translations.tran: 开车时注意看路。

translations.sentence: Keep your eyes on the latest developments.
translations.tran: 关注最新的发展。

translations.sentence: Keep your eyes open for opportunities.
translations.tran: 留意机会。

translations.sentence: Keep your eyes open for potential problems.
translations.tran: 对潜在的问题保持警惕。

translations.sentence: I'm keeping my fingers crossed for your success.
translations.tran: 我为你祈祷成功。

translations.sentence: We're keeping our fingers crossed that the weather will be good for the picnic.
translations.tran: 我们祈祷野餐那天天气晴朗。

translations.sentence: It's important to keep your head in a crisis.
translations.tran: 在危机中保持冷静很重要。

translations.sentence: She kept her head during the accident.
translations.tran: 在事故中她保持了镇定。

translations.sentence: Keep your mind on your studies.
translations.tran: 专注于你的学习。

translations.sentence: Try to keep your mind on the task at hand.

translations.sentence: She decided to keep her own counsel about her plans.
translations.tran: 她决定对她的计划保密。

translations.sentence: He tends to keep his own counsel.
translations.tran: 他倾向于保持沉默。

translations.sentence: He always keeps his promises.
translations.tran: 他总是信守承诺。

translations.sentence: It's important to keep your temper.
translations.tran: 控制你的情绪是很重要的。

translations.sentence: She managed to keep her temper despite the insults.
translations.tran: 尽管受到侮辱，她还是设法忍住了怒火。

translations.sentence: She always keeps her word.
translations.tran: 她总是遵守诺言。

translations.sentence: Keep out! This area is restricted.
translations.tran: 禁止入内！此区域是限制区。

translations.sentence: Keep out of trouble.

translations.sentence: Keep out of the sun.
translations.tran: 远离阳光。

translations.sentence: He decided to keep out of the argument.
translations.tran: 他决定不参与这场争论。

translations.sentence: It's difficult to keep pace with the latest technological advances.
translations.tran: 很难跟上最新的技术进步。

translations.sentence: We need to keep pace with the growing demand.
translations.tran: 我们需要与不断增长的需求保持同步。

translations.sentence: Technology is advancing so rapidly that it's difficult to keep pace with it.
translations.tran: 科技发展如此迅速，很难跟上它的步伐。

translations.sCN: 跟上某事物的步伐；与…同步
translations.sentence: We need to keep pace with the latest developments in the field.
translations.tran: 我们需要跟上该领域的最新发展。

translations.sentence: Please keep quiet during the movie.
translations.tran: 请在电影放映期间保持安静。

translations.sentence: I told him to keep quiet about what happened.
translations.tran: 我告诉他要对发生的事情保密。

translations.sentence: Stay inside to keep safe during the storm.
translations.tran: 在风暴期间留在室内以确保安全。

translations.sCN: 使某人继续做某事，让某人持续做某事
translations.sentence: The teacher kept the students at their homework.
translations.tran: 老师让学生们继续做他们的作业。

translations.sentence: The parents tried to keep their children away from bad influences.
translations.tran: 父母试图让他们的孩子远离坏的影响。

translations.sentence: She kept her children away from fast food.
translations.tran: 她让她的孩子们远离快餐。

translations.sentence: I’ll keep you company while you wait.
translations.tran: 我会陪着你一起等。

translations.sentence: The comedian kept the audience laughing for an hour.
translations.tran: 这位喜剧演员让观众笑了整整一个小时。

translations.sentence: The rain kept us from going to the beach.
translations.tran: 雨阻止了我们去海滩。

translations.sentence: Eating healthy food and exercising regularly helps keep you in good health.
translations.tran: 吃健康食品和 নিয়মিত 锻炼有助于保持你的健康。

translations.sentence: It's important to learn how to keep secrets.
translations.tran: 学习如何保守秘密很重要。

translations.sentence: The crowd kept silence as the speaker began to talk.
translations.tran: 当演讲者开始讲话时，人群保持沉默。

translations.sentence: Keep the medicine away from children.
translations.tran: 把药放在孩子们够不着的地方。

translations.sentence: Keep the food away from the sun.
translations.tran: 将食物远离阳光。

translations.sentence: Keep in mind that the store closes at 9 pm.
translations.tran: 记住商店晚上九点关门。

translations.sCN: 记住某事（较为罕见，同keep in mind）
translations.sentence: Keep in mind, this is only a suggestion.
translations.tran: 记住，这仅仅是一个建议。

translations.sentence: I promised to keep her secret.
translations.tran: 我答应保守她的秘密。

translations.sentence: He decided to keep his worries to himself.
translations.tran: 他决定把他的担忧留给自己。

translations.sentence: Despite their disagreement, they managed to keep terms with each other.
translations.tran: 尽管他们有分歧，但他们设法与对方保持了友好关系。

translations.sentence: You must keep to the rules.
translations.tran: 你必须遵守规则。

translations.sentence: I will keep to my promise.
translations.tran: 我将信守我的承诺。

translations.sentence: The discussion should keep to the topic.
translations.tran: 讨论应该局限于这个话题。

translations.sentence: She tends to keep to herself.
translations.tran: 她倾向于独处。

translations.sentence: He kept to himself about his problems.
translations.tran: 他对他自己的问题保持沉默。

translations.sentence: I need to keep track of my expenses.
translations.tran: 我需要记录我的开支。

translations.sentence: It's difficult to keep track of all the changes.
translations.tran: 很难跟踪所有的变化。

translations.sentence: Please keep track of the time.
translations.tran: 请留意时间。

translations.sentence: I use a spreadsheet to keep track of my investments.
translations.tran: 我用电子表格来记录我的投资。

translations.sentence: They tried to keep the rebellion under.
translations.tran: 他们试图镇压叛乱。

translations.sentence: We can learn a lot from the experiences of others.

translations.sCN: 为…留下空间；给…留下余地

phrase: leave sb. to his own devices

translations.sCN: 放任某人自由行事；让某人自生自灭
translations.sentence: The teacher left the students to their own devices.
translations.tran: 老师让学生们自由发挥。

translations.sentence: She's planning to leave school next year.
translations.tran: 她计划明年毕业。

translations.sCN: 由某人选择；任由某人决定

translations.sCN: 放任某人自由行事；让某人自生自灭

translations.sentence: The cost is less than $10.

translations.sentence: She let down her hair.

translations.sentence: She was laughing like crazy.

translations.tran: 我发现他偷听了我们的谈话。

translations.sentence: Can I listen in on the meeting?

translations.tran: 他们被指控窃听私人谈话。

translations.sentence: I love to listen to music.
translations.tran: 我喜欢听音乐。

translations.sentence: You should listen to your parents' advice.
translations.tran: 你应该听从父母的建议。

translations.tran: 他一点一点地提高了他的英语水平。

translations.tran: 他被迫生活在谎言中以保护他的家人。

translations.tran: 他总是入不敷出。

translations.sentence: She lives by her own rules.

translations.sentence: He lives by the principle of honesty.
translations.tran: 他遵守诚实的原则。

translations.sentence: They were living from hand to mouth during the economic crisis.
translations.tran: 在经济危机期间，他们勉强糊口。

translations.sentence: I live in New York.
translations.tran: 我住在纽约。

translations.sentence: She lives in with the family.
translations.tran: 她寄宿在该家庭。

translations.tran: 这位前领导人被迫流亡。

translations.sentence: He lived in misery after his wife left him.

translations.tran: 警察把证据锁了起来。

translations.sentence: He makes his living as a freelance writer.
translations.tran: 他以自由撰稿人的身份谋生。

translations.sentence: You have to make your option before the deadline.
translations.tran: 你必须在截止日期前做出你的选择。

translations.sentence: He decided to make his own way in the world.
translations.tran: 他决定在这个世界上自食其力。

translations.sentence: We made our way through the crowd.
translations.tran: 我们穿过人群。

translations.sentence: She is making her way in the industry.
translations.tran: 她在业内正在取得成功。

translations.sentence: The explorers made their way through the dense jungle.
translations.tran: 探险家们穿过了茂密的丛林。

translations.sentence: The students made their way to the library.
translations.tran: 学生们走向了图书馆。

translations.sentence: The ship made its way toward the harbor.
translations.tran: 这艘船朝港口驶去。

translations.sentence: They made their way towards the exit.
translations.tran: 他们走向出口。

translations.sentence: Please make yourself at home.
translations.tran: 请随便坐。

translations.sentence: Make yourself at home and help yourself to the food.
translations.tran: 别客气，随便吃点东西。

translations.sentence: She made herself at home and took off her shoes.
translations.tran: 她放松下来，脱掉了鞋子。

translations.sentence: I could barely make out the words.
translations.tran: 我几乎辨认不出这些字。

translations.sentence: I can't make out what she's trying to say.
translations.tran: 我不明白她想说什么。

translations.sentence: How are you making out?
translations.tran: 你最近怎么样？

translations.sentence: I saw them making out in the car.
translations.tran: 我看到他们在车里亲热。

translations.sentence: The sculpture is made out of bronze.
translations.tran: 这座雕塑是用青铜制成的。

translations.sentence: What are the main ingredients that the pie is made out of?
translations.tran: 这个馅饼的主要配料是什么？

translations.sentence: They made over their old house.
translations.tran: 他们翻新了他们的旧房子。

translations.sentence: The fashion designer made her over to fit the new style.
translations.tran: 这位时装设计师改造了她以适应新的风格。

translations.sentence: He made over his property to his son.
translations.tran: 他把他的财产转让给了他的儿子。

translations.sentence: The two countries finally decided to make peace.
translations.tran: 这两个国家最终决定讲和。

translations.sentence: Let's hope they can make peace.
translations.tran: 让我们希望他们能够实现和平。

translations.sentence: They decided to make peace with their neighbors.
translations.tran: 他们决定与邻居和解。

translations.sentence: She had to make peace with her illness.
translations.tran: 她不得不接受她的疾病。

translations.sentence: The students are making good progress in their studies.
translations.tran: 学生们在学习上取得了很大的进步。

translations.sentence: We are making progress.
translations.tran: 我们正在取得进展。

translations.sentence: She is making progress with her new project.
translations.tran: 她正在她的新项目上取得进展。

translations.sentence: He is making progress with his language skills.
translations.tran: 他在他的语言技能方面有所发展。

translations.sentence: We must make provision for the future.
translations.tran: 我们必须为未来做好准备。

translations.sentence: The company made provision for the employee's retirement.
translations.tran: 公司为员工的退休做了准备。

translations.sentence: We need to make provision for disabled access.
translations.tran: 我们需要为残疾人提供通道。

translations.sentence: The government has made provision for emergency relief.
translations.tran: 政府已经为紧急救援做好了准备。

translations.sentence: We will make provision for their travel expenses.
translations.tran: 我们将为他们的差旅费提供准备。

translations.sentence: Make ready the supplies for the trip.
translations.tran: 为旅行准备好补给品。

translations.sentence: Are you ready to make ready?
translations.tran: 你准备好了吗？

translations.sentence: The speaker made reference to the previous incident.
translations.tran: 演讲者提到了之前的事件。

translations.sentence: Please make reference to the handbook.
translations.tran: 请参考手册。

translations.sentence: Let's make room for the new furniture.
translations.tran: 让我们为新家具腾出空间。

translations.sentence: We need to make room for more students.
translations.tran: 我们需要容纳更多的学生。

translations.sentence: Could you make room for me?
translations.tran: 你能给我腾个地方吗？

translations.sentence: Make room for the new arrivals.
translations.tran: 给新来的人让出空间。

translations.sentence: The doctor makes his rounds every morning.
translations.tran: 医生每天早上巡视病房。

translations.sentence: The police made their rounds in the neighborhood.
translations.tran: 警察在社区里挨家拜访。

translations.sentence: Parents often make sacrifices for their children.
translations.tran: 父母常常为他们的孩子做出牺牲。

translations.sentence: She made many sacrifices to achieve her goals.
translations.tran: 为了实现她的目标，她做出了许多牺牲。

phrase: make sb.s hair stand on end

translations.sentence: The horror film made my hair stand on end.
translations.tran: 这部恐怖电影让我毛骨悚然。

translations.sentence: The suspenseful story made my hair stand on end.
translations.tran: 这个悬疑的故事让我害怕。

translations.sentence: That makes sense.
translations.tran: 这有道理。

translations.sentence: It doesn't make sense to me.
translations.tran: 我无法理解。

translations.sentence: Her explanation makes sense.
translations.tran: 她的解释很合理。

translations.sentence: I can't make sense of this document.
translations.tran: 我看不懂这份文件。

translations.sentence: She tried to make sense of the situation.
translations.tran: 她试图弄明白情况。

translations.sentence: Can you make sense of his words?
translations.tran: 你能理解他的话的意思吗？

translations.sCN: 使某物适合于；使某物适于
translations.sentence: We need to make these products suitable for export.
translations.tran: 我们需要使这些产品适合出口。

translations.sentence: The company made the office space suitable for disabled employees.
translations.tran: 公司使办公空间适合残疾员工使用。

translations.sentence: The hotel made its rooms suitable for families.
translations.tran: 这家酒店使他们的房间适合家庭入住。

translations.sentence: We need to make the software suitable for mobile devices.
translations.tran: 我们需要让这款软件适合移动设备使用。

translations.sentence: Make sure you lock the door when you leave.
translations.tran: 离开时确保锁上门。

translations.sentence: I’ll make sure the package gets delivered on time.
translations.tran: 我会保证包裹按时送达。

translations.sentence: Can you make sure about the meeting time?
translations.tran: 你能确定一下会议时间吗？

translations.sentence: Let's make sure about the details before we proceed.
translations.tran: 在我们继续之前，让我们查明细节。

translations.sentence: Make sure of your facts before you argue.
translations.tran: 在争论之前，确保你掌握的事实。

translations.sentence: I want to make sure of her abilities before I assign her the task.
translations.tran: 在给她分配任务之前，我想确认一下她的能力。

translations.sentence: Make sure that you understand the instructions.
translations.tran: 确保你理解了这些说明。

translations.sentence: Please make sure that the report is submitted on time.
translations.tran: 请确保报告按时提交。

translations.sentence: They finally made terms after a long negotiation.
translations.tran: 经过长时间的谈判，他们终于达成了协议。

translations.sentence: The two sides tried to make terms to avoid further conflict.
translations.tran: 双方试图妥协以避免进一步的冲突。

translations.sentence: She always makes the bed before she leaves for work.
translations.tran: 她上班前总是铺床。

translations.sentence: Can you make the bed, please?
translations.tran: 你能整理一下床铺吗？

translations.sentence: We'll make the best of the situation and enjoy our vacation.
translations.tran: 我们将充分利用这种境况，享受我们的假期。

translations.sentence: Let's make the best of this opportunity.
translations.tran: 让我们尽可能地利用这次机会。

translations.sentence: We should make the best use of our resources.
translations.tran: 我们应该充分利用我们的资源。

translations.sentence: She makes the best use of her time by studying every day.
translations.tran: 她每天学习，最大限度地利用时间。

translations.sentence: Your support really made the difference.
translations.tran: 你的支持真的起了作用。

translations.sentence: The new policy will make a big difference.
translations.tran: 这项新政策将会产生很大的影响。

translations.sentence: He worked hard and finally made the grade.
translations.tran: 他努力学习，最终达到了标准。

translations.sentence: I hope my performance makes the grade.
translations.tran: 我希望我的表现能达到要求。

translations.sentence: Let's make the most of our time here.
translations.tran: 让我们充分利用在这里的时间。

translations.sentence: She decided to make the most of her summer vacation.
translations.tran: 她决定最大限度地利用她的暑假。

translations.sentence: The ship made towards the shore.
translations.tran: 船朝岸边驶去。

translations.sentence: He made towards the exit.
translations.tran: 他朝出口走去。

translations.sentence: Water is made up of hydrogen and oxygen.
translations.tran: 水由氢和氧构成。

translations.sentence: I need to make up for the lost time.
translations.tran: 我需要弥补失去的时间。

translations.sentence: She likes to make up before going out.
translations.tran: 她喜欢在出门前化妆。

translations.sentence: He made up a story to explain why he was late.
translations.tran: 他编造了一个故事来解释他迟到的原因。

translations.sentence: They finally made up after their argument.
translations.tran: 他们争吵后终于和解了。

translations.sentence: I'll make up for the mistake later.
translations.tran: 我稍后会弥补这个错误。

translations.sentence: She tried to make up for her lost time.
translations.tran: 她试图弥补失去的时间。

translations.sentence: The team is made up of experienced players.
translations.tran: 这支队伍由经验丰富的球员组成。

translations.sentence: The committee is made up of representatives from various departments.
translations.tran: 委员会由来自各个部门的代表组成。

translations.sentence: She finally made up her mind to quit her job.
translations.tran: 她终于下定决心辞职。

translations.sentence: It's time to make up your mind.
translations.tran: 是时候做出决定了。

phrase: make up one's mind to do

translations.sentence: She made up her mind to study abroad.
translations.tran: 她下定决心要出国留学。

translations.sentence: He made up his mind to start his own business.
translations.tran: 他决定开始自己的事业。

translations.sentence: I need to make up the lost study during the vacation.
translations.tran: 我需要在假期补上落下的学习。

translations.sentence: She has to make up the lost study before the exam.
translations.tran: 她必须在考试前补上落下的功课。

translations.sentence: He tried to make up to the boss by offering to work overtime.
translations.tran: 他试图通过主动加班来讨好老板。

translations.sCN: 弥补，补偿（尤指错误或损失）
translations.sentence: I'm sorry I'm late. How can I make up to you?
translations.tran: 对不起我迟到了。我怎么补偿你？

translations.sentence: We should make use of this opportunity to improve our skills.
translations.tran: 我们应该利用这个机会提高我们的技能。

translations.sentence: The crowd made way for the ambulance.
translations.tran: 人群给救护车让路。

translations.sentence: Please make way for the new furniture.
translations.tran: 请为新家具腾出空间。

translations.sentence: The old buildings are being demolished to make way for a new shopping center.
translations.tran: 这些旧建筑将被拆除，为新的购物中心腾地方。

translations.sCN: 为…创造条件，为…铺平道路
translations.sentence: This new technology makes way for faster communication.
translations.tran: 这项新技术为更快的沟通创造了条件。

translations.sentence: He made a fortune in the stock market.
translations.tran: 他在股市里发了大财。

translations.sentence: The company made customer satisfaction a top priority.
translations.tran: 公司把客户满意度作为首要任务。

translations.sentence: Despite the difficulties, she managed to finish the project on time.
translations.tran: 尽管困难重重，她还是设法按时完成了这个项目。

translations.sentence: I managed to get a seat on the train.
translations.tran: 我设法在火车上找到了一个座位。

translations.sentence: Many a time I have regretted that decision.
translations.tran: 我曾多次后悔那个决定。

translations.sentence: They are mapping out a new strategy for the business.
translations.tran: 他们正在为这项业务制定一项新战略。

translations.sentence: He helped map out the area for the surveyors.
translations.tran: 他帮助为测量员绘制了这个区域的地图。

translations.sentence: What is your marital status?
translations.tran: 你的婚姻状况是什么？

translations.sentence: The shop marked down all the summer clothes.
translations.tran: 这家商店对所有夏季服装都进行了降价。

translations.sentence: The teacher marked down the student's mistakes.
translations.tran: 老师记下了学生的错误。

translations.sentence: She marked off the items on her shopping list.
translations.tran: 她勾掉了购物清单上的项目。

translations.sentence: The boundary was marked off with a fence.
translations.tran: 边界用栅栏分隔开来。

translations.sentence: The police marked out the crime scene.
translations.tran: 警方标出了犯罪现场。

translations.sentence: The company marked out a new direction for the future.
translations.tran: 公司确定了未来的新方向。

translations.sentence: He was marked out for a promotion.
translations.tran: 他被选中晋升。

translations.sentence: The company is just marking time until the new product launch.
translations.tran: 公司只是在等待新产品发布。

translations.sentence: The shop marked up the price of the goods.
translations.tran: 这家商店提高了商品的价格。

translations.sentence: She is going to marry her college sweetheart.
translations.tran: 她要和她的大学恋人结婚。

translations.sentence: He marshaled his arguments before the debate.
translations.tran: 他在辩论前整理了他的论点。

translations.sentence: The general marshaled his soldiers for the attack.
translations.tran: 将军召集了他的士兵准备进攻。

translations.sCN: 对…感到惊奇；对…感到诧异
translations.sentence: We marvelled at the beauty of the scenery.
translations.tran: 我们对这风景的美丽感到惊叹。

translations.sCN: 对某事感到惊奇；对某事感到诧异
translations.sentence: She marvelled at his ability to speak so many languages.
translations.tran: 她对他说这么多语言的能力感到惊叹。

translations.sentence: Mass observation studies are often used in sociology.
translations.tran: 大众观察研究经常被用于社会学。

translations.sentence: There were masses of people at the concert.
translations.tran: 音乐会有大量的人。

translations.sCN: 大规模的教育宣传活动
translations.sentence: The government launched a massive educational campaign about the dangers of smoking.
translations.tran: 政府发起了一场关于吸烟危害的大规模教育宣传活动。

translations.sentence: The team will match against their rivals next week.
translations.tran: 这支球队下周将与他们的对手比赛。

translations.sentence: The shoes don't match with the dress.
translations.tran: 这双鞋与这条裙子不相配。

translations.sentence: Can you match the candidates with the appropriate jobs?
translations.tran: 你能将候选人与合适的工作匹配起来吗？

translations.sentence: As a matter of fact, I haven't seen her recently.
translations.tran: 事实上，我最近没见过她。

translations.sentence: Since we're here, we may as well start the meeting.
translations.tran: 既然我们在这里，不如开始会议吧。

translations.sentence: When he said he was going to quit, he meant business.
translations.tran: 当他说他要辞职时，他是认真的。

translations.sentence: What do you mean by that?
translations.tran: 你那是什么意思？

translations.sentence: This could mean doing a lot of extra work.
translations.tran: 这可能意味着要做很多额外的工作。

translations.sCN: 意味着做某事；预示着做某事
translations.sentence: This delay means doing the project all over again.
translations.tran: 这次延迟意味着要重新做这个项目。

translations.sentence: I didn't mean to upset you.
translations.tran: 我不想让你难过。

translations.sentence: I didn't mean to break it.
translations.tran: 我不是故意要弄坏它的。

translations.sCN: 打算做某事；想要做某事
translations.sentence: I mean to call her later.
translations.tran: 我打算稍后给她打电话。

translations.sentence: He didn't measure up to their expectations.
translations.tran: 他没有达到他们的期望。

translations.sentence: The new product has to measure up to safety standards.
translations.tran: 新产品必须符合安全标准。

translations.sentence: The lawyer tried to mediate between the two parties.
translations.tran: 律师试图在双方之间进行调解。

translations.sentence: The UN was asked to mediate in the conflict.
translations.tran: 联合国被要求调解这场冲突。

translations.sentence: The government should not mediate in the company's internal affairs.
translations.tran: 政府不应该干预公司的内部事务。

translations.sCN: 满足…的需求；符合…的要求
translations.sentence: The company is struggling to meet the needs of its customers.
translations.tran: 公司正在努力满足客户的需求。

translations.sentence: This program is designed to meet the needs of low-income families.
translations.tran: 该计划旨在满足低收入家庭的需要。

translations.sentence: Let's meet up for coffee later.
translations.tran: 我们稍后再见面喝咖啡吧。

translations.sentence: I'm going to meet up with some friends at the park.
translations.tran: 我准备去公园和一些朋友碰面。

translations.sentence: She met up with some unexpected difficulties.
translations.tran: 她遇到了一些意想不到的困难。

translations.sentence: The proposal met with strong opposition.
translations.tran: 这项提议遇到了强烈的反对。

translations.sentence: The President will meet with the press tomorrow.
translations.tran: 总统明天将接见新闻界。

translations.sentence: The researchers analyzed memory extracts from the subjects.
translations.tran: 研究人员分析了受试者的记忆提取物。

translations.sentence: The bully menaced him with a baseball bat.
translations.tran: 那个恃强凌弱者用棒球棒威胁他。

translations.sentence: The company was menaced with a lawsuit.
translations.tran: 该公司受到了诉讼的威胁。

translations.sentence: The gang menaced the store with violence.
translations.tran: 团伙用暴力威胁这家商店。

translations.sentence: He promised to mend his ways and become a better person.
translations.tran: 他承诺改邪归正，成为一个更好的人。

translations.sentence: It's important to take care of your mental health.
translations.tran: 照顾你的心理健康很重要。

translations.sentence: The new research merits reference.
translations.tran: 这项新研究值得参考。

translations.sentence: We should consider both the merits and faults of the plan.
translations.tran: 我们应该同时考虑这个计划的优点和缺点。

translations.sentence: They were just messing about on the beach.
translations.tran: 他们只是在海滩上闲混。

translations.sentence: Stop messing about with the computer!
translations.tran: 别瞎搞电脑了！

translations.sentence: The kids were messing around in the playground.
translations.tran: 孩子们在操场上闲混。

translations.sentence: Don't mess around with the equipment.
translations.tran: 不要玩弄设备。

translations.sentence: I really messed up the presentation.
translations.tran: 我真的把演示搞砸了。

translations.sentence: Don't mess up my desk!
translations.tran: 别把我的桌子弄乱了！

translations.sentence: Don't mess with me!
translations.tran: 别惹我！

translations.sentence: He was messing with the engine.
translations.tran: 他正在摆弄引擎。

translations.sentence: We might as well go now.
translations.tran: 我们现在不妨走吧。

translations.sentence: Millions of people watched the game.
translations.tran: 数百万人观看了这场比赛。

translations.sentence: Changing your mindset is crucial for success.
translations.tran: 改变你的思维模式对于成功至关重要。

translations.sentence: Mind you, it's a long way to walk.
translations.tran: 请注意，要走很长的路。

translations.sentence: Mind you, I don't agree with this at all.
translations.tran: 记住，我完全不同意这一点。

translations.sentence: Mind you, she's a very talented singer.
translations.tran: 说真的，她是一位非常有才华的歌手。

translations.sentence: Mind your own business, it's none of your concern.
translations.tran: 少管闲事，这与你无关。

translations.sentence: She is majoring in economics and minoring in history.
translations.tran: 她主修经济学，辅修历史。

translations.sentence: Don't miss out on the opportunity to see the show.
translations.tran: 不要错过观看演出的机会。

translations.sentence: I think I've missed out a vital piece of information.
translations.tran: 我想我遗漏了一条重要的信息。

translations.sentence: I mistook him for his brother.
translations.tran: 我把他误认为是他的兄弟。

translations.sentence: I mistook her for her sister.
translations.tran: 我把她误认为是她的妹妹。

translations.sentence: I often mistake the twins for each other.
translations.tran: 我经常把这对双胞胎认错。

translations.sentence: I always mix up the names of those two.
translations.tran: 我总是把那两个人的名字搞混。

translations.sentence: I mixed up the ingredients for the cake.
translations.tran: 我把做蛋糕的配料搞错了。

translations.sentence: Oil doesn't mix with water.
translations.tran: 油不溶于水。

translations.sentence: She doesn't mix with the other students.
translations.tran: 她不和其他学生交往。

translations.sCN: 褒贬不一的反应；毁誉参半的评价
translations.sentence: The new policy received mixed reactions from the public.
translations.tran: 这项新政策受到了公众褒贬不一的评价。

translations.sentence: Don't mock at people because of their appearance.
translations.tran: 不要因为别人的外貌而嘲笑他们。

translations.sentence: They mocked at his ideas.
translations.tran: 他们嘲笑了他的想法。

translations.sentence: This car is modeled after a sports car.
translations.tran: 这款车是仿照跑车设计的。

translations.sentence: Modern living has its conveniences and its drawbacks.
translations.tran: 现代生活有利也有弊。

translations.sentence: The government established a monopoly bureau to regulate the market.
translations.tran: 政府设立了垄断局来监管市场。

translations.sentence: The company has a monopoly of sales in this area.
translations.tran: 该公司拥有该地区的销售垄断权。

translations.sentence: The company was granted a monopoly right.
translations.tran: 该公司被授予垄断权。

translations.sentence: She is mopping the floor.
translations.tran: 她正在拖地。

translations.sentence: We need to mop up the spilled water.
translations.tran: 我们需要擦干洒出来的水。

translations.sentence: The army is now mopping up the remaining rebels.
translations.tran: 军队正在收拾残余的叛军。

translations.sentence: She is becoming more and more beautiful.
translations.tran: 她变得越来越漂亮。

translations.sentence: More often than not, it rains on the weekends.
translations.tran: 周末通常会下雨。

translations.sentence: More often than not, people underestimate the risks.
translations.tran: 人们十有八九会低估风险。

translations.sentence: The job is more or less finished.
translations.tran: 这项工作或多或少已经完成了。

translations.sentence: I spent more or less an hour on the phone.
translations.tran: 我花了大约一个小时在电话上。

translations.sentence: She has more than ten years of experience.
translations.tran: 她有超过十年的经验。

translations.sentence: It's more than just a job.
translations.tran: 这不仅仅是一份工作。

translations.sentence: I need your help more than ever.
translations.tran: 我比以往任何时候都更需要你的帮助。

translations.sentence: He is committed to this project more than ever.
translations.tran: 他空前地致力于这个项目。

translations.sentence: She is more intelligent than I thought.
translations.tran: 她比我想象的更聪明。

translations.sentence: I'd rather watch a movie than read a book.
translations.tran: 我与其看书不如看电影。

translations.sentence: She is more concerned with her career than with relationships.
translations.tran: 比起人际关系，她更关心她的事业。

translations.sentence: Most important of all, you need to be safe.
translations.tran: 最重要的是，你必须安全。

translations.sentence: Most of the students passed the exam.
translations.tran: 大部分学生通过了考试。

translations.sentence: Most of my friends live abroad.
translations.tran: 我的大多数朋友都住在国外。

translations.sentence: The children were moving about the room.
translations.tran: 孩子们在房间里四处走动。

translations.sentence: We had to move around the furniture.
translations.tran: 我们不得不移动家具。

translations.sentence: They decided to move away from the city.
translations.tran: 他们决定搬离这座城市。

translations.sentence: Move away from the fire!
translations.tran: 离火远点！

translations.sentence: We need to move forward with the project.
translations.tran: 我们需要继续推进这个项目。

translations.sentence: The police moved in on the suspects.
translations.tran: 警察对嫌疑人采取了行动。

translations.sentence: The bus is about to move off.
translations.tran: 公共汽车即将出发。

translations.sentence: It's time to move on.
translations.tran: 是时候继续前进了。

translations.sentence: Move on to the next question.
translations.tran: 翻到下一题。

translations.sentence: They decided to move out of the apartment.
translations.tran: 他们决定搬出公寓。

translations.sentence: They decided to move to a new city.
translations.tran: 他们决定搬到一个新城市。

translations.sentence: Now, let's move to the next topic.
translations.tran: 现在，让我们转向下一个话题。

translations.sentence: We are moving towards a solution.
translations.tran: 我们正在朝着解决方案前进。

translations.sentence: He wants to move up in his career.
translations.tran: 他想在他的职业生涯中晋升。

translations.sentence: Can you move up a bit?
translations.tran: 你能往上挪动一点吗？

translations.sentence: The director used a movie close-up to show her expression.
translations.tran: 导演使用电影特写来展现她的表情。

translations.sentence: The movie premiere was a glamorous event.
translations.tran: 电影首映是一个迷人的活动。

translations.sentence: We were invited to the movie premiere.
translations.tran: 我们被邀请参加了电影首映式。

translations.sentence: He is a movie zealot; he knows every detail about classic films.
translations.tran: 他是一个电影狂热爱好者；他知道关于经典电影的每一个细节。

translations.sentence: As a movie zealot, she attends every film festival.
translations.tran: 作为一个电影迷，她参加每一个电影节。

translations.sentence: The soldiers mowed down the enemy.
translations.tran: 士兵们射杀了敌人。

translations.sentence: He mowed down the tall grass in the garden.
translations.tran: 他割掉了花园里高高的草。

translations.sentence: Much as I'd like to help, I'm too busy.
translations.tran: 尽管我很想帮忙，但我太忙了。

translations.sentence: Much as I admire his work, I don't agree with his methods.
translations.tran: 正如我钦佩他的作品，我不同意他的方法。

translations.sentence: He can't afford a car, much less a house.
translations.tran: 他买不起车，更不用说房子了。

translations.sentence: He is much less qualified for the job than his rival.
translations.tran: 他在工作方面远不如他的对手。

translations.sentence: She enjoys reading much more than watching TV.
translations.tran: 她比看电视更喜欢阅读。

translations.sentence: The cost was much more than we expected.
translations.tran: 费用远超过我们的预期。

translations.sentence: The dress is much too expensive for me.
translations.tran: 这件衣服对我来说太贵了。

translations.sentence: I enjoyed the movie much too.
translations.tran: 我也非常喜欢这部电影。

translations.sentence: The new camera has multi-directional focusing.
translations.tran: 这款新相机具有多方向聚焦功能。

translations.sentence: The project requires multi-directional input.
translations.tran: 该项目需要多向输入。

translations.sentence: The curriculum emphasizes multi-level knowledge formation.
translations.tran: 课程强调多层次知识形成。

translations.sentence: The educational approach supports multi-level knowledge formation.
translations.tran: 这种教育方法支持多级知识构建。

translations.sentence: There were multitudes of people at the concert.
translations.tran: 音乐会上有大量的人。

translations.sentence: The problems seemed to present themselves in multitudes of ways.
translations.tran: 这些问题似乎以无数种方式呈现出来。

translations.sentence: The crowd murmured against the decision.
translations.tran: 人群对这个决定表示不满。

translations.sentence: They murmured against the new rules.
translations.tran: 他们暗中对新规表示不满。

translations.sentence: Thank you for your help. My pleasure.
translations.tran: 谢谢你的帮助。不客气。

translations.sentence: I'm happy to assist you. My pleasure.
translations.tran: 我很乐意帮助你。很乐意。

translations.sentence: We need to nail down the details of the contract.
translations.tran: 我们需要敲定合同的细节。

translations.sentence: It's difficult to nail down the cause of the problem.
translations.tran: 很难查明问题的根源。

translations.sentence: He nailed up the boards to close the window.
translations.tran: 他钉上了木板来封住窗户。

translations.sentence: They nailed up the posters on the wall.
translations.tran: 他们在墙上钉上了海报。

translations.sentence: She was named after her grandmother.
translations.tran: 她以她祖母的名字命名。

translations.sentence: The school was named after a famous scientist.
translations.tran: 这所学校以一位著名的科学家的名字命名。

translations.sentence: They named the new product 'Innovate' for its creative features.
translations.tran: 他们用'Innovate'来命名新产品，因其具有创新功能。

translations.sentence: The cat was named 'Whiskers' for its long whiskers.
translations.tran: 这只猫被命名为'Whiskers'，因为它的长胡须。

translations.sentence: That was a narrow escape from disaster.
translations.tran: 那次险些酿成灾难。

translations.sentence: He had a narrow escape from being caught.
translations.tran: 他差点被抓住，真是千钧一发。

translations.sentence: The company is trying to narrow the gap between salaries and productivity.
translations.tran: 公司正在努力缩小工资和生产力之间的差距。

translations.sentence: The initiative aims to narrow the gap between the rich and the poor.
translations.tran: 该倡议旨在弥合贫富差距。

translations.sentence: This plant is native to South America.
translations.tran: 这种植物原产于南美洲。

translations.sentence: The customs are native to the local culture.
translations.tran: 这些习俗源于当地文化。

translations.sentence: The region is known for its natural settings and tourist sites.
translations.tran: 该地区以其自然景观和旅游景点而闻名。

translations.sentence: The tour includes visits to both natural settings and tourist sites.
translations.tran: 这次旅行包括参观自然环境和旅游胜地。

translations.sentence: There's a good restaurant near by.
translations.tran: 附近有一家好吃的餐厅。

translations.sentence: The park is near by.
translations.tran: 公园在附近。

translations.sentence: The station is near to my house.
translations.tran: 车站靠近我的房子。

translations.sentence: The project is drawing near to completion.
translations.tran: 项目接近完成。

translations.sentence: The two runners were neck and neck throughout the race.
translations.tran: 两位跑步者在整个比赛中并驾齐驱。

translations.sentence: The two candidates are neck and neck in the polls.
translations.tran: 两位候选人在民意调查中势均力敌。

translations.sentence: Needless to say, I was very happy.
translations.tran: 不用说，我非常高兴。

translations.sentence: Needless to say, he failed the exam.
translations.tran: 显而易见，他考试不及格。

translations.sentence: He was fired for neglecting his duties.
translations.tran: 他因玩忽职守而被解雇。

translations.sentence: The manager was accused of neglecting his duties.
translations.tran: 经理被指控怠忽职守。

translations.sentence: She neglected her meals and sleep to finish the project.
translations.tran: 她为了完成项目而废寝忘食。

translations.sentence: He neglected his meals and sleep because of the stress.
translations.tran: 他由于压力而忽略了饮食和睡眠。

translations.sentence: They are discussing trade with neighboring countries.
translations.tran: 他们正在与邻国讨论贸易。

translations.sentence: The situation is unstable in the neighboring countries.
translations.tran: 周边国家局势不稳定。

translations.sentence: I don't like coffee, neither does she.
translations.tran: 我不喜欢咖啡，她也不喜欢。

translations.sentence: He didn't go to the party, neither did his friend.
translations.tran: 他没去参加派对，他的朋友也一样。

translations.sentence: Whether he likes it or not is neither here nor there.
translations.tran: 他是否喜欢它无关紧要。

translations.sentence: The details of the story are neither here nor there.
translations.tran: 故事的细节无足轻重。

translations.sentence: Neither rain nor snow stopped the parade.
translations.tran: 雨雪都未能阻止游行。

translations.sentence: Neither of them wanted to go.
translations.tran: 他们俩都不想去。

translations.sentence: Neither she nor I like the movie.
translations.tran: 她和我都不喜欢这部电影。

translations.sentence: He could neither speak nor understand English.
translations.tran: 他既不会说也不会理解英语。

translations.sentence: Neither the teacher nor the students were happy.
translations.tran: 老师和学生都不高兴。

translations.sentence: She could neither swim nor dive.
translations.tran: 她既不会游泳也不会潜水。

translations.sentence: I've never before seen such a beautiful sunset.
translations.tran: 我从未见过如此美丽的日落。

translations.sentence: The situation is never before seen in history.
translations.tran: 这种情况是历史上前所未有的。

translations.sentence: Never mind, it doesn't matter.
translations.tran: 没关系，没关系。

translations.sentence: Never mind the cost, just get it done.
translations.tran: 别介意成本，把它做完就行。

translations.sentence: The news bulletin will be on at six.
translations.tran: 新闻简报将在六点播出。

translations.sentence: We interrupted the program for a news bulletin.
translations.tran: 我们中断了节目播放新闻快报。

translations.sentence: Our neighbors live next door.
translations.tran: 我们的邻居住在隔壁。

translations.sentence: The next door house is for sale.
translations.tran: 隔壁的房子正在出售。

translations.sentence: The book is next to the lamp.
translations.tran: 书在灯旁边。

translations.sentence: He is next to her in terms of experience.
translations.tran: 就经验而言，他仅次于她。

translations.sentence: He stayed up working night after night.
translations.tran: 他夜复一夜地熬夜工作。

translations.sentence: The sound of the waves came night after night.
translations.tran: 海浪声日复一日地传来。

translations.sentence: He worked night and day to finish the project.
translations.tran: 他日日夜夜工作以完成这个项目。

translations.sentence: The factory runs night and day.
translations.tran: 工厂昼夜不停地运转。

translations.sentence: He considered her opinion of no account.
translations.tran: 他认为她的意见毫无价值。

translations.sentence: That information is of no account.
translations.tran: 那个信息不重要。

translations.sentence: All our efforts were of no avail.
translations.tran: 我们所有的努力都无济于事。

translations.sentence: The rescue team searched for hours, but their search was of no avail.
translations.tran: 救援队搜寻了数小时，但他们的搜寻是徒劳无功的。

translations.sentence: I had no choice but to accept the offer.
translations.tran: 我不得不接受这个提议。

translations.sentence: They had no choice but to evacuate the building.
translations.tran: 他们别无选择，只能疏散这座建筑。

translations.sentence: No doubt, he will succeed.
translations.tran: 毫无疑问，他会成功。

translations.sentence: She is, no doubt, the best candidate.
translations.tran: 毫无疑问，她是最好的候选人。

translations.sentence: The problems seemed to have no end.
translations.tran: 这些问题似乎无穷无尽。

translations.sentence: The discussion went on and on, with no end in sight.
translations.tran: 讨论一直持续，看不到尽头。

translations.sentence: There were no fewer than fifty people at the meeting.
translations.tran: 参加会议的人数不少于五十人。

translations.sentence: No fewer than three witnesses saw the incident.
translations.tran: 至少有三名目击者看到了这起事件。

translations.sentence: Please submit your application no later than Friday.
translations.tran: 请不迟于星期五提交您的申请。

translations.sentence: The deadline for registration is no later than October 31st.
translations.tran: 注册的截止日期最迟为10月31日。

translations.sentence: The project cost no less than a million dollars.
translations.tran: 该项目的花费不少于一百万美元。

translations.sentence: She has worked here for no less than ten years.
translations.tran: 她在这里工作了至少十年。

translations.sentence: His performance was no less impressive than hers.
translations.tran: 他的表现不亚于她。

translations.sentence: The impact of the earthquake was no less devastating than that of the tsunami.
translations.tran: 地震的影响与海啸一样具有破坏性。

translations.sentence: She no longer works here.
translations.tran: 她不再在这里工作。

translations.sentence: The company is no longer profitable.
translations.tran: 这家公司不再盈利。

translations.sentence: No matter what happens, I'll be there for you.
translations.tran: 无论发生什么事，我都会在你身边。

translations.sentence: It doesn't matter to me.
translations.tran: 对我来说不重要。

translations.sentence: No matter how difficult it is, we must persevere.
translations.tran: 无论有多困难，我们都必须坚持下去。

translations.sentence: No matter how hard he tries, he can't seem to pass the test.
translations.tran: 无论他多么努力，他似乎都无法通过考试。

translations.sentence: No matter what happens, I'll support you.
translations.tran: 无论发生什么事，我都会支持你。

translations.sentence: No matter what, we'll find a solution.
translations.tran: 不管怎样，我们会找到一个解决方案。

translations.sentence: No matter when you need me, I'll be here.
translations.tran: 无论何时你需要我，我都会在这里。

translations.sentence: No matter when the meeting is, please inform me.
translations.tran: 不管什么时候开会，请通知我。

translations.sentence: No matter where you go, I will follow you.
translations.tran: 无论你去哪里，我都会跟着你。

translations.sentence: No matter where you live, I hope you are happy.
translations.tran: 不管你住在哪里，我都希望你快乐。

translations.sentence: No matter whether it rains or shines, we will go on a picnic.
translations.tran: 无论下雨还是晴天，我们都会去野餐。

translations.sentence: No matter whether they agree or disagree, the decision has been made.
translations.tran: 不管他们是否同意，决定已经做出。

translations.sentence: No matter which one you choose, you'll be satisfied.
translations.tran: 无论你选择哪个，你都会满意。

translations.sentence: No matter which option you take, it will be beneficial.
translations.tran: 不管你选择哪个选项，都会有益。

translations.sentence: No matter who you are, you must follow the rules.
translations.tran: 无论你是谁，你都必须遵守规则。

translations.sentence: No matter who is to blame, we must solve the problem.
translations.tran: 不管是谁的错，我们都必须解决这个问题。

translations.sentence: He has no more friends.
translations.tran: 他不再有朋友。

translations.sentence: She is no more.
translations.tran: 她不复存在了。

translations.sentence: He had no more than five dollars.
translations.tran: 他只有五美元。

translations.sentence: It was no more than a misunderstanding.
translations.tran: 这只不过是一个误会。

translations.sentence: He is no more intelligent than his brother.
translations.tran: 他和他的兄弟一样不聪明。

translations.sentence: She is no more happy than he is.
translations.tran: 她既不快乐，他也不快乐。

translations.sentence: I have no more than five dollars.
translations.tran: 我只有五美元。

translations.sentence: He is no more honest than his brother.
translations.tran: 他和他的兄弟一样不诚实。

translations.sentence: The winner was no other than John.
translations.tran: 获胜者正是约翰。

translations.sentence: Can you help me with this? No problem.
translations.tran: 你能帮我这个忙吗？没问题。

translations.sentence: No sooner had I arrived than it began to rain.
translations.tran: 我刚到就下雨了。

translations.sentence: No sooner had I sat down than the phone rang.
translations.tran: 我刚坐下电话就响了。

translations.sentence: We succeeded, no thanks to his help.
translations.tran: 我们成功了，多亏了没有他的帮助。

translations.sentence: Can you lend me some money? No way!
translations.tran: 你能借我点钱吗？没门！

translations.sentence: No wonder he’s tired, he's been working all day.
translations.tran: 难怪他累了，他工作了一整天。

translations.sentence: He is a nominal chairman and has no real power.
translations.tran: 他是一个名义上的主席，没有真正的权力。

translations.sentence: None but the brave deserve the fair.
translations.tran: 只有勇者才能拥有美人。

translations.sentence: The author was none other than the famous writer.
translations.tran: 作者不是别人，正是那位著名的作家。

translations.sentence: I need none other that the truth.
translations.tran: 我只需要真相，没有其他的。

translations.sentence: The situation was difficult, but we pressed on none the less.
translations.tran: 情况很困难，但我们还是坚持下去了。

translations.sentence: I was none too pleased with his behavior.
translations.tran: 我对他这种行为一点也不高兴。

translations.sentence: She's always nosing about in other people's affairs.
translations.tran: 她总是打听别人的事情。

translations.sentence: I was nosing around the library looking for a book.
translations.tran: 我在图书馆里到处找书。

translations.sentence: The dog nosed out the scent of the food.
translations.tran: 那只狗嗅出了食物的气味。

translations.sentence: He got his nose out of joint when I didn't invite him.
translations.tran: 我没邀请他，他很生气。

translations.sentence: He was nosing round the shop.
translations.tran: 他在到处查看商店。

translations.sentence: He was not a little surprised at the news.
translations.tran: 他对这个消息感到非常惊讶。

translations.sentence: I'm not any longer in contact with him.
translations.tran: 我不再和他联系了。

translations.sentence: She doesn't live here any longer.
translations.tran: 她不再住在这里了。

translations.sentence: I don't want to see him any more.
translations.tran: 我不想再见到他了。

translations.sentence: He doesn't work here any more.
translations.tran: 他不再在这里工作了。

translations.sentence: I'm not any more qualified to do the job than you are.
translations.tran: 我和你一样没有资格做这份工作。

translations.sentence: He is not any more interested in politics than I am.
translations.tran: 他对政治的兴趣和我一样不大。

translations.sentence: This car is not as fast as that one.
translations.tran: 这辆车不如那辆车快。

translations.sentence: She is not as tall as her brother.
translations.tran: 她没有她哥哥那么高。

translations.sentence: He is not as rich as he seems to be.
translations.tran: 他不像看起来那么有钱。

translations.sentence: I'm not at all happy about it.
translations.tran: 我对此一点也不高兴。

translations.sentence: I don't understand it at all.
translations.tran: 我根本不理解它。

translations.sentence: I didn't go, not but that I didn't want to.
translations.tran: 我没有去，并不是因为我不想去。

phrase: not have a leg to stand on

translations.sentence: His argument doesn't have a leg to stand on.
translations.tran: 他的论点站不住脚。

translations.sentence: I'm not in the least surprised.
translations.tran: 我一点也不惊讶。

translations.sentence: I'm not in the slightest bit interested.
translations.tran: 我一点也不感兴趣。

translations.sentence: The holiday was enjoyable, not least because of the weather.
translations.tran: 这次假期很愉快，尤其是因为天气很好。

translations.sentence: I spent not more than $10.
translations.tran: 我花了不超过10美元。

translations.sentence: He is not much of a singer.
translations.tran: 他算不上什么歌手。

translations.sentence: It's not nearly as expensive as I thought.
translations.tran: 它远没有我想象的那么贵。

translations.sentence: He is not only rich but kind.
translations.tran: 他不仅富有而且善良。

translations.sentence: She is not only beautiful but also intelligent.
translations.tran: 她不仅漂亮而且聪明。

translations.sentence: Not only did he lie, but he also cheated.
translations.tran: 他不仅撒谎，而且作弊。

translations.sentence: Not only does he speak English, but he also speaks French.
translations.tran: 他不仅会说英语，还会说法语。

translations.sentence: She is not only intelligent but also very kind.
translations.tran: 她不仅聪明，而且非常善良。

translations.sentence: I didn't do it, not so as to cause trouble.
translations.tran: 我做这件事并不是为了惹麻烦。

translations.sentence: He didn't so much as offer me a cup of tea.
translations.tran: 他甚至没有给我递上一杯茶。

translations.sentence: It's not so much a matter of money as of principle.
translations.tran: 与其说是金钱问题，不如说是原则问题。

translations.sentence: He is not so much a leader as a follower.
translations.tran: 与其说他是一个领导者，不如说他是一个追随者。

translations.sentence: He's not so strong as he looks.
translations.tran: 他不像看起来那么强壮。

translations.sentence: The report, not taking into account the recent data, is outdated.
translations.tran: 这份报告没有考虑到最近的数据，已经过时了。

translations.sentence: I don't think much of his new book.
translations.tran: 我对他的新书评价不高。

translations.sentence: The offer of a free trip is not to be sneezed at.
translations.tran: 免费旅行的提议不容忽视。

translations.sentence: He speaks French, not to mention German.
translations.tran: 他会说法语，更不用说德语了。

translations.sentence: Not until I saw it with my own eyes did I believe it.
translations.tran: 直到我亲眼看到我才相信。

translations.sentence: Note down the important points of the lecture.
translations.tran: 记下讲座的要点。

translations.sentence: It was nothing but a misunderstanding.
translations.tran: 这只不过是一个误会。

translations.sentence: It was nothing else than a childish prank.
translations.tran: 这无非是一个孩子气的恶作剧。

translations.sentence: It's nothing more than a temporary solution.
translations.tran: 这仅仅是一个临时的解决方案。

translations.sentence: I have nothing particular to do today.
translations.tran: 我今天没什么特别的事情要做。

translations.sentence: I noticed him leave the building.
translations.tran: 我注意到他离开了大楼。

translations.sentence: Notwithstanding the difficulties, we will continue.
translations.tran: 尽管有困难，我们仍将继续。

translations.sentence: I don't live here any more.
translations.tran: 我不再住在这里。

translations.sentence: I am not any more happy than you are.
translations.tran: 我也不比你更快乐。

translations.sentence: I'm not tired at all.
translations.tran: 我一点也不累。

translations.sentence: It's not the money but the principle that matters.
translations.tran: 重要的不是钱，而是原则。

translations.sentence: She is not my friend, but my sister.
translations.tran: 她不是我的朋友，而是我的姐妹。

translations.sentence: I'm not interested in it in the slightest.
translations.tran: 我对此一点也不感兴趣。

translations.sentence: He didn't seem to care in the slightest.
translations.tran: 他似乎毫不在意。

translations.sentence: I didn't realize how sick I was until I collapsed.
translations.tran: 直到我晕倒，我才意识到自己病得有多重。

translations.sentence: She didn't leave until after midnight.
translations.tran: 她直到午夜过后才离开。

translations.sentence: Now and again, I meet him at the library.
translations.tran: 我偶尔会在图书馆见到他。

translations.sentence: I still see her now and again.
translations.tran: 我还是会时不时见到她。

translations.sentence: Now and then, I go for a walk in the park.
translations.tran: 我偶尔会去公园散步。

translations.sentence: I have a beer now and then.
translations.tran: 我偶尔喝点啤酒。

translations.sentence: Now that you're here, let's start.
translations.tran: 既然你来了，咱们就开始吧。

translations.sentence: Now that it's raining, we can't go out.
translations.tran: 既然下雨了，我们就不能出去了。

translations.sentence: Now that I have finished, I'll go home.
translations.tran: 既然我完成了，我就回家。

translations.sentence: He is nowhere near as tall as his brother.
translations.tran: 他远没有他哥哥高。

translations.sentence: The project is nowhere near finished.
translations.tran: 这个项目远远没有完成。

translations.sentence: I object to your plan.
translations.tran: 我反对你的计划。

translations.sentence: She objects to working on weekends.
translations.tran: 她反对在周末工作。

translations.sentence: I have no objection to your proposal.
translations.tran: 我对于你的提议没有异议。

translations.sentence: He raised an objection to the new rule.
translations.tran: 他提出了对新规则的异议。

translations.sentence: I observed him leave the house.
translations.tran: 我观察到他离开了房子。

translations.sentence: She observed him cheat on the exam.
translations.tran: 她目睹了他在考试中作弊。

translations.sCN: 观察到某人正在做某事
translations.sentence: I observed her singing.
translations.tran: 我观察到她正在唱歌。

translations.sentence: They observed him working in the garden.
translations.tran: 他们看到他正在花园里干活。

translations.sentence: He was accused of obstructing justice.
translations.tran: 他被控妨碍司法公正。

translations.sentence: The witness tried to obstruct justice.
translations.tran: 证人试图阻碍司法。

translations.sentence: She occupies herself in reading.
translations.tran: 她专心于阅读。

translations.sentence: He occupied himself in writing letters.
translations.tran: 他沉浸于写信之中。

translations.sentence: He occupied himself with the problem.
translations.tran: 他专注于这个问题。

translations.sentence: She occupied herself with her work.
translations.tran: 她忙于她的工作。

translations.sentence: It occurred to me that I had forgotten my keys.
translations.tran: 我突然想起我忘了带钥匙。

translations.sentence: The idea suddenly occurred to me.
translations.tran: 这个想法突然出现在我的脑海里。

translations.sentence: I need to get rid of all the odds and ends in my room.
translations.tran: 我需要清理我房间里所有的零碎东西。

translations.sentence: She kept all the odds and ends in a box.
translations.tran: 她把所有零星杂物都放在一个盒子里。

translations.sentence: These are all of a kind.
translations.tran: 这些都是同类的。

translations.sentence: They are of a kind, aren't they?
translations.tran: 他们属于一种，不是吗？

translations.sentence: He is a writer of a sort.
translations.tran: 他勉强算是个作家。

translations.sentence: They are friends of a sort.
translations.tran: 他们是某种程度的朋友。

translations.sentence: This is the best movie of all time.
translations.tran: 这是有史以来最好的电影。

translations.sentence: He is one of the greatest singers of all time.
translations.tran: 他是有史以来最伟大的歌手之一。

translations.sentence: Of course, I'll help you.
translations.tran: 当然，我会帮助你。

translations.sentence: Thank you for your help. - Of course.
translations.tran: 谢谢你的帮助。- 不用谢。

translations.sentence: Do you want to go? - Of course not!
translations.tran: 你想去吗？- 当然不！

translations.sentence: The matter is of importance.
translations.tran: 这件事很重要。

translations.sentence: The problem will resolve of itself.
translations.tran: 这个问题会自然而然地解决。

translations.sentence: Failure is of necessity.
translations.tran: 失败是不可避免的。

translations.sentence: His opinion is of no account.
translations.tran: 他的意见无关紧要。

translations.sentence: All our efforts were of no avail.
translations.tran: 我们所有的努力都无济于事。

translations.sentence: The medicine was of no effect.
translations.tran: 这种药没有效果。

translations.sentence: This is a house of my own.
translations.tran: 这是我自己的房子。

translations.sentence: He left of his own accord.
translations.tran: 他自愿离开的。

translations.sentence: The restaurant is of a sort I don't really enjoy.
translations.tran: 这家餐厅是某种我不太喜欢的类型。

translations.sentence: He is a writer of sorts.
translations.tran: 他算是个作家。

translations.sCN: 至关重要的，必不可少的
translations.sentence: Patience is of the essence.
translations.tran: 耐心是至关重要的。

translations.sentence: It's the problem of the moment.
translations.tran: 这是眼下的问题。

translations.sentence: Going there is out of the question.
translations.tran: 去那里是不可能的。

translations.sentence: It rained off and on all day.
translations.tran: 雨断断续续地下了一整天。

translations.sentence: He was knocked off balance.
translations.tran: 他被打得失去了平衡。

translations.sentence: The news left her off balance.
translations.tran: 这个消息让她心神不定。

translations.sentence: The police officer was off duty.
translations.tran: 这位警官下班了。

translations.sCN: 毫无戒备地，猝不及防地
translations.sentence: The sudden question caught him off guard.
translations.tran: 这个突如其来的问题让他猝不及防。

translations.sentence: Don't let your guard down; you should never be off your guard.
translations.tran: 不要放松警惕；你永远不该掉以轻心。

translations.sentence: The radio station went off the air at midnight.
translations.tran: 这家电台在午夜停播了。

translations.sentence: The program was taken off the air due to technical difficulties.
translations.tran: 由于技术问题，该节目中断了广播。

translations.sentence: The speaker gave an off-the-cuff speech.
translations.tran: 演讲者做了一次即兴演讲。

translations.sentence: I didn't have time to prepare, so I answered off the cuff.
translations.tran: 我没有时间准备，所以我脱口而出地回答了。

translations.sentence: I'm glad I'm off the hook.
translations.tran: 我很高兴我摆脱了困境。

translations.sentence: He was let off the hook for the crime.
translations.tran: 他因为那项罪行而免于处罚。

translations.sentence: The information was given off the record.
translations.tran: 这些信息是非公开提供的。

translations.sentence: He told me, off the record, that he was leaving.
translations.tran: 他私下告诉我他要离开了。

translations.sentence: The discussion went off the track.
translations.tran: 讨论跑题了。

translations.sentence: The investigation is off the track.
translations.tran: 调查脱离了主题。

translations.sentence: He offered a bribe to the official.
translations.tran: 他向官员行贿。

translations.sentence: The company was accused of offering a bribe.
translations.tran: 该公司被指控行贿。

translations.sentence: The committee offered proposals for improving the system.
translations.tran: 委员会提出了关于改进该系统的建议。

translations.sentence: They offered proposals for solving the problem.
translations.tran: 他们为解决这个问题提供了建议。

translations.sentence: The consultant offered proposals of different marketing strategies.
translations.tran: 顾问提供了关于不同营销策略的建议。

translations.sentence: The company offered proposals of new investments.
translations.tran: 该公司提供了新的投资方案。

translations.sentence: They offered their property as a guarantee.
translations.tran: 他们以他们的财产作为担保。

translations.sentence: He offered his signature as a guarantee.
translations.tran: 他以他的签名作为保证。

translations.sentence: The country has large oil reserves.
translations.tran: 这个国家有大量的石油储量。

translations.sentence: The size of the oil reserves is important.
translations.tran: 石油储藏的规模很重要。

translations.sentence: He omitted mentioning his previous experience.
translations.tran: 他省略了提及他之前的经验。

translations.sentence: Please omit adding salt to the recipe.
translations.tran: 请省略在食谱中加入盐。

translations.sentence: He omitted to mention the cost.
translations.tran: 他省略了提及成本。

translations.sentence: She omitted to lock the door.
translations.tran: 她忘记锁门了。

translations.sentence: I will go to the cinema on Saturday.
translations.tran: 我星期六会去看电影。

translations.sentence: The meeting is scheduled on Saturday.
translations.tran: 会议安排在星期六。

translations.sentence: The game will be on TV.
translations.tran: 比赛将在电视上播出。

translations.sentence: The advertisement was shown on TV.
translations.tran: 广告在电视上播放了。

translations.sentence: We are traveling on a budget.
translations.tran: 我们正在预算范围内旅行。

translations.sentence: The project was completed on a budget.
translations.tran: 该项目在预算内完成。

translations.sentence: She's on a diet.
translations.tran: 她正在节食。

translations.sentence: I am on a diet to lose weight.
translations.tran: 我正在控制饮食以减肥。

translations.sentence: He turned his car around on a dime.
translations.tran: 他迅速地把车转了过来。

translations.sentence: She can't change her mind on a dime.
translations.tran: 她不能马上改变主意。

translations.sentence: They are investing on a large scale.
translations.tran: 他们正在大规模投资。

translations.sentence: The project will be implemented on a large scale.
translations.tran: 该项目将大规模实施。

translations.sentence: They are conducting the research on a large scale.
translations.tran: 他们正在大规模地进行这项研究。

translations.sentence: The house is on a level with the road.
translations.tran: 房子与道路齐平。

translations.sentence: He is on a level with his peers.
translations.tran: 他与他的同龄人处于同等水平。

translations.sentence: The situation is changing on a minute-by-minute basis.
translations.tran: 情况正在每分钟发生变化。

translations.sCN: 在全国范围内，以国家规模
translations.sentence: The project will be implemented on a national scale.
translations.tran: 该项目将在全国范围内实施。

translations.sentence: We started the business on a small scale.
translations.tran: 我们开始这项业务的规模很小。

translations.sCN: 在访问…期间，在参观…期间
translations.sentence: On a visit to Paris, I saw the Eiffel Tower.
translations.tran: 在巴黎访问期间，我看到了埃菲尔铁塔。

translations.sentence: We often buy goods on account from this supplier.
translations.tran: 我们经常从这个供应商那里赊账购买商品。

translations.sentence: He was absent on account of illness.
translations.tran: 他因病缺席。

translations.sCN: （该短语有误，请使用 on all accounts）
translations.sentence: （该短语有误，请使用 on all accounts）
translations.tran: （该短语有误，请使用 on all accounts）

translations.sCN: 无论如何，考虑到所有因素
translations.sentence: On all accounts, it was a successful meeting.
translations.tran: 无论如何，那都是一次成功的会议。

translations.sentence: The baby was crawling on all fours.
translations.tran: 婴儿四肢着地爬行。

translations.sentence: We spend on an average $50 a day.
translations.tran: 我们平均每天花费50美元。

translations.sCN: 在国际范围内，以国际规模
translations.sentence: The event was covered on an international scale.
translations.tran: 这次活动以国际规模进行报道。

translations.sentence: It rained on and off all day.
translations.tran: 雨断断续续地下了一整天。

translations.sentence: The discussion went on and on.
translations.tran: 讨论继续不断地进行。

translations.sentence: You must not open that door on any account.
translations.tran: 你无论如何都不能打开那扇门。

translations.sentence: The goods are sent on approval.
translations.tran: 货物以试用形式发送。

translations.sentence: On average, people sleep for eight hours a night.
translations.tran: 平均而言，人们每晚睡八个小时。

translations.sentence: They are working on a global scale.
translations.tran: 他们正在以全球规模开展工作。

translations.sentence: On balance, it was a good decision.
translations.tran: 总的来说，这是一个好的决定。

translations.sentence: I am speaking on behalf of the company.
translations.tran: 我代表公司发言。

translations.sentence: The passengers are on board.
translations.tran: 乘客们在船上/飞机上。

translations.sentence: We need to get more people on board with the project.
translations.tran: 我们需要让更多人参与到这个项目中。

translations.sentence: She's away on business this week.
translations.tran: 她这周出差了。

translations.sentence: They conduct a lot of business on the internet.
translations.tran: 他们在互联网上做了很多生意。

translations.sentence: There are several cafes on campus.
translations.tran: 校园里有几家咖啡馆。

translations.sentence: He was released on condition of good behavior.
translations.tran: 他被释放的条件是表现良好。

translations.sentence: I will lend you the money on condition that you pay me back next month.
translations.tran: 如果下个月你还我钱，我就借给你。

translations.sentence: He would agree on condition that if his demands were met, he would agree.
translations.tran: 他会同意的条件是，如果他的要求得到满足，他就会同意。

translations.sentence: You will be informed on contact.
translations.tran: 一经联系，你将会被告知。

translations.sentence: This chemical is dangerous on contact with water.
translations.tran: 这种化学物质一旦接触到水，就很危险。

translations.sentence: We can't buy anything on credit.
translations.tran: 我们不能赊购任何东西。

translations.sentence: The actors came on stage on cue.
translations.tran: 演员们准时上台。

translations.sentence: The service is available on demand.
translations.tran: 这项服务可按需提供。

translations.sentence: The paintings are on display in the gallery.
translations.tran: 这些画在画廊展出。

translations.sentence: The doctor is on duty today.
translations.tran: 医生今天值班。

translations.sentence: What on earth are you doing?
translations.tran: 你到底在干什么？

translations.sentence: The long wait had her on edge.
translations.tran: 长时间的等待让她很紧张。

translations.sentence: She worked for ten hours on end.
translations.tran: 她连续工作了十个小时。

translations.sentence: They negotiated on equal terms.
translations.tran: 他们在平等条件下谈判。

translations.sCN: 在各种情况下，无论如何
translations.sentence: We must avoid any risk on every account.
translations.tran: 无论如何，我们必须避免任何风险。

translations.sentence: I accepted his explanation on faith.
translations.tran: 我凭着信任接受了他的解释。

translations.sentence: Your application is on file.
translations.tran: 你的申请已存档。

translations.sentence: The house is on fire.
translations.tran: 房子着火了。

translations.sentence: The team was on fire after winning the championship.
translations.tran: 球队在赢得冠军后非常兴奋。

translations.sentence: I usually go to work on foot.
translations.tran: 我通常步行去上班。

translations.sentence: They decided to explore the city on foot.
translations.tran: 他们决定步行探索这座城市。

translations.sentence: She is on good terms with her colleagues.
translations.tran: 她和她的同事们关系很好。

translations.sentence: They remained on good terms with each other even after the divorce.
translations.tran: 即使离婚后，他们仍然保持着良好的关系。

translations.sentence: He was fired on grounds of misconduct.
translations.tran: 他因行为不端而被解雇。

translations.sentence: The company refused the application on grounds of lack of experience.
translations.tran: 该公司以缺乏经验为由拒绝了申请。

translations.sentence: The soldiers were on guard at the gate.
translations.tran: 士兵们在门口站岗。

translations.sentence: Be on guard against scams.
translations.tran: 提防骗局。

translations.sentence: I need to have a first-aid kit on hand.
translations.tran: 我需要有一个急救箱在手边。

translations.sentence: There will be doctors on hand in case of emergency.
translations.tran: 将有医生在场以防紧急情况。

translations.sentence: She's on holiday in Italy.
translations.tran: 她正在意大利度假。

translations.sentence: Most of the staff are on holiday.
translations.tran: 大多数员工都在休假。

translations.sentence: I bought it on impulse.
translations.tran: 我一时冲动买下了它。

translations.sentence: He went to the movies on impulse.
translations.tran: 他心血来潮去看电影了。

translations.sentence: She acted on impulse of fear.
translations.tran: 她在恐惧的冲动下采取了行动。

translations.sentence: She knew it on instinct.
translations.tran: 她凭直觉知道。

translations.sentence: The cat hunts on instinct.

translations.sentence: The new product is available on line.
