translations.tran: 他编造了一个故事来解释他迟到的原因。

translations.sentence: People think well of her.
translations.tran: 人们对她评价很高。

translations.sentence: I think well of your suggestion.
translations.tran: 我认为你的建议很好。

translations.sentence: He thirsted after fame and fortune.
translations.tran: 他渴望名利。

translations.sentence: Many young people thirst after success.
translations.tran: 许多年轻人追求成功。

translations.sentence: She has a thirst for knowledge.
translations.tran: 她渴望知识。

translations.sentence: His thirst for power led him to make many mistakes.
translations.tran: 他对权力的渴望导致他犯了许多错误。

translations.sentence: Thousands of people attended the concert.
translations.tran: 成千上万的人参加了音乐会。

translations.sentence: There were thousands of stars in the sky.
translations.tran: 天上有数千颗星星。

translations.sentence: We need to thrash out the details of the contract.
translations.tran: 我们需要彻底讨论合同的细节。

translations.sentence: Let's thrash out these problems.
translations.tran: 让我们商讨解决这些问题。

translations.sentence: He takes the medicine three times a day.
translations.tran: 他一天吃三次药。

translations.sentence: You should brush your teeth three times a day.
translations.tran: 你应该每天刷三次牙。

translations.sentence: He is a gentleman through and through.
translations.tran: 他是个彻头彻尾的绅士。

translations.sentence: She was soaked through and through.
translations.tran: 她全身都湿透了。

translations.sCN: 通过…的作用；凭借…的力量
translations.sentence: The forest was destroyed through the agency of fire.
translations.tran: 森林毁于火灾。

translations.sentence: He achieved success through the agency of his hard work.
translations.tran: 他凭借他的努力工作取得了成功。

translations.sentence: They have been together through thick and thin.
translations.tran: 他们同甘共苦。

translations.sentence: He has supported her through thick and thin.
translations.tran: 他一直支持她，无论遇到什么。

translations.sentence: This discovery throws a light on the causes of the disease.
translations.tran: 这项发现阐明了这种疾病的病因。

translations.sentence: The investigation throws a light on the corruption.
translations.tran: 调查揭示了腐败。

translations.sentence: The new evidence threw a light upon the case.
translations.tran: 新的证据阐明了这起案件。

translations.sentence: The research throws a light upon the problem.
translations.tran: 这项研究阐明了这个问题。

translations.sentence: He throws his money about.
translations.tran: 他挥霍他的钱。

translations.sentence: They throw clothes about the room.
translations.tran: 他们在房间里乱扔衣服。

translations.sentence: He throws money around like it's nothing.
translations.tran: 他挥霍钱财，好像那根本算不了什么。

translations.sentence: Don't throw big words around unless you know what they mean.
translations.tran: 除非你知道这些大词是什么意思，否则不要随便使用。

translations.sentence: Don't throw away your old clothes.
translations.tran: 不要扔掉你的旧衣服。

translations.sentence: He threw away his chance of success.
translations.tran: 他浪费了成功的机会。

translations.sentence: The new evidence throws doubt upon the suspect's alibi.
translations.tran: 新证据使嫌疑人的不在场证明受到质疑。

translations.sentence: His behavior threw doubt upon his honesty.
translations.tran: 他的行为让人对他是否诚实产生了怀疑。

translations.sentence: They threw in a free dessert with the meal.
translations.tran: 他们随餐附赠了一份免费甜点。

translations.sentence: I decided to throw in my support for the project.
translations.tran: 我决定加入并支持这个项目。

translations.sentence: The investigation threw light on the cause of the accident.
translations.tran: 调查阐明了事故的原因。

translations.sentence: The discovery of new evidence throws light on the mystery.
translations.tran: 新证据的发现使这个谜团更加清楚。

translations.sentence: The professor's lecture threw light on the complex topic.
translations.tran: 教授的讲座阐明了这个复杂的话题。

translations.sentence: This research will throw light on the reasons for the decline.
translations.tran: 这项研究将阐明衰落的原因。

translations.sentence: The archaeological findings threw light upon ancient civilizations.
translations.tran: 考古发现阐明了古代文明。

translations.sentence: The witness's testimony threw light upon the situation.
translations.tran: 证人的证词使情况更加清楚。

phrase: throw my mind back to sth.

translations.sentence: The smell of the bakery threw my mind back to my childhood.
translations.tran: 面包店的香味使我回想起我的童年。

translations.sentence: That song always throws my mind back to my college days.
translations.tran: 那首歌总是让我回忆起我的大学时代。

translations.sentence: He tried to throw off the attacker.
translations.tran: 他试图甩掉袭击者。

translations.sentence: She tried to throw off her coat.
translations.tran: 她试图脱掉外套。

translations.sentence: The thief tried to throw off the police.
translations.tran: 小偷试图蒙蔽警察。

translations.sentence: He throws his weight about in the office.
translations.tran: 他在办公室里摆架子。

translations.sentence: The new manager tends to throw his weight about.
translations.tran: 新经理倾向于仗势欺人。

translations.sentence: He's always throwing his weight around.
translations.tran: 他总是摆架子。

translations.sentence: The boss likes to throw his weight around.
translations.tran: 老板喜欢仗势欺人。

translations.sentence: She threw herself on the bed.
translations.tran: 她扑到床上。

translations.sentence: He threw himself on the mercy of the court.
translations.tran: 他依赖于法庭的怜悯。

translations.sentence: They threw out the old furniture.
translations.tran: 他们扔掉了旧家具。

translations.sentence: The referee threw him out of the game.
translations.tran: 裁判把他驱逐出比赛。

translations.sentence: He threw out the idea of a new project.
translations.tran: 他提出了一个新项目的想法。

translations.sentence: He threw over his old car for a new one.
translations.tran: 他为了新车抛弃了他的旧车。

translations.sentence: She threw over her boyfriend.
translations.tran: 她甩掉了她的男朋友。

translations.sentence: The storm threw the city into disorder.
translations.tran: 风暴使这座城市陷入混乱。

translations.sentence: The children threw the toys into disorder.
translations.tran: 孩子们把玩具弄乱了。

translations.sentence: He threw up after the roller coaster ride.
translations.tran: 他在坐过山车后呕吐了。

translations.sentence: They threw up a temporary shelter.
translations.tran: 他们建造了一个临时住所。

translations.sentence: He threw up his job in protest.
translations.tran: 他辞职以示抗议。

translations.sentence: He thrust at the enemy with his sword.
translations.tran: 他用剑刺向敌人。

translations.sentence: She thrust at the door.
translations.tran: 她猛推门。

translations.sentence: The committee thumbed down the proposal.
translations.tran: 委员会否决了这项提议。

translations.sentence: He thumbed down the offer.
translations.tran: 他拒绝了这份提议。

translations.sentence: She thumbed through the magazine.
translations.tran: 她翻阅了杂志。

translations.sentence: He thumbed through the documents looking for the key information.
translations.tran: 他快速浏览了文件，寻找关键信息。

translations.sentence: The bad weather thwarted their plans.
translations.tran: 恶劣的天气阻挠了他们的计划。

translations.sentence: The opposition tried to thwart our plans.
translations.tran: 反对派试图破坏我们的计划。

translations.sentence: The clock is ticking away.
translations.tran: 时钟滴答作响。

translations.sentence: The days ticked away slowly.
translations.tran: 日子慢慢地流逝。

translations.sentence: The years ticked by quickly.
translations.tran: 岁月流逝得很快。

translations.sentence: As the hours ticked by, they grew more nervous.
translations.tran: 随着时间的流逝，他们变得越来越紧张。

translations.sentence: Could you lend me some money to tide me over until payday?
translations.tran: 你能借我点钱吗，等发薪日再还？

translations.sentence: The government offered financial aid to tide over the struggling businesses.
translations.tran: 政府提供了财政援助，以帮助那些陷入困境的企业渡过难关。

translations.sentence: Please tidy your toys away before dinner.
translations.tran: 晚饭前请把你的玩具收拾好。

translations.sentence: She tidied away the books after she finished reading.
translations.tran: 她看完书后把书整理好收起来了。

translations.sentence: I need to tidy up my desk.
translations.tran: 我需要整理一下我的桌子。

translations.sentence: Let's tidy up the house before the guests arrive.
translations.tran: 在客人到来之前，我们来把房子收拾一下。

translations.sentence: The sailors tied the boat down to the dock.
translations.tran: 水手们把船系在码头上。

translations.sentence: He felt tied down by his responsibilities.
translations.tran: 他感到被他的责任所束缚。

translations.sentence: The agreement ties down the company to certain conditions.
translations.tran: 协议将公司限制在某些条件下。

translations.sentence: The new project ties in with the company's long-term goals.
translations.tran: 新项目与公司的长期目标联系起来。

translations.sentence: This design ties in with the overall theme.
translations.tran: 这个设计与整体主题结合起来了。

translations.sentence: They tied up the package with a ribbon.
translations.tran: 他们用丝带把包裹系起来。

translations.sentence: The project will tie up a lot of our resources.
translations.tran: 这个项目将占用我们大量的资源。

translations.sentence: The traffic accident tied up the road for hours.
translations.tran: 交通事故使道路堵塞了好几个小时。

translations.sentence: The government decided to tighten up the regulations.
translations.tran: 政府决定收紧规章制度。

translations.sentence: We need to tighten up our security measures.
translations.tran: 我们需要加强我们的安全措施。

translations.sentence: I haven't received any reply till now.
translations.tran: 直到现在我还没有收到任何回复。

translations.sentence: She has always been a good student till now.
translations.tran: 她至今一直是个好学生。

translations.sentence: He made the same mistake time after time.
translations.tran: 他一次又一次地犯同样的错误。

translations.sentence: Time after time, she proved her dedication.
translations.tran: 她屡次证明了自己的奉献精神。

translations.sentence: I told him time and again not to do that.
translations.tran: 我一次又一次地告诉他不要那样做。

translations.sentence: She warned him time and again about the dangers.
translations.tran: 她再三警告他有关危险。

translations.sentence: The referee called for a time out.
translations.tran: 裁判叫了暂停。

translations.sentence: The child was sent to time out for misbehaving.
translations.tran: 这个孩子因为行为不端而被罚去反省。

translations.sentence: Someone tipped off the police about the robbery.
translations.tran: 有人向警方透露了抢劫案的消息。

translations.sentence: He tipped me off about the upcoming sale.
translations.tran: 他向我通风报信即将到来的促销活动。

translations.sentence: The long hike really tired us out.
translations.tran: 漫长的徒步旅行让我们非常疲倦。

translations.sentence: Working all day tires him out.
translations.tran: 整天工作让他筋疲力尽。

translations.sentence: The kids' constant demands tired me out.
translations.tran: 孩子们不断的要求让我感到疲倦。

translations.sentence: This work will tire you out.
translations.tran: 这项工作会让你筋疲力尽。

translations.sentence: I'm tired of this routine.
translations.tran: 我厌倦了这种例行公事。

translations.sentence: She is tired of the same old arguments.
translations.tran: 她厌倦了那些老生常谈的争论。

translations.sentence: He was, to a certain degree, responsible for the mistake.
translations.tran: 在某种程度上，他对这个错误负有责任。

translations.sentence: The situation is improving, to a certain degree.
translations.tran: 情况正在改善，在一定程度上。

translations.sentence: To a certain extent, I agree with you.
translations.tran: 在某种程度上，我同意你的看法。

translations.sentence: The success was, to a certain extent, due to luck.
translations.tran: 成功在一定程度上是由于运气。

translations.sentence: The project is expected to be completed to a day.
translations.tran: 预计该项目将精确到天完成。

translations.sentence: The estimate was accurate to a day.
translations.tran: 估计精确到天。

translations.sentence: The success of the project was, to a large extent, due to her efforts.
translations.tran: 该项目的成功在很大程度上归功于她的努力。

translations.sentence: The economy is, to a large extent, driven by consumer spending.
translations.tran: 经济在很大程度上受消费者支出的驱动。

translations.sentence: She used her skills to advantage in the project.
translations.tran: 她在项目中充分利用了她的技能。

translations.sentence: He is always trying to take things to his own advantage.
translations.tran: 他总想占便宜。

translations.sentence: To all appearances, he was a successful businessman.
translations.tran: 从表面上看，他是一位成功的商人。

translations.sentence: To all appearances, everything was going well.
translations.tran: 似乎一切进展顺利。

translations.sentence: To all intents, the agreement was already in effect.
translations.tran: 在所有意图上，该协议已经生效。

translations.sCN: 实际上，事实上，在实质上
translations.sentence: To all intents and purposes, the meeting was a failure.
translations.tran: 实际上，这次会议失败了。

translations.sentence: He is, to all intents and purposes, the leader of the group.
translations.tran: 从各方面来说，他是这个团队的领导者。

translations.sentence: She walked to and fro, deep in thought.
translations.tran: 她来回走动，陷入沉思。

translations.sentence: The train moved to and fro along the track.
translations.tran: 火车沿着轨道来回行驶。

translations.sentence: He proved to be equal to the challenge.
translations.tran: 他证明自己能够胜任挑战。

translations.sentence: No one could be equal to her in her field.
translations.tran: 没有人能在她的领域里比得上她。

translations.sentence: To be frank, I didn't like the movie.
translations.tran: 坦白地说，我不喜欢这部电影。

translations.sentence: To be honest, I'm not sure what to do.
translations.tran: 说实话，我不知道该怎么做。

phrase: to be on the safe side

translations.sCN: 为了安全起见，以防万一
translations.sentence: To be on the safe side, bring an umbrella.
translations.tran: 为了安全起见，带一把雨伞。

translations.sentence: To be on the safe side, he made two copies of the document.
translations.tran: 为了谨慎起见，他做了这份文件的两份副本。

translations.sentence: To be sure, it's a difficult situation.
translations.tran: 当然，这是一个困难的情况。

translations.sentence: To be sure, he is the best candidate.
translations.tran: 毫无疑问，他是最佳人选。

translations.sentence: To begin with, let's review the agenda.
translations.tran: 首先，让我们回顾一下议程。

translations.sentence: To begin with, the plan seemed impossible.
translations.tran: 一开始，这个计划似乎是不可能的。

phrase: to believe sth. to be the result of

translations.sentence: I believe his success to be the result of hard work.
translations.tran: 我认为他的成功是努力工作的结果。

translations.sentence: The doctor cautioned against smoking.
translations.tran: 医生警告不要吸烟。

translations.sentence: He cautioned against taking the risk.
translations.tran: 他告诫提防承担风险。

translations.sentence: The discussion centered around the new policy.
translations.tran: 讨论围绕着新政策展开。

translations.sentence: The plot of the movie centers around a robbery.
translations.tran: 这部电影的情节集中于一次抢劫。

translations.sentence: The project has cost $1 million to date.
translations.tran: 到目前为止，这个项目已经花费了100万美元。

translations.sentence: They went on a date last night.
translations.tran: 他们昨晚去约会了。

translations.sentence: He was bored to death.
translations.tran: 他无聊死了。

translations.sentence: She was frightened to death.
translations.tran: 她吓坏了。

translations.sentence: What has this got to do with me?
translations.tran: 这与我有什么关系？

translations.sentence: She asked me what I wanted to do with my life.
translations.tran: 她问我想做什么。

translations.sentence: He drank to excess.
translations.tran: 他饮酒过量。

translations.sentence: Don't eat to excess.
translations.tran: 不要吃过量。

translations.sentence: The concert is to go in an hour.
translations.tran: 音乐会一小时后就要开始了。

translations.sentence: The discussion is to go on until evening.
translations.tran: 讨论将持续到晚上。

translations.sentence: She has knowledge of the local customs.
translations.tran: 她了解当地的风俗。

translations.sentence: He has knowledge of several foreign languages.
translations.tran: 他掌握几种外语的知识。

translations.sentence: We have met socially before.
translations.tran: 我们以前在社交场合见过面。

translations.sentence: They have met socially, but they aren't close friends.
translations.tran: 他们有私下交往，但不是亲密的朋友。

translations.sentence: To hell with the consequences, I'm going to do it!
translations.tran: 不管后果如何，我都要去做！

translations.sentence: To hell with their rules, we'll do it our way.
translations.tran: 他们的规矩见鬼去吧，我们要按自己的方式去做。

translations.sentence: To my mind, this is the best solution.
translations.tran: 依我看来，这是最好的解决方案。

translations.sentence: We tried to persuade him, but to no avail.
translations.tran: 我们试图说服他，但无济于事。

translations.sentence: The medicine was administered, but to no effect.
translations.tran: 药物被使用了，但没有效果。

translations.sCN: 对某人有利；对某人有好处
translations.sentence: We structured the deal to our advantage.
translations.tran: 我们把交易结构设计得对我们有利。

translations.sentence: To her amazement, he agreed.
translations.tran: 令她惊讶的是，他同意了。

translations.sCN: 值得赞扬的是；应该归功于
translations.sentence: To his credit, he admitted his mistake.
translations.tran: 值得赞扬的是，他承认了自己的错误。

translations.sentence: To their delight, the weather cleared up.
translations.tran: 令他们高兴的是，天气晴朗了。

translations.sentence: To my disappointment, I didn't get the job.
translations.tran: 令我失望的是，我没有得到这份工作。

translations.sentence: She ate chocolate to her heart's content.
translations.tran: 她尽情地吃着巧克力。

translations.sentence: To my joy, my package arrived.
translations.tran: 令我高兴的是，我的包裹到了。

translations.sentence: To my knowledge, he hasn't been informed.
translations.tran: 据我所知，他还没有被告知。

translations.sentence: To my regret, I missed the meeting.
translations.tran: 令人遗憾的是，我错过了会议。

translations.sentence: To my relief, the exam was easy.
translations.tran: 令我感到宽慰的是，考试很简单。

translations.sentence: To her sorrow, she lost her keys.
translations.tran: 令人悲伤的是，她丢了钥匙。

translations.sentence: To my surprise, she agreed with me.
translations.tran: 令我惊讶的是，她同意我的观点。

translations.sCN: 合某人的口味；符合某人的喜好
translations.sentence: This music is not to my taste.
translations.tran: 这种音乐不合我的口味。

translations.sentence: She cooked the steak to perfection.
translations.tran: 她把牛排做得完美。

translations.sentence: To put it in a nutshell, we're broke.
translations.tran: 简而言之，我们破产了。

translations.sentence: He can speak French, to say nothing of German.
translations.tran: 他会说法语，更不用说德语了。

translations.sCN: 至少可以说；往轻了说；保守地说
translations.sentence: It was a difficult situation, to say the least.
translations.tran: 往轻了说，那是一个困难的处境。

translations.sCN: 毫不夸张地说；一点也不夸张
translations.sentence: Her performance was outstanding, to say the least.
translations.tran: 毫不夸张地说，她的表现非常出色。

translations.sentence: To my amazement, he agreed to help.
translations.tran: 令我惊讶的是，他同意帮忙了。

translations.sentence: To her delight, she won the competition.
translations.tran: 令她高兴的是，她赢得了比赛。

translations.sentence: To his disappointment, the project was cancelled.
translations.tran: 令他失望的是，这个项目被取消了。

translations.sentence: To my sorrow, I lost my keys.
translations.tran: 令我悲伤的是，我把钥匙弄丢了。

translations.sentence: To our surprise, they arrived early.
translations.tran: 令我们惊讶的是，他们提前到达了。

translations.sCN: 值得某人称赞的是；归功于某人
translations.sentence: To his credit, he admitted his mistake.
translations.tran: 值得称赞的是，他承认了自己的错误。

translations.sCN: 在某种程度上；在一定程度上
translations.sentence: I agree with you to some degree.
translations.tran: 我在某种程度上同意你的观点。

translations.sCN: 在某种程度上；在一定程度上
translations.sentence: The success of the project depends to some extent on your cooperation.
translations.tran: 这个项目的成功在某种程度上取决于你的合作。

translations.sentence: I don't have any time to spare.
translations.tran: 我没有时间可以抽出。

translations.sentence: We have food to spare.
translations.tran: 我们有剩余的食物。

translations.sentence: There was nothing to speak of.
translations.tran: 没有什么可谈的。

translations.sentence: Can you split the pizza in half?
translations.tran: 你能把披萨分成两半吗？

translations.tran: 订单被立即处理了。

translations.sentence: He solved the problem with ease.
translations.tran: 他轻而易举地解决了这个问题。

translations.sentence: She navigated the system with ease.
translations.tran: 她轻松地操作了系统。

translations.sentence: With everybody agreeing, the plan was approved.
translations.tran: 在所有人都同意的情况下，该计划被批准了。

translations.sCN: 在所有人都同意的情况下
translations.sentence: We proceeded with the project, with everybody agreeing on the direction.
translations.tran: 我们在项目上继续进行，所有人都同意这个方向。

translations.sCN: 非常小心地，格外谨慎地
translations.sentence: She handled the fragile object with great care.
translations.tran: 她非常小心地搬动了易碎物品。

translations.sentence: The investigation was conducted with great care.
translations.tran: 调查非常谨慎。

translations.sentence: He spoke about his work with great passion.
translations.tran: 他充满激情地谈论着他的工作。

translations.sentence: She pursued her hobbies with great passion.
translations.tran: 她怀着极大的热情追求她的爱好。

translations.sentence: The team worked with one accord.
translations.tran: 团队同心协力地工作。

translations.sentence: They all cheered with one accord.
translations.tran: 他们异口同声地欢呼。

translations.sentence: The crowd shouted with one voice.
translations.tran: 人群异口同声地喊叫。

translations.sentence: The committee spoke with one voice on the matter.
translations.tran: 委员会在这个问题上一致表示意见。

translations.sCN: 在某人同意下，经过某人的同意
translations.sentence: The project was carried out with his consent.
translations.tran: 该项目是在他同意下进行的。

translations.sentence: We need to proceed with your consent.
translations.tran: 我们需要征得你的同意后才能进行。

translations.sentence: I saw it with my own eyes.
translations.tran: 我亲眼看到了。

translations.sentence: He confirmed the facts with his own eyes.
translations.tran: 他亲自证实了事实。

translations.sentence: I'll help you with pleasure.
translations.tran: 我很乐意帮助你。

translations.sentence: They accepted the invitation with pleasure.
translations.tran: 他们高兴地接受了邀请。

translations.sentence: With reference to your inquiry, the price is $100.
translations.tran: 关于您的询问，价格是100美元。

translations.sentence: Please consult the manual with reference to the installation.
translations.tran: 请参考手册进行安装。

translations.sentence: With regard to your request, we will consider it.
translations.tran: 关于您的请求，我们会考虑。

translations.sentence: With regard to health, exercise is important.
translations.tran: 就健康而言，锻炼很重要。

translations.sentence: The report provided data with relation to the recent events.
translations.tran: 该报告提供了关于最近事件的数据。

translations.sentence: We discussed issues with relation to the project's budget.
translations.tran: 我们讨论了与项目预算相关的问题。

translations.sentence: He treated everyone with respect.
translations.tran: 他尊重地对待每个人。

translations.sentence: She spoke of her mentor with respect.
translations.tran: 她出于尊敬地谈论她的导师。

translations.sentence: With respect to your concerns, we are looking into them.
translations.tran: 关于您的担忧，我们正在调查。

translations.sentence: With respect to the deadline, we are on track.
translations.tran: 就截止日期而言，我们按计划进行。

translations.sentence: We have several points to discuss with respect to the new regulations.
translations.tran: 关于新规定，我们有几点需要讨论。

translations.sentence: He showed great expertise with respect to financial matters.
translations.tran: 他在财务方面展现了极高的专业知识。

translations.sentence: With that, he left the room.
translations.tran: 说完那句话后，他离开了房间。

translations.sentence: With that in mind, we should proceed carefully.
translations.tran: 鉴于此，我们应该谨慎行事。

translations.sCN: 随着…的到来；随着…的出现
translations.sentence: With the advent of the internet, communication has become much easier.
translations.tran: 随着互联网的到来，沟通变得容易多了。

translations.sentence: With the advent of spring, flowers begin to bloom.
translations.tran: 随着春天的到来，花儿开始绽放。

translations.sCN: 在…的帮助下；借助…的帮助
translations.sentence: She finished the project with the aid of her colleagues.
translations.tran: 她在同事们的帮助下完成了项目。

translations.sentence: We managed to move the piano with the aid of a professional mover.
translations.tran: 我们在专业搬运工的协助下成功搬走了钢琴。

phrase: with the click of a mouse

translations.sCN: 只需鼠标一点；鼠标一点
translations.sentence: You can order it with the click of a mouse.
translations.tran: 你只需鼠标一点就能订购它。

translations.sentence: I can access all the information with the click of a mouse.
translations.tran: 我只需点击鼠标就能访问所有信息。

translations.sentence: Everyone was invited with the exception of John.
translations.tran: 除了约翰，所有人都被邀请了。

translations.sentence: All fruits are allowed with the exception of bananas.
translations.tran: 除香蕉外，所有水果都被允许。

translations.sentence: She learned to swim with the help of an instructor.
translations.tran: 她在教练的帮助下学会了游泳。

translations.sentence: He repaired the car with the help of his friend.
translations.tran: 他在朋友的帮助下修好了车。

translations.sentence: With the passage of time, memories can fade.
translations.tran: 随着时间的推移，记忆可能会褪色。

translations.sentence: With the passage of time, they became closer.
translations.tran: 随着时间的流逝，他们变得更亲近了。

translations.sentence: They met with the purpose of discussing the new project.
translations.tran: 他们会面是为了讨论新项目。

translations.sentence: He went to the library with the purpose of researching the topic.
translations.tran: 他去图书馆是为了研究这个话题。

translations.sentence: He worked hard, with the result that he got a promotion.
translations.tran: 他努力工作，结果得到了晋升。

translations.sentence: She was late, with the result that she missed the bus.
translations.tran: 她迟到了，以至于错过了公交车。

translations.sentence: The car was traveling with the speed of 100 miles per hour.
translations.tran: 这辆车以每小时100英里的速度行驶。

translations.sentence: He finished the race with the speed of a professional runner.
translations.tran: 他以专业跑步运动员的速度完成了比赛。

translations.sentence: She is studying with the view of becoming a doctor.
translations.tran: 她正在学习，旨在成为一名医生。

translations.sentence: They started a new business with the view of making a profit.
translations.tran: 他们开始了一项新业务，目的是为了盈利。

translations.sentence: He decided to withdraw his resignation after reconsideration.
translations.tran: 他经过深思熟虑后决定撤回辞呈。

translations.sentence: She was persuaded to withdraw her resignation.
translations.tran: 她被说服收回了辞职。

translations.sentence: The flowers began to wither away in the heat.
translations.tran: 花朵在炎热中开始凋零。

translations.sentence: Their influence began to wither away over time.
translations.tran: 他们的影响力随着时间的推移而衰退。

translations.sentence: We can do that within limits.
translations.tran: 我们可以在一定限度内做这件事。

translations.sentence: The company operates within limits set by the government.
translations.tran: 该公司在政府设定的限制范围内运营。

translations.sCN: 在某人够得着的地方；在某人能力范围内
translations.sentence: The book was just within her reach.
translations.tran: 这本书就在她够得着的地方。

translations.sentence: Success is within his reach if he works hard.
translations.tran: 如果他努力工作，成功就在他力所能及的范围。

translations.sentence: The medicine should be kept within reach of children.
translations.tran: 药物应放在儿童够得着的地方。

translations.sentence: The goal is within reach.
translations.tran: 目标就在可及的范围内。

translations.sentence: The house is within reach of the city.
translations.tran: 这所房子位于城市的范围之内。

translations.sentence: The information is now within reach of everyone.
translations.tran: 现在每个人都能获得这些信息。

translations.sCN: 合乎情理；在合理的范围内
translations.sentence: We can do that, within reason.
translations.tran: 我们可以在合理的范围内做。

translations.sentence: The prices are within reason.
translations.tran: 这些价格在合理的限度内。

translations.sentence: This is with reference to your previous inquiry.
translations.tran: 这是关于你之前的询问。

translations.sentence: The report is within reference to the latest data.
translations.tran: 该报告涉及最新数据。

translations.sentence: Within regard to your suggestion, I agree.
translations.tran: 关于你的建议，我同意。

translations.sentence: The decision was made within regard to the current situation.
translations.tran: 该决定是根据当前情况做出的。

translations.sentence: The research was conducted within the confines of the laboratory.
translations.tran: 研究是在实验室的范围内进行的。

translations.sentence: They lived within the confines of tradition.
translations.tran: 他们生活在传统的约束下。

translations.sentence: She spoke without a pause.
translations.tran: 她说话时毫不间断。

translations.sentence: The music played without a pause.
translations.tran: 音乐连续播放。

translations.sCN: 无可匹敌的；无与伦比的
translations.sentence: She is a dancer without a rival.
translations.tran: 她是一位无可匹敌的舞者。

translations.sentence: The company is without a rival in this market.
translations.tran: 这家公司在这个市场上没有对手。

phrase: without a shadow of a doubt

translations.sentence: I know without a shadow of a doubt that he is the one.
translations.tran: 我毫不怀疑地知道，他就是那个人。

translations.sentence: Without a shadow of a doubt, the report is accurate.
translations.tran: 毫无疑问，这份报告是准确的。

translations.sCN: 安全地；没有发生事故地
translations.sentence: The plane landed without accident.
translations.tran: 飞机安全着陆。

translations.sentence: The project was completed without accident.
translations.tran: 项目顺利完成，没有发生意外。

translations.sCN: 漫无目的地；毫无目标地
translations.sentence: He wandered the streets without aim.
translations.tran: 他漫无目的地在街上游荡。

translations.sentence: The arrow flew without aim and missed the target.
translations.tran: 箭射出去，没有目标，射偏了。

translations.sCN: 毫无目标和目的；漫无目的
translations.sentence: They drifted through life without aim or purpose.
translations.tran: 他们毫无目标和目的地度过一生。

translations.sentence: The speech seemed without aim or purpose.
translations.tran: 这次演讲似乎既无目标也无目的。

translations.sentence: She helped him without being asked.
translations.tran: 她主动帮助了他。

translations.sentence: He offered to help without being asked.
translations.tran: 他主动提出帮忙，没有被要求。

translations.sentence: Her beauty is without compare.
translations.tran: 她的美貌无与伦比。

translations.sentence: His skill is without compare.
translations.tran: 他的技能无人能及。

translations.sentence: The article was published without credit.
translations.tran: 这篇文章没有署名发表。

translations.sentence: He worked hard without credit.
translations.tran: 他努力工作，却未受赞扬。

translations.sentence: The work went on without day.
translations.tran: 工作无休止地进行着。

translations.sentence: The factory operated without day to meet the demand.
translations.tran: 为了满足需求，这家工厂昼夜不停地运转。

translations.sentence: Please respond without delay.
translations.tran: 请立即回复。

translations.sentence: The project should be started without delay.
translations.tran: 这个项目应该立即开始。

translations.sentence: She is, without doubt, the best candidate.
translations.tran: 毫无疑问，她是最佳人选。

translations.sentence: Without doubt, he will succeed.
translations.tran: 毫无疑问，他会成功的。

translations.sCN: 毫不夸张地；实事求是地
translations.sentence: I can tell you without exaggeration that it was a great success.
translations.tran: 我可以告诉你，毫不夸张地说，那是一个巨大的成功。

translations.sentence: The report describes the situation without exaggeration.
translations.tran: 这份报告对情况的描述没有夸大。

translations.sentence: The rule applies without exception.
translations.tran: 这条规则一律适用。

translations.sentence: All students must attend the meeting without exception.
translations.tran: 所有学生都必须参加会议，一个也不例外。

translations.sentence: Please submit the report by Friday without fail.
translations.tran: 请务必在周五前提交报告。

translations.sentence: I'll be there without fail.
translations.tran: 我一定会去。

phrase: without giving any thought for sth.

translations.sCN: 毫不考虑某事；没有考虑到某事
translations.sentence: He acted without giving any thought for the consequences.
translations.tran: 他采取行动时，没有考虑到后果。

translations.sentence: She made the decision without giving any thought for the potential problems.
translations.tran: 她做出决定时没有细想潜在的问题。

translations.sentence: Their generosity was without limits.
translations.tran: 他们的慷慨是无止境的。

translations.sentence: The project's budget is without limits.
translations.tran: 这个项目的预算没有限制。

translations.sentence: She spoke without minutes' pause.
translations.tran: 她不停顿地说话。

translations.sentence: The machine ran without minutes' pause.
translations.tran: 机器几乎不停顿地运行。

translations.sentence: The stars in the sky are without number.
translations.tran: 天上的星星数不胜数。

translations.sentence: There are problems without number.
translations.tran: 问题多得数不清。

translations.sentence: The service is provided without payment.
translations.tran: 这项服务是免费提供的。

translations.sentence: The website offers information without payment.
translations.tran: 这个网站提供信息，无需付费。

translations.sentence: He entered the building without permission.
translations.tran: 他未经许可进入了大楼。

translations.sentence: The software was installed without permission.
translations.tran: 该软件未经允许被安装。

translations.sCN: 不损害（某人或某事物的）权利
translations.sentence: The settlement was made without prejudice.
translations.tran: 该和解是在不损害任何权利的情况下进行的。

translations.sentence: The decision was made without prejudice to future applications.
translations.tran: 该决定不影响未来的申请。

translations.sentence: This is without prejudice to your right to appeal.
translations.tran: 这不妨碍你上诉的权利。

translations.sentence: The company can still operate without prejudice to the current regulations.
translations.tran: 该公司仍然可以在不损害现行法规的情况下运营。

translations.sentence: He wandered around without purpose.
translations.tran: 他毫无目的地四处游荡。

translations.sentence: The exercise felt without purpose.
translations.tran: 这个练习感觉毫无意义。

translations.sentence: She accepted the offer without question.
translations.tran: 她毫不犹豫地接受了这份提议。

translations.sentence: His loyalty was without question.
translations.tran: 他的忠诚是毋庸置疑的。

translations.sentence: The decision was made without regard to public opinion.
translations.tran: 这项决定没有考虑公众舆论。

translations.sentence: They treated people without regard to their race.
translations.tran: 他们无视种族对待他人。

translations.sentence: She gave her opinion without reserve.
translations.tran: 她毫不保留地表达了自己的看法。

translations.sentence: He loves her without reserve.
translations.tran: 他全心全意地爱着她。

translations.sentence: The children played without restraint.
translations.tran: 孩子们无拘无束地玩耍。

translations.sentence: He spent money without restraint.
translations.tran: 他挥霍无度。

translations.sentence: He did this without sake.
translations.tran: 他这样做没有任何目的。

translations.sentence: He left without so much as a goodbye.
translations.tran: 他甚至连再见都没说就走了。

translations.sentence: She passed me without so much as a glance.
translations.tran: 她从我身边走过，甚至没有看我一眼。

translations.sentence: He could enjoy the vacation without worrying about work.
translations.tran: 他可以不用担心工作，享受假期。

translations.sentence: You can travel without worrying about your luggage.
translations.tran: 你可以旅行，不必为你的行李烦恼。

translations.sentence: I wonder at her courage.
translations.tran: 我惊叹于她的勇气。

translations.sentence: We wondered at the strange behavior of the cat.
translations.tran: 我们对猫的奇怪行为感到好奇。

translations.sentence: I wonder if he will come.
translations.tran: 我想知道他是否会来。

translations.sentence: I wonder if it's the right decision.
translations.tran: 我不知道这是否是正确的决定。

translations.sentence: She translated the document word by word.
translations.tran: 她逐字逐句地翻译了这份文件。

translations.sentence: He repeated the instructions word by word.
translations.tran: 他一字不差地重复了指示。

translations.sentence: The transcript was a word-for-word account of the conversation.
translations.tran: 记录是这次对话的逐字逐句的记录。

translations.sentence: She remembered the poem word for word.
translations.tran: 她一字不差地记住了这首诗。

translations.sentence: She works as a teacher.
translations.tran: 她是一名教师。

translations.sentence: The drug works as a pain reliever.
translations.tran: 这种药起止痛的作用。

translations.sentence: He works at a bank.
translations.tran: 他在一家银行工作。

translations.sentence: She works at improving her English.
translations.tran: 她致力于提高她的英语水平。

translations.sentence: He worked away at his project all weekend.
translations.tran: 他整个周末都在努力完成他的项目。

translations.sentence: The rain worked away the stains.
translations.tran: 雨水逐渐冲刷掉了污渍。

translations.sentence: He works for Google.
translations.tran: 他在谷歌工作。

translations.sentence: Exercise works for your health.
translations.tran: 锻炼对你的健康有益。

phrase: work hand in glove with sb.

translations.sentence: The police and the government worked hand in glove to solve the crime.
translations.tran: 警方和政府密切合作以解决此案。

translations.sentence: They were accused of working hand in glove with the criminals.
translations.tran: 他们被指控与罪犯勾结。

translations.sCN: 消除，摆脱；通过…消耗(能量)
translations.sentence: He worked off his anger by going for a run.
translations.tran: 他通过跑步来消解他的怒火。

translations.sentence: I'm working off my debt to the bank.
translations.tran: 我正在偿还欠银行的债务。

translations.sentence: She is working on a new project.
translations.tran: 她正在进行一个新项目。

translations.sentence: I need to work on my pronunciation.
translations.tran: 我需要改进我的发音。

translations.sentence: I work out at the gym three times a week.
translations.tran: 我每周在健身房锻炼三次。

translations.sentence: We need to work out the details of the contract.
translations.tran: 我们需要解决合同的细节。

translations.sentence: Everything will work out in the end.
translations.tran: 最终一切都会好起来的。

translations.sentence: It's difficult to work out this problem.
translations.tran: 解决这个问题很困难。

translations.sentence: Can you work out this puzzle?
translations.tran: 你能解开这个谜题吗？

translations.sentence: Let's work out some ideas for the new campaign.
translations.tran: 让我们为新的活动琢磨一些想法。

translations.sentence: We need to work out the amount of materials required.
translations.tran: 我们需要计算出所需的材料数量。

translations.sentence: The new work regime has improved productivity.
translations.tran: 新的工作制度提高了生产力。

translations.sentence: We need to work together with other departments.
translations.tran: 我们需要与其他部门一起工作。

translations.sentence: He works under the direction of the project manager.
translations.tran: 他在项目经理的指导下工作。

translations.sentence: He worked up a sweat while running.
translations.tran: 他在跑步时出了一身汗。

translations.sentence: She worked up a plan to solve the problem.
translations.tran: 她制定了一个解决问题的计划。

translations.sentence: He worked up his courage and asked her out.
translations.tran: 他鼓起勇气约了她出去。

translations.sentence: I work with a great team.
translations.tran: 我和一个很棒的团队一起工作。

translations.sentence: I know how to work with this software.
translations.tran: 我懂得如何使用这个软件。

translations.sentence: This tradition has been passed down from world without end.
translations.tran: 这个传统已经代代相传，永永远远。

translations.sentence: She is a world-renowned pianist.
translations.tran: 她是一位世界闻名的钢琴家。

translations.sentence: I'm feeling worn out after a long day.
translations.tran: 经过漫长的一天，我感到疲惫不堪。

translations.sentence: These shoes are worn out.
translations.tran: 这双鞋已经破旧不堪了。

translations.sentence: Don't worry about the test.
translations.tran: 别担心考试。

translations.sentence: The situation is worse than we thought.
translations.tran: 情况比我们想象的更糟。

translations.sentence: They sold a worth of goods.
translations.tran: 他们卖出了价值…的货物。

translations.sentence: Any chef worth their salt can cook this dish.
translations.tran: 任何一位胜任的厨师都能做出这道菜。

translations.sentence: It's worth your while to visit this museum.
translations.tran: 参观这个博物馆是值得你花时间的。

translations.sentence: The museum is worthy of a visit.
translations.tran: 这家博物馆值得一游。

translations.sentence: This book is worthy of being read by everyone.
translations.tran: 这本书值得每个人阅读。

phrase: would like sb. to do sth.

translations.sentence: I would like you to come with me.
translations.tran: 我希望你和我一起去。

translations.sentence: I would like to go now.
translations.tran: 我想现在就走。

translations.sentence: I would like to do some shopping this weekend.
translations.tran: 这个周末我想去购物。

translations.sentence: She would like to learn French.
translations.tran: 她想学法语。

phrase: would love sb. to do sth.

translations.sCN: 希望某人做某事（更强烈的愿望）
translations.sentence: I would love you to join us.
translations.tran: 我希望你加入我们。

translations.sentence: I would love to see that movie.
translations.tran: 我很想看那部电影。

translations.sentence: I would love to do it for you.
translations.tran: 我很想为你做这件事。

translations.sentence: She would love to travel around the world.
translations.tran: 她很想环游世界。

translations.sentence: I would rather stay home.
translations.tran: 我宁愿待在家里。

translations.sentence: I would rather walk than take the bus.
translations.tran: 我宁愿步行也不坐公交车。

translations.sentence: I would rather eat pizza.
translations.tran: 我宁愿吃披萨。

translations.sentence: I would rather read a book than watch TV.
translations.tran: 我宁愿看书也不看电视。

translations.sentence: He would rather stay at home than go out.
translations.tran: 他宁愿待在家里也不出去。

translations.sentence: I would sooner go out.
translations.tran: 我宁愿出去。

translations.sentence: I would sooner swim than run.
translations.tran: 我宁愿游泳也不跑步。

translations.sentence: I would eat vegetables rather than meat.
translations.tran: 我宁愿吃蔬菜也不吃肉。

translations.sentence: He wound up being very successful.
translations.tran: 他最终非常成功。

translations.sentence: He wound up the clock.
translations.tran: 他给钟上了发条。

translations.sentence: Let's wrap up this meeting.
translations.tran: 让我们结束这次会议吧。

translations.sentence: He wrapped up the present.
translations.tran: 他把礼物包起来了。

translations.sentence: I wrote away for the brochure.
translations.tran: 我写信索要了小册子。

translations.sentence: I need to write down your phone number.
translations.tran: 我需要记下你的电话号码。

translations.sentence: Please write down the minutes of the meeting.
translations.tran: 请记录会议记录。

translations.sentence: He wrote down his thoughts in a journal.
translations.tran: 他把他的想法写在日记里。

translations.sentence: Please write in your name and address on the form.
translations.tran: 请在表格上填写您的姓名和地址。

translations.sentence: Many viewers wrote in to complain about the show.
translations.tran: 许多观众写信来抱怨这个节目。

translations.sentence: They wrote in a candidate who wasn't on the ballot.
translations.tran: 他们写信给一个不在选票上的候选人投票。

translations.sentence: The company had to write off a large debt.
translations.tran: 该公司不得不注销一笔巨额债务。

translations.sentence: The car was written off after the accident.
translations.tran: 那辆车在事故后被报废。

translations.sentence: Don't write off the possibility of success.
translations.tran: 不要低估成功的可能性。

translations.sentence: She wrote to her friend every week.
translations.tran: 她每周都给她朋友写信。

translations.sentence: I wrote to the company to complain about the service.
translations.tran: 我写信给公司投诉他们的服务。

translations.sentence: He decided to write to his mother.
translations.tran: 他决定给他母亲写信。

translations.sentence: Year after year, the company made a profit.
translations.tran: 年复一年，该公司盈利。

translations.sentence: The company’s sales increased year by year.
translations.tran: 该公司的销售额逐年增长。

translations.sentence: He has been working here year in, year out.
translations.tran: 他在这里工作年复一年。

translations.sentence: She yearned for a return to her childhood.
translations.tran: 她渴望回到童年。

translations.sentence: He yearned for adventure.
translations.tran: 他渴望冒险。

translations.sentence: The teacher yelled at the students.
translations.tran: 老师对学生大喊。

translations.sentence: The city issued a yellow alert for the storm.
translations.tran: 该市发布了针对风暴的黄色警报。

translations.sentence: The tree is expected to yield more fruits next year.
translations.tran: 预计这棵树明年将结出更多果实。

translations.sentence: The new strategies are expected to yield more fruits.
translations.tran: 预计新的策略将产生更多结果。

translations.sentence: The soldiers yielded to the enemy.
translations.tran: 士兵们向敌人投降。

translations.sentence: He yielded to the pressure of his friends.
translations.tran: 他屈从于朋友们的压力。

translations.sentence: The land yields a good crop.
translations.tran: 这片土地出产丰收的庄稼。

translations.sentence: He has a great zeal for his work.
translations.tran: 他对工作充满热情。

translations.sentence: Zip up your jacket, it's cold outside.
translations.tran: 把你的夹克拉上拉链，外面很冷。
